```ts
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import type { ChatMessage } from "../tools/orchestration-gateway.js"

export class LLMBackendError extends Error {
  constructor(message: string) {
    super(message)
    this.name = "LLMBackendError"
  }
}

export type OpenAICompatResult = {
  id: string
  object: string
  created: number
  model: string
  choices: Array<{
    index: number
    message: { role: string; content: string }
    finish_reason: string
  }>
  usage: { prompt_tokens: number; completion_tokens: number; total_tokens: number }
}

export class LLMManager {
  constructor(private readonly cfg: PlatformConfig) {}

  async chatCompletion(
    messages: ChatMessage[],
    options: { temperature?: number; max_tokens?: number } = {},
  ): Promise<OpenAICompatResult> {
    const { llmBackend } = this.cfg
    const temperature = options.temperature ?? 0.7
    const maxTokens = options.max_tokens ?? 1000

    if (llmBackend === "ollama") {
      return this.ollamaChat(messages, temperature, maxTokens)
    }
    if (llmBackend === "vllm") {
      return this.vllmChat(messages, temperature, maxTokens)
    }
    if (llmBackend === "huggingface" || llmBackend === "hf") {
      return this.openAiCompatChat(
        messages,
        temperature,
        maxTokens,
        this.cfg.huggingfaceBaseUrl,
        this.cfg.huggingfaceModel,
        this.cfg.huggingfaceApiKey,
      )
    }
    if (llmBackend === "openrouter") {
      return this.openAiCompatChat(
        messages,
        temperature,
        maxTokens,
        this.cfg.openrouterBaseUrl ?? "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
        this.cfg.openrouterModel ?? "openai/gpt-4o-mini",
        this.cfg.openrouterApiKey,
        this.openRouterExtraHeaders(),
      )
    }
    if (llmBackend === "gemini") {
      return this.openAiCompatChat(
        messages,
        temperature,
        maxTokens,
        this.cfg.geminiBaseUrl ?? "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai",
        this.cfg.geminiModel ?? "gemini-2.0-flash",
        this.cfg.geminiApiKey,
      )
    }
    return this.mockChat(messages)
  }

  private openRouterExtraHeaders(): Record<string, string> | undefined {
    const referer = process.env.OPENROUTER_HTTP_REFERER?.trim()
    const title = process.env.OPENROUTER_HTTP_TITLE?.trim()
    if (!referer && !title) return undefined
    const out: Record<string, string> = {}
    if (referer) out["HTTP-Referer"] = referer
    if (title) out["X-Title"] = title
    return out
  }

  private async ollamaChat(
    messages: ChatMessage[],
    temperature: number,
    maxTokens: number,
  ): Promise<OpenAICompatResult> {
    const payload = {
      model: this.cfg.ollamaModel,
      messages,
      stream: false,
      options: {
        temperature,
        num_predict: maxTokens,
      },
    }
    const base = this.cfg.llmRunnerUrl
    const headers: Record<string, string> = { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
    if (this.cfg.llmRunnerApiKey) {
      headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${this.cfg.llmRunnerApiKey}`
    }
    const res = await fetch(`${base}/api/chat`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers,
      body: JSON.stringify(payload),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(120_000),
    })
    if (!res.ok) {
      throw new LLMBackendError(`Ollama HTTP ${res.status}`)
    }
    const result = (await res.json()) as {
      message?: { content?: string }
      prompt_eval_count?: number
      eval_count?: number
    }
    const content = result.message?.content ?? ""
    const prompt = result.prompt_eval_count ?? 0
    const completion = result.eval_count ?? 0
    const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)
    return {
      id: `ollama-${now}`,
      object: "chat.completion",
      created: now,
      model: this.cfg.ollamaModel,
      choices: [
        {
          index: 0,
          message: { role: "assistant", content },
          finish_reason: "stop",
        },
      ],
      usage: {
        prompt_tokens: prompt,
        completion_tokens: completion,
        total_tokens: prompt + completion,
      },
    }
  }

  private async vllmChat(
    messages: ChatMessage[],
    temperature: number,
    maxTokens: number,
  ): Promise<OpenAICompatResult> {
    return this.openAiCompatChat(
      messages,
      temperature,
      maxTokens,
      `${this.cfg.llmRunnerUrl.replace(/\/$/, "")}/v1`,
      this.cfg.vllmModel,
      this.cfg.llmRunnerApiKey,
    )
  }

  private async openAiCompatChat(
    messages: ChatMessage[],
    temperature: number,
    maxTokens: number,
    baseUrl: string,
    model: string,
    apiKey?: string,
    extraHeaders?: Record<string, string>,
  ): Promise<OpenAICompatResult> {
    const base = baseUrl.replace(/\/$/, "")
    const payload = {
      model,
      messages,
      temperature,
      max_tokens: maxTokens,
      stream: false,
    }
    const headers: Record<string, string> = { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...extraHeaders }
    if (apiKey) {
      headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${apiKey}`
    }
    const res = await fetch(`${base}/chat/completions`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers,
      body: JSON.stringify(payload),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(120_000),
    })
    if (!res.ok) {
      throw new LLMBackendError(`OpenAI-compatible HTTP ${res.status}`)
    }
    return (await res.json()) as OpenAICompatResult
  }

  private mockChat(messages: ChatMessage[]): OpenAICompatResult {
    const lastUser = [...messages].reverse().find((m) => m.role === "user")
    const prefix = "[MOCK]"
    const content = `${prefix} Echo: ${(lastUser?.content ?? "").slice(0, 256)}`
    const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)
    return {
      id: `mock-${now}`,
      object: "chat.completion",
      created: now,
      model: "mock-llm",
      choices: [
        {
          index: 0,
          message: { role: "assistant", content },
          finish_reason: "stop",
        },
      ],
      usage: { prompt_tokens: 0, completion_tokens: 0, total_tokens: 0 },
    }
  }

  async healthCheck(): Promise<{ healthy: boolean; backend: string; detail?: string }> {
    const { llmBackend } = this.cfg
    if (llmBackend === "mock" || llmBackend === "none" || llmBackend === "disabled") {
      return { healthy: true, backend: llmBackend }
    }
    if (llmBackend === "ollama") {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${this.cfg.llmRunnerUrl}/api/tags`, {
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5_000),
        })
        return { healthy: res.ok, backend: "ollama" }
      } catch (e) {
        return {
          healthy: false,
          backend: "ollama",
          detail: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
        }
      }
    }
    if (llmBackend === "vllm") {
      const base = this.cfg.llmRunnerUrl.replace(/\/$/, "")
      try {
        let res = await fetch(`${base}/health`, { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5_000) })
        if (!res.ok) {
          res = await fetch(`${base}/v1/models`, { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5_000) })
        }
        return { healthy: res.ok, backend: "vllm" }
      } catch (e) {
        return {
          healthy: false,
          backend: "vllm",
          detail: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
        }
      }
    }
    if (llmBackend === "huggingface" || llmBackend === "hf") {
      const headers: Record<string, string> = {}
      if (this.cfg.huggingfaceApiKey) {
        headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${this.cfg.huggingfaceApiKey}`
      }
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${this.cfg.huggingfaceBaseUrl}/models`, {
          headers,
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10_000),
        })
        return { healthy: res.ok, backend: "huggingface" }
      } catch (e) {
        return {
          healthy: false,
          backend: "huggingface",
          detail: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
        }
      }
    }
    if (llmBackend === "openrouter") {
      const base = this.cfg.openrouterBaseUrl ?? "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"
      const headers: Record<string, string> = {}
      if (this.cfg.openrouterApiKey) {
        headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${this.cfg.openrouterApiKey}`
      }
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${base.replace(/\/$/, "")}/models`, {
          headers,
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(15_000),
        })
        return { healthy: res.ok, backend: "openrouter" }
      } catch (e) {
        return {
          healthy: false,
          backend: "openrouter",
          detail: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
        }
      }
    }
    if (llmBackend === "gemini") {
      const base = this.cfg.geminiBaseUrl ?? "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai"
      const headers: Record<string, string> = {}
      if (this.cfg.geminiApiKey) {
        headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${this.cfg.geminiApiKey}`
      }
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${base.replace(/\/$/, "")}/models`, {
          headers,
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(15_000),
        })
        return { healthy: res.ok, backend: "gemini" }
      } catch (e) {
        return {
          healthy: false,
          backend: "gemini",
          detail: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
        }
      }
    }
    return { healthy: true, backend: llmBackend }
  }

  async listModels(): Promise<string[]> {
    if (this.cfg.llmBackend === "mock") {
      return ["mock-llm"]
    }
    if (this.cfg.llmBackend === "ollama") {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${this.cfg.llmRunnerUrl}/api/tags`, {
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10_000),
        })
        if (!res.ok) return []
        const data = (await res.json()) as { models?: Array<{ name: string }> }
        return (data.models ?? []).map((m) => m.name)
      } catch {
        return []
      }
    }
    if (this.cfg.llmBackend === "vllm") {
      const base = this.cfg.llmRunnerUrl.replace(/\/$/, "")
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${base}/v1/models`, { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10_000) })
        if (!res.ok) return []
        const data = (await res.json()) as { data?: Array<{ id: string }> }
        return (data.data ?? []).map((m) => m.id)
      } catch {
        return []
      }
    }
    if (this.cfg.llmBackend === "huggingface" || this.cfg.llmBackend === "hf") {
      const headers: Record<string, string> = {}
      if (this.cfg.huggingfaceApiKey) {
        headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${this.cfg.huggingfaceApiKey}`
      }
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${this.cfg.huggingfaceBaseUrl}/models`, {
          headers,
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10_000),
        })
        if (!res.ok) return []
        const data = (await res.json()) as { data?: Array<{ id: string }> }
        return (data.data ?? []).map((m) => m.id)
      } catch {
        return []
      }
    }
    if (this.cfg.llmBackend === "openrouter") {
      const base = this.cfg.openrouterBaseUrl ?? "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"
      const headers: Record<string, string> = {}
      if (this.cfg.openrouterApiKey) {
        headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${this.cfg.openrouterApiKey}`
      }
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${base.replace(/\/$/, "")}/models`, {
          headers,
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(15_000),
        })
        if (!res.ok) return []
        const data = (await res.json()) as { data?: Array<{ id: string }> }
        return (data.data ?? []).map((m) => m.id)
      } catch {
        return []
      }
    }
    if (this.cfg.llmBackend === "gemini") {
      const base = this.cfg.geminiBaseUrl ?? "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai"
      const headers: Record<string, string> = {}
      if (this.cfg.geminiApiKey) {
        headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${this.cfg.geminiApiKey}`
      }
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${base.replace(/\/$/, "")}/models`, {
          headers,
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(15_000),
        })
        if (!res.ok) return []
        const data = (await res.json()) as { data?: Array<{ id: string }> }
        return (data.data ?? []).map((m) => m.id)
      } catch {
        return []
      }
    }
    return []
  }

  getBackendInfo(): { type: string; model: string } {
    const { llmBackend: b } = this.cfg
    let model = this.cfg.ollamaModel
    if (b === "vllm") model = this.cfg.vllmModel
    else if (b === "huggingface" || b === "hf") model = this.cfg.huggingfaceModel
    else if (b === "openrouter") model = this.cfg.openrouterModel ?? "openai/gpt-4o-mini"
    else if (b === "gemini") model = this.cfg.geminiModel ?? "gemini-2.0-flash"
    return {
      type: b,
      model,
    }
  }
}
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/llm/model-runtime-client.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`

```ts
/**
 * HTTP client for Python model-runtime: strict /infer and /solve routes.
 *
 * For agents: no model IDs here — server resolves from models.yaml.
 *
 * Wiring note (v1): only `postInferMultimodal` is used by the orchestration engine
 * (`multimodal_model` → model-runtime). `postInferGeneral` and `postInferCoding` are
 * exported for symmetry and future/local tooling; they are not called from
 * `runtime-router.ts` / `engine.ts` today.
 */

import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"

export type ModelRuntimeInferResponse = {
  usage: { prompt_tokens: number; completion_tokens: number; latency_ms: number }
  model_id_resolved: string
  text?: string
  structured_output?: Record<string, unknown>
}

function base(cfg: PlatformConfig): string {
  const b = cfg.modelRuntimeBaseUrl
  if (!b) {
    throw new Error("modelRuntimeBaseUrl unset (MODEL_RUNTIME_URL)")
  }
  return b.replace(/\/$/, "")
}

export async function postInferGeneral(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  body: Record<string, unknown>,
  workflowRoot: boolean,
): Promise<ModelRuntimeInferResponse> {
  const url = `${base(cfg)}/infer/general?workflow_root=${workflowRoot ? "true" : "false"}`
  const res = await fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
  })
  if (!res.ok) {
    const t = await res.text()
    throw new Error(`infer/general ${res.status}: ${t}`)
  }
  return (await res.json()) as ModelRuntimeInferResponse
}

export async function postInferCoding(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  body: Record<string, unknown>,
): Promise<ModelRuntimeInferResponse> {
  const res = await fetch(`${base(cfg)}/infer/coding`, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
  })
  if (!res.ok) {
    const t = await res.text()
    throw new Error(`infer/coding ${res.status}: ${t}`)
  }
  return (await res.json()) as ModelRuntimeInferResponse
}

export async function postInferMultimodal(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  body: Record<string, unknown>,
): Promise<ModelRuntimeInferResponse> {
  const res = await fetch(`${base(cfg)}/infer/multimodal`, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
  })
  if (!res.ok) {
    const t = await res.text()
    throw new Error(`infer/multimodal ${res.status}: ${t}`)
  }
  return (await res.json()) as ModelRuntimeInferResponse
}
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/oma/catalog-profile.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 3591 bytes

```ts
/**
 * OMA HTTP catalog visibility (`GET /v1/oma/tools`) — optional `primitive` profile that
 * mirrors Control Plane MCP’s `CONTROL_PLANE_MCP_PROFILE=primitive` idea: hide META escape-hatches and
 * workflow-namespace GUI aliases so constrained agents see thin primitives first.
 *
 * Runtime tool execution can be gated separately via `OMA_TOOL_PRESET` (see below).
 */

import type { ToolDefinition } from "@xlotyl/open-multi-agent"

/** Values accepted for `OMA_CATALOG_PROFILE` (case-insensitive). */
export type OmaCatalogProfile = "full" | "primitive"

/** Values accepted for `OMA_TOOL_PRESET` (case-insensitive). */
export type OmaToolPreset = "full" | "primitive" | "admin"

/** Parse env; unknown non-empty values fall back to `full` (caller should warn). */
export function parseOmaCatalogProfile(raw: string | undefined): OmaCatalogProfile {
  const v = (raw ?? "full").trim().toLowerCase()
  if (v === "primitive") return "primitive"
  return "full"
}

/** Parse env; unknown non-empty values fall back to `primitive` (caller should warn). */
export function parseOmaToolPreset(raw: string | undefined): OmaToolPreset {
  const v = (raw ?? "primitive").trim().toLowerCase()
  if (v === "full") return "full"
  if (v === "admin") return "admin"
  return "primitive"
}

/** True when `raw` was set but did not resolve to a known profile keyword. */
export function isUnknownOmaCatalogProfile(raw: string | undefined): boolean {
  const v = (raw ?? "").trim().toLowerCase()
  if (v === "") return false
  return v !== "full" && v !== "primitive"
}

/** True when `raw` was set but did not resolve to a known preset keyword. */
export function isUnknownOmaToolPreset(raw: string | undefined): boolean {
  const v = (raw ?? "").trim().toLowerCase()
  if (v === "") return false
  return v !== "full" && v !== "primitive" && v !== "admin"
}

/**
 * META tools: first-line description convention `META / …` in `orchestration-tools.ts`.
 * Composite: `Composite:` prefix (orchestrator pipelines; not thin CRUD primitives).
 * Workflow-tier: `workflow_*` GUI aliases (same execute paths as `container_gui.*`).
 */
function isHiddenInPrimitiveProfile(tool: ToolDefinition): boolean {
  const desc = typeof tool.description === "string" ? tool.description : ""
  if (/^\s*META\s*\//i.test(desc)) return true
  if (/^\s*Composite:/i.test(desc)) return true
  if (tool.name.startsWith("workflow_")) return true
  return false
}

/** Always listed in primitive mode so operators can still discover catalog surfaces. */
const PRIMITIVE_CATALOG_ALLOWLIST = new Set<string>([
  "agent_platform_oma_tools_catalog_get",
  "control_plane_ai_oma_tools_catalog_get",
])

/**
 * Returns a subset of `tools` when `profile === "primitive"`; otherwise returns the same array reference.
 */
export function filterOmaToolsForHttpCatalog(
  tools: ToolDefinition[],
  profile: OmaCatalogProfile,
): ToolDefinition[] {
  if (profile !== "primitive") return tools
  return tools.filter((t) => PRIMITIVE_CATALOG_ALLOWLIST.has(t.name) || !isHiddenInPrimitiveProfile(t))
}

/**
 * Runtime exposure filter: in `primitive` mode, omit META escape-hatches, composite pipelines,
 * and `workflow_*` aliases from the actual tool array given to orchestrator runs.
 *
 * Unlike the HTTP catalog filter, runtime `primitive` does not keep META catalog tools by allowlist.
 */
export function filterOmaToolsForRuntime(
  tools: ToolDefinition[],
  preset: OmaToolPreset,
): ToolDefinition[] {
  if (preset === "admin" || preset === "full") return tools
  return tools.filter((t) => !isHiddenInPrimitiveProfile(t))
}
```

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`

```ts
import { defineTool } from "@xlotyl/open-multi-agent"
import type { ToolDefinition } from "@xlotyl/open-multi-agent"
import { z } from "zod"
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../../config.js"
import {
  engineeringBuildEscalation,
  engineeringBuildTaskQueue,
  engineeringIntake,
  engineeringStructureClassify,
  engineeringValidateTaskCard,
} from "../../tools/control-plane-engineering.js"

export function createEngineeringDomainTools(cfg: PlatformConfig): ToolDefinition[] {
  return [
    defineTool({
      name: "engineering_validate_task_card_json",
      description:
        "Thin HTTP primitive: POST /api/control-plane/validate/task-card (control-plane engineering validate).",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => {
        const data = await engineeringValidateTaskCard(cfg, body)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("engineering_validate_task_card_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("engineering_validate_task_card error"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "engineering_structure_classify_json",
      description:
        "Thin HTTP primitive: POST /api/control-plane/structure/classify (structure gateway classify).",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => {
        const data = await engineeringStructureClassify(cfg, body)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("engineering_structure_classify_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("engineering_structure_classify error"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "engineering_intake_json",
      description:
        "Thin HTTP primitive: POST /api/control-plane/engineering/intake (engineering session intake).",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => {
        const data = await engineeringIntake(cfg, body)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("engineering_intake_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("engineering_intake error"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "engineering_build_task_queue_json",
      description:
        "Thin HTTP primitive: POST /api/control-plane/engineering/build-task-queue (task queue JSON).",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => {
        const data = await engineeringBuildTaskQueue(cfg, body)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("engineering_build_task_queue_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("engineering_build_task_queue error"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "engineering_build_escalation_json",
      description:
        "Thin HTTP primitive: POST /api/control-plane/engineering/build-escalation (escalation packet JSON).",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => {
        const data = await engineeringBuildEscalation(cfg, body)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("engineering_build_escalation_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("engineering_build_escalation error"),
        }
      },
    }),
  ]
}
```

```ts
export function createOpsDomainTools(legacyTools: readonly ToolDefinition[]): ToolDefinition[] {

}
```

```ts
import type { ToolDefinition } from "@xlotyl/open-multi-agent"

export function createWikiDomainTools(legacyTools: readonly ToolDefinition[]): ToolDefinition[] {
  return legacyTools.filter((tool) => tool.name.startsWith("wiki_"))
}
```

```ts
import { defineTool } from "@xlotyl/open-multi-agent"
import type { ToolDefinition } from "@xlotyl/open-multi-agent"
import { z } from "zod"
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import { createEngineeringDomainTools } from "./domains/engineering.js"
import { createOpsDomainTools } from "./domains/ops.js"
import { createWikiDomainTools } from "./domains/wiki.js"
import { composeOmaToolRegistry } from "./registry.js"
import {
  actOnContainerGui,
  closeContainerGui,
  launchContainerGui,
  listContainerGuiArtifacts,
  recordContainerGui,
  resolveContainerGui,
  screenshotContainerGui,
} from "../tools/container-gui.js"
import {
  control_planeAiQuery,
  control_planeAiQueryStream,
  control_planeAiSimulationsAnalyze,
  control_planeAiStatus,
  control_planeAiOmaToolsCatalog,
  control_planeAiTasks,
  control_planeAiToolQuery,
  control_planeAiWorkflowCancel,
  control_planeAiWorkflowStatus,
  control_planeAiWorkflowRun,
  control_planeAppsList,
  control_planeAppsRestart,
  control_planeAutomationLarrakBuild,
  control_planeAutomationLarrakDoctor,
  control_planeAutomationLarrakIngest,
  control_planeAutomationLarrakRunTestFiles,
  control_planeAutomationMartymediaCaptions,
  control_planeDevProjectCreate,
  control_planeDevProjectDelete,
  control_planeDevProjectGet,
  control_planeDevProjectsList,
  control_planeDevProjectUpdate,
  control_planeDevRunCreate,
  control_planeDevRunAppendEvent,
  control_planeDevRunComplete,
  control_planeDevRunDelete,
  control_planeDevRunGet,
  control_planeDevRunPatch,
  control_planeDevRunStatus,
  control_planeDevRunsList,
  control_planeDevTaskAnswer,
  control_planeDevTaskCancel,
  control_planeDevTaskCreate,
  control_planeDevTaskDelete,
  control_planeDevTaskDossier,
  control_planeDevTaskGet,
  control_planeDevTaskPatch,
  control_planeDevTaskPublish,
  control_planeDevTaskResume,
  control_planeDevTasksList,
  control_planeFeedbackById,
  control_planeFeedbackDelete,
  control_planeFeedbackForRun,
  control_planeFeedbackReasons,
  control_planeFeedbackSubmit,
  control_planeFeedbackSummary,
  control_planeFeedbackUpdate,
  control_planeV1FeedbackLegacyProvenanceLog,
  control_planeMcpCall,
  control_planeMcpListServers,
  control_planeMcpListServerTools,
  control_planeMcpSetServerEnabled,
  control_planeShellBridgeSessionEventsGet,
  control_planeRunningEventsGet,
  control_planeRunningGet,
  control_planeTopologyGet,
  control_planeSearchFiles,
  control_planeSearchQuery,
  control_planeSearchWeb,
  control_planeTorrentsAdd,
  control_planeTorrentsCreate,
  control_planeTorrentsDelete,
  control_planeTorrentsGet,
  control_planeTorrentsList,
  control_planeTorrentsPause,
  control_planeTorrentsResume,
  control_planeTorrentsUpdate,
  control_planeVmsCreate,
  control_planeVmsDelete,
  control_planeVmsGet,
  control_planeVmsList,
  control_planeVmsStart,
  control_planeVmsStop,
  control_planeVmsUpdate,
  control_planeV1ChatCompletions,
  getDomainData,
  mcpRegistryListServers,
  searchKnowledgeBase,
  structureGatewayListRegistry,
  structureGatewaySubmitTask,
  toolRegistryExecute,
  transcribeAudio,
} from "../tools/orchestration-gateway.js"
import { agentPlatformGetJson, agentPlatformPostJson } from "../tools/agent-platform.js"
import { callShellBridgeGatewayRpc } from "../shell-bridge/gateway-rpc.js"
import { SHELL_BRIDGE_GATEWAY_SHIMS } from "../shell-bridge/parity.js"
import {
  wikiOrchestrationGetPage,
  wikiOrchestrationListPages,
  wikiOrchestrationSearch,
  wikiOrchestrationCreatePage,
  wikiOrchestrationDeletePage,
  wikiOrchestrationUpdatePage,
  wikiProposalApprove,
  wikiProposalArchive,
  wikiProposalCreate,
  wikiProposalGet,
  wikiProposalList,
  wikiProposalPromote,
  wikiProposalReject,
  wikiProposalUpdate,
  wikiProposalValidate,
  wikiProjectsCreatePage,
  wikiProjectsDeletePage,
  wikiProjectsGetPage,
  wikiProjectsListPages,
  wikiProjectsUpdatePage,
} from "../tools/wiki-control-plane.js"

/** Orchestration Gateway-backed tools for Open Multi-Agent (no shell / filesystem builtins). */
function createLegacyOrchestrationOmaTools(cfg: PlatformConfig) {
  const isToolRegistryFailure = (payload: unknown): boolean => {
    if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object" || Array.isArray(payload)) return false
    return (payload as Record<string, unknown>).success === false
  }

  const openClawGatewayTool = async (method: string, params: Record<string, unknown>) => {
    try {
      const payload = await callShellBridgeGatewayRpc(cfg, method, params)
      return { data: JSON.stringify(payload), isError: false }
    } catch (error) {
      return {
        data: `shell_bridge_gateway_rpc error: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`,
        isError: true,
      }
    }
  }

  return [
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_agents_run_json",
      description:
        "META / escape-hatch: POST /v1/agents/run on agent-platform-service (raw JSON envelope). Prefer domain primitives (`control_plane_*`, wiki_*, `container_gui.*`, …) unless you need the full orchestrator ingress.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        body: z.record(z.unknown()).describe("Raw JSON body for /v1/agents/run"),
      }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => ({
        data: await agentPlatformPostJson(cfg, "/v1/agents/run", body, 180_000),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_teams_run_json",
      description:
        "META / escape-hatch: POST /v1/teams/run on agent-platform-service (raw JSON). Prefer task-scoped primitives unless you intentionally need the team envelope.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        body: z.record(z.unknown()).describe("Raw JSON body for /v1/teams/run"),
      }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => ({
        data: await agentPlatformPostJson(cfg, "/v1/teams/run", body, 300_000),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_tasks_run_json",
      description:
        "META / escape-hatch: POST /v1/tasks/run on agent-platform-service (raw JSON). Prefer narrower HTTP tools unless you are driving the full task graph.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        body: z.record(z.unknown()).describe("Raw JSON body for /v1/tasks/run"),
      }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => ({
        data: await agentPlatformPostJson(cfg, "/v1/tasks/run", body, 600_000),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_workflows_execute_json",
      description:
        "META / escape-hatch: POST /v1/workflows/execute on agent-platform-service (raw LangGraph ingress). Prefer higher-level primitives when the workflow does not require arbitrary `input_data`.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        body: z.record(z.unknown()).describe("Raw JSON body for /v1/workflows/execute"),
      }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => ({
        data: await agentPlatformPostJson(cfg, "/v1/workflows/execute", body, 600_000),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_workflow_run_create",
      description:
        "Primitive: POST /v1/workflows/runs on agent-platform-service. Starts a workflow asynchronously and returns a poll/cancel handle.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        body: z.record(z.unknown()).describe("Raw JSON body for /v1/workflows/runs"),
      }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => ({
        data: await agentPlatformPostJson(cfg, "/v1/workflows/runs", body, 60_000),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_workflow_status",
      description:
        "Primitive: GET /v1/workflows/{workflow_id}/status on agent-platform-service. Poll workflow status by id.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        workflow_id: z.string().min(1),
      }),
      execute: async ({ workflow_id }) => ({
        data: await agentPlatformGetJson(cfg, `/v1/workflows/${encodeURIComponent(workflow_id)}/status`, 30_000),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_workflow_cancel",
      description:
        "Primitive: POST /v1/workflows/{workflow_id}/cancel on agent-platform-service. Requests cancellation for a workflow run.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        workflow_id: z.string().min(1),
      }),
      execute: async ({ workflow_id }) => ({
        data: await agentPlatformPostJson(
          cfg,
          `/v1/workflows/${encodeURIComponent(workflow_id)}/cancel`,
          {},
          30_000,
        ),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_health_get",
      description:
        "Primitive: GET /health on agent-platform-service (process liveness + LLM backend snapshot).",
      inputSchema: z.object({}),
      execute: async () => ({ data: await agentPlatformGetJson(cfg, "/health", 15_000) }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_service_workflow_status",
      description:
        "Primitive: GET /workflow/status on agent-platform-service (service-level wiring snapshot; not per-run `/v1/workflows/:id/status`).",
      inputSchema: z.object({}),
      execute: async () => ({ data: await agentPlatformGetJson(cfg, "/workflow/status", 30_000) }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_llm_info_get",
      description: "Primitive: GET /llm/info on agent-platform-service.",
      inputSchema: z.object({}),
      execute: async () => ({ data: await agentPlatformGetJson(cfg, "/llm/info", 15_000) }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_workflows_list",
      description: "Primitive: GET /v1/workflows on agent-platform-service.",
      inputSchema: z.object({}),
      execute: async () => ({ data: await agentPlatformGetJson(cfg, "/v1/workflows", 30_000) }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_workflow_schema_get",
      description: "Primitive: GET /v1/workflows/{name}/schema on agent-platform-service.",
      inputSchema: z.object({ name: z.string().min(1) }),
      execute: async ({ name }) => ({
        data: await agentPlatformGetJson(
          cfg,
          `/v1/workflows/${encodeURIComponent(name)}/schema`,
          30_000,
        ),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_oma_tools_catalog_get",
      description:
        "Primitive: GET /v1/oma/tools on agent-platform-service (same catalog the HTTP endpoint advertises).",
      inputSchema: z.object({}),
      execute: async () => ({ data: await agentPlatformGetJson(cfg, "/v1/oma/tools", 30_000) }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_devplane_run_create",
      description: "Primitive: POST /v1/devplane/runs on agent-platform-service.",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => ({
        data: await agentPlatformPostJson(cfg, "/v1/devplane/runs", body, 600_000),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_devplane_run_get",
      description: "Primitive: GET /v1/devplane/runs/{run_id} on agent-platform-service.",
      inputSchema: z.object({ run_id: z.string().min(1) }),
      execute: async ({ run_id }) => ({
        data: await agentPlatformGetJson(
          cfg,
          `/v1/devplane/runs/${encodeURIComponent(run_id)}`,
          60_000,
        ),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "agent_platform_devplane_run_cancel",
      description: "Primitive: POST /v1/devplane/runs/{run_id}/cancel on agent-platform-service.",
      inputSchema: z.object({ run_id: z.string().min(1) }),
      execute: async ({ run_id }) => ({
        data: await agentPlatformPostJson(
          cfg,
          `/v1/devplane/runs/${encodeURIComponent(run_id)}/cancel`,
          {},
          60_000,
        ),
      }),
    }),
    ...SHELL_BRIDGE_GATEWAY_SHIMS.map((shim) =>
      defineTool({
        name: shim.toolName,
        description: shim.description,
        inputSchema: shim.inputSchema,
        execute: async (params) =>
          openClawGatewayTool(shim.rpcMethod, (params ?? {}) as Record<string, unknown>),
      }),
    ),
    defineTool({
      name: "search_knowledge_base",
      description:
        "Search the embedding RAG index (not the orchestration wiki). For routing modes/pools/modules and compiled response-control knowledge, prefer wiki_orchestration_search + wiki_orchestration_get_page.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        query: z.string(),
        domain_weights: z.record(z.number()).optional(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ query, domain_weights }) => ({
        data: await searchKnowledgeBase(cfg, query, domain_weights ?? {}),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "transcribe_audio",
      description:
        "Primitive: POST ASR_URL/transcribe with base64 audio_data. Use when you have audio bytes; orchestration_chat gather path uses input_data.asr_audio_base64 instead.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        audio_data: z.string().min(1).describe("Base64-encoded audio payload"),
      }),
      execute: async ({ audio_data }) => {
        const data = await transcribeAudio(cfg, audio_data)
        return {
          data,
          isError: data.startsWith("Error transcribing audio:"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_orchestration_list_pages",
      description:
        "Primitive: GET /api/control-plane/wiki/orchestration/pages. Lists relative orchestration wiki paths.",
      inputSchema: z.object({}),
      execute: async () => {
        const data = await wikiOrchestrationListPages(cfg)
        return {
          data,
          isError: data.startsWith("wiki_control_plane_not_configured"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_orchestration_get_page",
      description:
        "Primitive: GET /api/control-plane/wiki/orchestration/page?path=... Reads one orchestration wiki page.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        path: z.string().min(1),
      }),
      execute: async ({ path }) => ({
        data: await wikiOrchestrationGetPage(cfg, path),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_orchestration_search",
      description:
        "Primitive: GET /api/control-plane/wiki/orchestration/search?q=... Full-text orchestration wiki search.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        query: z.string().min(1),
      }),
      execute: async ({ query }) => ({
        data: await wikiOrchestrationSearch(cfg, query),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_projects_list_pages",
      description: "Primitive: GET /api/control-plane/wiki/projects/pages.",
      inputSchema: z.object({}),
      execute: async () => ({
        data: await wikiProjectsListPages(cfg),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_projects_get_page",
      description: "Primitive: GET /api/control-plane/wiki/projects/page?path=...",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        path: z.string().min(1),
      }),
      execute: async ({ path }) => ({
        data: await wikiProjectsGetPage(cfg, path),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_orchestration_create_page",
      description:
        "Primitive: POST /api/control-plane/wiki/orchestration/page (canonical page write).",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => ({
        data: await wikiOrchestrationCreatePage(cfg, body),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_orchestration_update_page",
      description:
        "Primitive: PUT /api/control-plane/wiki/orchestration/page (canonical page write).",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => ({
        data: await wikiOrchestrationUpdatePage(cfg, body),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_orchestration_delete_page",
      description:
        "Primitive: DELETE /api/control-plane/wiki/orchestration/page?path=... (canonical page write).",
      inputSchema: z.object({ path: z.string().min(1) }),
      execute: async ({ path }) => ({
        data: await wikiOrchestrationDeletePage(cfg, path),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_projects_create_page",
      description:
        "Primitive: POST /api/control-plane/wiki/projects/page (canonical projects page write).",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => ({
        data: await wikiProjectsCreatePage(cfg, body),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_projects_update_page",
      description:
        "Primitive: PUT /api/control-plane/wiki/projects/page (canonical projects page write).",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => ({
        data: await wikiProjectsUpdatePage(cfg, body),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_projects_delete_page",
      description:
        "Primitive: DELETE /api/control-plane/wiki/projects/page?path=... (canonical projects page write).",
      inputSchema: z.object({ path: z.string().min(1) }),
      execute: async ({ path }) => ({
        data: await wikiProjectsDeletePage(cfg, path),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "get_domain_data",
      description:
        "Primitive: MCP HTTP domain read — same backing as orchestration_chat gather `mcp_*` tools; calls configured MCP HTTP surface with (domain, query).",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        domain: z.string(),
        query: z.string(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ domain, query }) => ({
        data: await getDomainData(cfg, domain, query),
      }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "structure_list_kernels",
      description:
        "List kernels from the structure gateway registry (GET /registry). Requires STRUCTURE_GATEWAY_URL.",
      inputSchema: z.object({}),
      execute: async () => {
        const data = await structureGatewayListRegistry(cfg)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("structure_gateway_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("structure_gateway_registry_error"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "structure_submit_task",
      description:
        "Workflow-tier: submit a user task to the structure gateway (POST /task); may involve long-running orchestration. Requires STRUCTURE_GATEWAY_URL.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        user_input: z.string().min(1),
        domain_hint: z.string().optional(),
        partition: z.enum(["train", "dev", "test"]).optional(),
        context: z.record(z.unknown()).optional(),
      }),
      execute: async (input) => {
        const data = await structureGatewaySubmitTask(cfg, input)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("structure_gateway_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("structure_gateway_task_error"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "mcp_registry_list_servers",
      description:
        "List MCP servers: when ORCHESTRATOR_API_URL is set, uses GET /api/ai/mcp/servers (same as static UI; includes per-server enabled flags). Otherwise GET /mcp/servers on MCP_REGISTRY_BASE_URL (raw registry).",
      inputSchema: z.object({}),
      execute: async () => {
        const data = cfg.orchestratorApiUrl?.trim()
          ? await control_planeMcpListServers(cfg)
          : await mcpRegistryListServers(cfg)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("control_plane_mcp_list_servers_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("control_plane_mcp_list_servers error") ||
            data.startsWith("mcp_registry_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("mcp_registry_error"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "control_plane_mcp_call",
      description:
        "META / escape-hatch: invoke one MCP tool via api-service POST /api/ai/mcp/call (same JSON as the static AI UI). Prefer task-specific `control_plane_*` primitives when they exist. Requires ORCHESTRATOR_API_URL.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        server: z.string().min(1),
        tool: z.string().min(1),
        arguments: z.record(z.unknown()).optional(),
      }),
      execute: async (input) => {
        const data = await control_planeMcpCall(cfg, input)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("control_plane_mcp_call_not_configured") || data.startsWith("control_plane_mcp_call error"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "control_plane_mcp_set_server_enabled",
      description:
        "Primitive: POST /api/ai/mcp/servers/{name}/enable (same as static AI UI). Toggles api-service Redis disabled set for an MCP server. Requires ORCHESTRATOR_API_URL.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        server: z.string().min(1),
        enabled: z.boolean(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ server, enabled }) => {
        const data = await control_planeMcpSetServerEnabled(cfg, { server, enabled })
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("control_plane_mcp_set_server_enabled_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("control_plane_mcp_set_server_enabled error"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "control_plane_mcp_list_server_tools",
      description:
        "Primitive: GET /api/ai/mcp/servers/{name}/tools (proxies router). Requires ORCHESTRATOR_API_URL.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        server: z.string().min(1),
      }),
      execute: async ({ server }) => {
        const data = await control_planeMcpListServerTools(cfg, server)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("control_plane_mcp_list_server_tools_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("control_plane_mcp_list_server_tools error"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "tool_registry_execute",
      description:
        "META / escape-hatch: POST one named tool to the Orchestration Gateway tool registry execute endpoint. Prefer first-class OMA primitives; aliases martymedia_whisper_srt / larrak_audio_* forward here for compatibility.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        tool_name: z.string().min(1),
        parameters: z.record(z.unknown()),
      }),
      execute: async ({ tool_name, parameters }) => {
        const data = await toolRegistryExecute(cfg, tool_name, parameters)
        let payload: unknown = {}
        try {
          payload = JSON.parse(data) as unknown
        } catch {
          /* string error path */
        }
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("tool-registry error") || isToolRegistryFailure(payload),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "wiki_proposal_validate",
      description:
        "Primitive: POST /api/control-plane/wiki/proposals/validate (schema check). Use WIKI_CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY when wiki auth is enabled.",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => {
        const data = await wikiProposalValidate(cfg, body)
        return {
          data,
          isError:

      name: "control_plane_ai_tool_query_json",
      description:
        "Composite: POST /api/ai/tool-query (Python tool-model lane; not a single-field CRUD primitive). Requires ORCHESTRATOR_API_URL.",
      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => {
        const data = await control_planeAiToolQuery(cfg, body)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("control_plane_ai_tool_query_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("control_plane_ai_tool_query error"),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "control_plane_ai_query_stream_json",

      inputSchema: z.object({ body: z.record(z.unknown()) }),
      execute: async ({ body }) => {
        const data = await control_planeAiQueryStream(cfg, body)
        return {
          data,
          isError:
            data.startsWith("control_plane_ai_query_stream_not_configured") ||
            data.startsWith("control_plane_ai_query_stream error"),

    defineTool({
      name: "container_gui.launch",
      description:
        "Workflow-tier (session/GUI): resolve and launch a domain-knowledge-package container GUI session through noVNC for ShellBridge browser control.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        target_ref: z.string(),
        allow_unverified: z.boolean().optional(),
        novnc_port: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
        artifact_output_dir: z.string().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async (input) => launchContainerGui(cfg, input),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "container_gui.resolve",
      description:
        "Workflow-tier (session/GUI): resolve the default domain-knowledge-package container GUI session for a module or environment ref.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        target_ref: z.string(),
        allow_unverified: z.boolean().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async (input) => resolveContainerGui(cfg, input),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "container_gui.screenshot",
      description:
        "Workflow-tier (session/GUI): open an optional noVNC URL in ShellBridge browser control and capture a screenshot artifact.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        url: z.string().optional(),
        output: z.string().optional(),
        target_id: z.string().optional(),
        trace_path: z.string().optional(),
        dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async (input) => screenshotContainerGui(cfg, input),
    }),
    ...(cfg.enableContainerGuiActTool
      ? [
          defineTool({
            name: "container_gui.act",
            description:
              "LEGACY / gated: multi-action container GUI switch. Disabled unless `ENABLE_CONTAINER_GUI_ACT=true`. Prefer `container_gui.open` / `click` / `type` / `press_key` / `scroll` / `snapshot`.",
            inputSchema: z.object({
              action: z.enum(["open", "screenshot", "snapshot", "click", "type", "press", "wait"]),
              payload: z.record(z.unknown()).optional(),
              trace_path: z.string().optional(),
              dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
            }),
            execute: async (input) => actOnContainerGui(cfg, input),
          }),
        ]
      : []),
    defineTool({
      name: "container_gui.open",
      description: "Primitive: open a URL in the container GUI session.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        url: z.string().min(1),
        trace_path: z.string().optional(),
        dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ url, trace_path, dry_run }) =>
        actOnContainerGui(cfg, { action: "open", payload: { url }, trace_path, dry_run }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "container_gui.click",
      description: "Primitive: click at coordinates (x,y) in the container GUI session.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        x: z.number(),
        y: z.number(),
        target_id: z.string().optional(),
        trace_path: z.string().optional(),
        dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ x, y, target_id, trace_path, dry_run }) =>
        actOnContainerGui(cfg, {
          action: "click",
          payload: { x, y, ...(target_id ? { target_id } : {}) },
          trace_path,
          dry_run,
        }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "container_gui.type",
      description: "Primitive: type text into the focused element in the container GUI session.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        text: z.string(),
        target_id: z.string().optional(),
        trace_path: z.string().optional(),
        dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ text, target_id, trace_path, dry_run }) =>
        actOnContainerGui(cfg, {
          action: "type",
          payload: { text, ...(target_id ? { target_id } : {}) },
          trace_path,
          dry_run,
        }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "container_gui.press_key",
      description: "Primitive: press a key in the container GUI session.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        key: z.string().min(1),
        target_id: z.string().optional(),
        trace_path: z.string().optional(),
        dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ key, target_id, trace_path, dry_run }) =>
        actOnContainerGui(cfg, {
          action: "press",
          payload: { key, ...(target_id ? { target_id } : {}) },
          trace_path,
          dry_run,
        }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "container_gui.scroll",
      description: "Primitive: scroll by delta (dx, dy) in the container GUI session.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        dx: z.number().optional(),
        dy: z.number().optional(),
        target_id: z.string().optional(),
        trace_path: z.string().optional(),
        dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ dx, dy, target_id, trace_path, dry_run }) =>
        actOnContainerGui(cfg, {
          action: "scroll",
          payload: {
            ...(dx !== undefined ? { dx } : {}),
            ...(dy !== undefined ? { dy } : {}),
            ...(target_id ? { target_id } : {}),
          },
          trace_path,
          dry_run,
        }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "container_gui.snapshot",
      description: "Primitive: capture an accessibility snapshot from the container GUI session.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        output: z.string().optional(),
        target_id: z.string().optional(),
        trace_path: z.string().optional(),
        dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ output, target_id, trace_path, dry_run }) =>
        actOnContainerGui(cfg, {
          action: "snapshot",
          payload: { ...(output ? { output } : {}), ...(target_id ? { target_id } : {}) },
          trace_path,
          dry_run,
        }),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "container_gui.record",
      description:
        "Workflow-tier (session/GUI): capture screenshot and DOM/accessibility snapshot evidence for a container GUI session.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        url: z.string().optional(),
        screenshot_output: z.string().optional(),
        snapshot_output: z.string().optional(),
        trace_path: z.string().optional(),
        dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async (input) => recordContainerGui(cfg, input),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "container_gui.artifacts",

        "Workflow-tier (session/GUI): list generated artifact files for a domain-knowledge-package GUI session.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        gui_session_ref: z.string(),

      execute: async (input) => listContainerGuiArtifacts(cfg, input),

      inputSchema: z.object({

        output: z.string().optional(),
        target_id: z.string().optional(),
        trace_path: z.string().optional(),
        dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async (input) => screenshotContainerGui(cfg, input),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "workflow_container_gui_record",
      description: "Workflow-namespace alias for `container_gui.record` (identical behavior).",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        url: z.string().optional(),
        screenshot_output: z.string().optional(),
        snapshot_output: z.string().optional(),
        trace_path: z.string().optional(),
        dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async (input) => recordContainerGui(cfg, input),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "workflow_container_gui_artifacts",
      description: "Workflow-namespace alias for `container_gui.artifacts` (identical behavior).",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        gui_session_ref: z.string(),
      }),
      execute: async (input) => listContainerGuiArtifacts(cfg, input),
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "workflow_container_gui_close",
      description: "Workflow-namespace alias for `container_gui.close` (identical behavior).",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        container: z.string(),
      }),
      execute: async (input) => closeContainerGui(cfg, input),
    }),
    ...(cfg.enableContainerGuiActTool
      ? [
          defineTool({
            name: "workflow_container_gui_act",
            description:
              "Workflow-namespace alias for gated `container_gui.act` (identical behavior; requires ENABLE_CONTAINER_GUI_ACT).",
            inputSchema: z.object({
              action: z.enum(["open", "screenshot", "snapshot", "click", "type", "press", "wait"]),
              payload: z.record(z.unknown()).optional(),
              trace_path: z.string().optional(),
              dry_run: z.boolean().optional(),
            }),
            execute: async (input) => actOnContainerGui(cfg, input),
          }),
        ]
      : []),
    defineTool({
      name: "martymedia_whisper_srt",
      description:
        "Alias of tool_registry_execute: MartyMedia whisper → SRT (backward-compatible name).",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        input: z.string(),
        output_dir: z.string(),
        language: z.enum(["en", "es"]),
        model: z.string().optional(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ input, output_dir, language, model }) => {
        const data = await toolRegistryExecute(cfg, "martymedia_whisper_srt", {
          input,
          output_dir,
          language,
          model: model ?? "",
        })
        let payload: unknown = {}
        try {
          payload = JSON.parse(data) as unknown
        } catch {
          /* leave empty */
        }
        return {
          data,
          isError: data.startsWith("tool-registry error") || isToolRegistryFailure(payload),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "larrak_audio_ingest",
      description: "Alias of tool_registry_execute: larrak-audio ingest.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        source: z.string(),
        type: z.string().optional(),
        marker_extra_args: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ source, type, marker_extra_args }) => {
        const data = await toolRegistryExecute(cfg, "larrak_audio_ingest", {
          source,
          type: type ?? "",
          marker_extra_args: (marker_extra_args ?? []).join("||"),
        })
        let payload: unknown = {}
        try {
          payload = JSON.parse(data) as unknown
        } catch {
          /* leave empty */
        }
        return {
          data,
          isError: data.startsWith("tool-registry error") || isToolRegistryFailure(payload),
        }
      },
    }),
    defineTool({
      name: "larrak_audio_build",
      description: "Alias of tool_registry_execute: larrak-audio build.",
      inputSchema: z.object({
        source_id: z.string(),
        enhance: z.enum(["on", "off"]).optional(),
      }),
      execute: async ({ source_id, enhance }) => {
        const data = await toolRegistryExecute(cfg, "larrak_audio_build", {
          source_id,
          enhance: enhance ?? "on",
        })
        let payload: unknown = {}
        try {
          payload = JSON.parse(data) as unknown
        } catch {
          /* leave empty */
        }
        return {
          data,
          isError: data.startsWith("tool-registry error") || isToolRegistryFailure(payload),
        }
      },
    }),
  ] as const
}

/** Orchestration Gateway-backed tools for Open Multi-Agent (registry-composed multi-domain catalog). */
export function createOrchestrationOmaTools(cfg: PlatformConfig): readonly ToolDefinition[] {
  const legacy = createLegacyOrchestrationOmaTools(cfg)
  return composeOmaToolRegistry([
    { id: "ops", tools: createOpsDomainTools(legacy) },
    { id: "wiki", tools: createWikiDomainTools(legacy) },
    { id: "engineering", tools: createEngineeringDomainTools(cfg) },
  ])
}

/** All Orchestration Gateway OMA tool definitions for a config (e.g. orchestration_chat tool-loop parity). */
export function getOrchestrationOmaToolsArray(cfg: PlatformConfig): ToolDefinition[] {
  return [...createOrchestrationOmaTools(cfg)] as ToolDefinition[]
}

/**
 * Compact catalog for system context: tool name + truncated description per line.
 *
 * Parameters
 * ----------
 * tools
 *     OMA tool definitions from getOrchestrationOmaToolsArray.
 * maxTools
 *     Cap lines to limit token use.
 * maxDescChars
 *     Per-tool description length cap.
 *
 * Returns
 * -------
 * string
 *     Markdown-style bullet list for injection into prompts.
 */
export function formatOmaToolCatalogForContext(
  tools: readonly ToolDefinition[],
  maxTools = 48,
  maxDescChars = 160,
): string {
  const slice = tools.slice(0, maxTools)
  return slice
    .map((t) => {
      const desc = String((t as { description?: string }).description ?? "")
        .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
        .trim()
        .slice(0, maxDescChars)
      return `- ${t.name}: ${desc}`
    })
    .join("\n")
}
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/oma/registry.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 917 bytes

```ts
import type { ToolDefinition } from "@xlotyl/open-multi-agent"
import type { OmaDomainId, OmaDomainTools } from "./types.js"

export const ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_DOMAIN_ORDER: readonly OmaDomainId[] = [
  "ops",
  "wiki",
  "engineering",
  "content_creation",
  "money_markets",
  "business",
] as const

export function composeOmaToolRegistry(
  domains: readonly OmaDomainTools[],
  domainOrder: readonly OmaDomainId[] = ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_DOMAIN_ORDER,
): ToolDefinition[] {
  const order = new Map<OmaDomainId, number>(domainOrder.map((id, idx) => [id, idx]))
  const sorted = [...domains].sort((a, b) => (order.get(a.id) ?? 999) - (order.get(b.id) ?? 999))
  const seen = new Set<string>()
  const out: ToolDefinition[] = []
  for (const domain of sorted) {
    for (const tool of domain.tools) {
      if (seen.has(tool.name)) continue
      seen.add(tool.name)
      out.push(tool)
    }
  }
  return out
}
```

```ts
import { readdir, readFile } from "node:fs/promises"
import path from "node:path"
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest"
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import { LLMManager } from "../llm/manager.js"
import { OrchestrationEngine } from "./engine.js"

function baseConfig(): PlatformConfig {
  return {
    ragUrl: "http://rag",
    asrUrl: "http://asr",
    mcpUrl: "http://mcp",
    toolRegistryUrl: "http://tools",
    llmRunnerUrl: "http://llm:8000",
    llmRunnerApiKey: undefined,
    llmBackend: "mock",
    ollamaModel: "ollama-model",
    vllmModel: "vllm-model",
    huggingfaceModel: "hf-model",
    huggingfaceBaseUrl: "https://router.huggingface.co/v1",
    huggingfaceApiKey: undefined,
    apiBrainEnabled: false,
    apiBrainMaxEscalationsPerTask: 1,
    apiBrainProvider: "openai",
    apiBrainModel: "",
    orchestrationDefaultModel: "default-model",
    orchestrationDefaultProvider: "anthropic",
    orchestrationDefaultBaseUrl: undefined,
    orchestrationDefaultApiKey: undefined,
    orchestrationMaxTokenBudget: 1234,
    orchestratorApiUrl: "",
    modelRuntimeBaseUrl: "",
    structureGatewayUrl: "",
    mcpRegistryBaseUrl: "",
    clawCodeBinary: "claw",
    clawCodeModel: undefined,
    clawCodeTrustedRoots: [],
    clawCodePollIntervalMs: 100,
    clawCodeTimeoutMs: 1000,
    clawCodeMaxConcurrentLanes: 1,
    agentPlatformBaseUrl: "http://agent-platform",
    enableContainerGuiActTool: false,
    omaCatalogProfile: "full",
    omaToolPreset: "primitive",
  }
}

async function collectFiles(root: string): Promise<string[]> {
  const entries = await readdir(root, { withFileTypes: true })
  const files = await Promise.all(
    entries.map(async (entry) => {
      const fullPath = path.join(root, entry.name)
      if (entry.isDirectory()) {
        return collectFiles(fullPath)
      }
      return fullPath
    }),
  )
  return files.flat()
}

describe("orchestration boundaries", () => {
  it("donor package does not import Claw internals", async () => {
    const donorSrc = path.resolve(
      process.cwd(),
      "../open-multi-agent/src",
    )
    const files = (await collectFiles(donorSrc)).filter((file) => file.endsWith(".ts"))
    for (const file of files) {
      const source = await readFile(file, "utf8")
      const importSpecifiers = [
        ...source.matchAll(/from\s+["']([^"']+)["']/g),
        ...source.matchAll(/import\(\s*["']([^"']+)["']\s*\)/g),
      ].map((match) => match[1] ?? "")
      for (const specifier of importSpecifiers) {
        expect(specifier, `${file} unexpectedly imports ${specifier}`).not.toMatch(/claw/i)
      }
    }
  })

  it("the Claw adapter remains translation-only and does not own orchestration policy", async () => {
    const adapterPath = path.resolve(process.cwd(), "src/orchestration/claw-code-executor.ts")
    const source = await readFile(adapterPath, "utf8")
    expect(source).not.toMatch(/resolveExecutorRuntime/)
    expect(source).not.toMatch(/resolveMergedOmaRoute/)
    expect(source).not.toMatch(/OpenMultiAgent/)
    expect(source).not.toMatch(/runTeam\(/)
    expect(source).not.toMatch(/runTasks\(/)
    expect(source).not.toMatch(/selectedExecutor/)
  })

  it("coding_model requires the Claw boundary and never falls back to donor task execution", async () => {
    const cfg = baseConfig()
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, new LLMManager(cfg))
    await expect(
      engine.runGovernedEngineering({
        selectedExecutor: "coding_model",
        title: "Implement change",
        prompt: "Implement the requested change.",
        systemPrompt: "You are the governed coding executor.",
      }),
    ).rejects.toThrow("workspaceRoot")
    await expect(
      engine.runGovernedEngineering({
        selectedExecutor: "coding_model",
        title: "Implement change",
        prompt: "Implement the requested change.",
        systemPrompt: "You are the governed coding executor.",
        workspaceRoot: "/tmp/governed-workspace",
      }),
    ).rejects.toThrow("translated Claw execution input")
  })
})
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/orchestration/claw-code-executor.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 8990 bytes

```ts
import { access, mkdir, readFile, writeFile } from "node:fs/promises"
import path from "node:path"
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import { ClawMcpClient, type McpToolCallResult } from "./claw-mcp.js"

export interface OrchestrationArtifact {
  name: string
  path: string
  kind: string
  description?: string
}

export interface ClawCodeExecutionInput {
  workspaceRoot: string
  objective: string
  scope: string
  repo: string
  branchPolicy: string
  acceptanceTests: string[]
  commitPolicy: string
  reportingContract: string
  escalationPolicy: string
  prompt: string
  agentName?: string
  model?: string
  abortSignal?: AbortSignal
}

export interface ClawCodeExecutionResult {
  output: string
  artifacts: OrchestrationArtifact[]
}

interface WorkerStateSnapshot {
  worker_id?: string
  status?: string
  is_ready?: boolean
  trust_gate_cleared?: boolean
  seconds_since_update?: number
}

interface AgentManifest {
  agentId?: string
  status?: string
  outputFile?: string
  manifestFile?: string
  error?: string
}

function sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms))
}

function throwIfAborted(signal: AbortSignal | undefined): void {
  if (signal?.aborted) {
    throw new DOMException("Claw Code execution cancelled.", "AbortError")
  }
}

function extractToolPayload<T>(result: McpToolCallResult): T {
  if (result.structuredContent !== undefined) {
    return result.structuredContent as T
  }
  const text = (result.content ?? [])
    .map((part) => (typeof part.text === "string" ? part.text : ""))
    .join("\n")
    .trim()
  if (!text) {
    return {} as T
  }
  try {
    return JSON.parse(text) as T
  } catch {
    return text as T
  }
}

function translatedTaskCard(input: ClawCodeExecutionInput): Record<string, unknown> {
  return {
    objective: input.objective,
    scope: input.scope,
    repo: input.repo,
    branch_policy: input.branchPolicy,
    acceptance_tests: input.acceptanceTests,
    commit_policy: input.commitPolicy,
    reporting_contract: input.reportingContract,
    escalation_policy: input.escalationPolicy,
  }
}

export class ClawCodeExecutor {
  constructor(private readonly cfg: PlatformConfig) {}

  async execute(input: ClawCodeExecutionInput): Promise<ClawCodeExecutionResult> {
    throwIfAborted(input.abortSignal)
    const clawDir = path.join(input.workspaceRoot, ".control_plane", "claw")
    const agentStoreDir = path.join(clawDir, "agents")
    const translatedPacketPath = path.join(clawDir, "translated-task-card.json")
    const promptPath = path.join(clawDir, "prompt.md")
    const workerStatePath = path.join(input.workspaceRoot, ".claw", "worker-state.json")

    await mkdir(agentStoreDir, { recursive: true })
    await writeFile(
      translatedPacketPath,
      JSON.stringify(translatedTaskCard(input), null, 2),
      "utf8",
    )
    await writeFile(promptPath, input.prompt, "utf8")

    const env = {
      ...process.env,
      CLAWD_AGENT_STORE: agentStoreDir,
    }

    const client = await ClawMcpClient.start({
      binary: this.cfg.clawCodeBinary,
      cwd: input.workspaceRoot,
      env,
      timeoutMs: this.cfg.clawCodeTimeoutMs,
    })

    try {
      await client.listTools()
      throwIfAborted(input.abortSignal)
      await client.callTool("RunTaskCard", translatedTaskCard(input))
      throwIfAborted(input.abortSignal)

      await this.bootstrapWorker(client, input.workspaceRoot, workerStatePath, input.abortSignal)
      throwIfAborted(input.abortSignal)

      const manifest = extractToolPayload<AgentManifest>(
        await client.callTool("Agent", {
          description: input.objective,
          prompt: input.prompt,
          name: input.agentName ?? "devplane-coding-kernel",
          model: input.model ?? this.cfg.clawCodeModel,
        }),
      )
      throwIfAborted(input.abortSignal)

      if (!manifest.manifestFile || !manifest.outputFile) {
        throw new Error("Claw Agent did not return manifest/output file paths.")
      }

      const completedManifest = await this.waitForAgentManifest(manifest.manifestFile, input.abortSignal)
      const output = await readFile(manifest.outputFile, "utf8")
      if (completedManifest.status !== "completed") {
        throw new Error(
          `Claw agent failed with status ${completedManifest.status ?? "unknown"}: ${
            completedManifest.error ?? "no error message"
          }`,
        )
      }

      const artifacts: OrchestrationArtifact[] = [
        {
          name: "claw-translated-task-card",
          path: translatedPacketPath,
          kind: "translated_task_card",
          description: "Translated DevPlane packet routed into Claw Code.",
        },
        {
          name: "claw-prompt",
          path: promptPath,
          kind: "run_summary",
          description: "Rendered prompt delivered to the external Claw Code kernel.",
        },
        {
          name: "claw-worker-state",
          path: workerStatePath,
          kind: "worker_state",
          description: "Worker lane state emitted by Claw Code during bootstrap.",
        },
        {
          name: "claw-agent-manifest",
          path: manifest.manifestFile,
          kind: "agent_manifest",
          description: "Background agent manifest emitted by Claw Code.",
        },
        {
          name: "claw-agent-output",
          path: manifest.outputFile,
          kind: "agent_output",
          description: "Background agent terminal/output log emitted by Claw Code.",
        },
      ]

      return {
        output,
        artifacts,
      }
    } finally {
      await client.close()
    }
  }

  private async bootstrapWorker(
    client: ClawMcpClient,
    workspaceRoot: string,
    workerStatePath: string,
    abortSignal?: AbortSignal,
  ): Promise<void> {
    const trustedRoots =
      this.cfg.clawCodeTrustedRoots.length > 0
        ? this.cfg.clawCodeTrustedRoots
        : [workspaceRoot]

    const created = extractToolPayload<{ worker_id?: string; trust_auto_resolve?: boolean }>(
      await client.callTool("WorkerCreate", {
        cwd: workspaceRoot,
        trusted_roots: trustedRoots,
        auto_recover_prompt_misdelivery: true,
      }),
    )
    const workerId = created.worker_id
    if (!workerId) {
      throw new Error("Claw WorkerCreate did not return a worker_id.")
    }

    if (created.trust_auto_resolve === false) {
      await client.callTool("WorkerObserve", {
        worker_id: workerId,
        screen_text: "Do you trust the files in this folder?",
      })
      const trustState = await this.waitForWorkerState(
        workerStatePath,
        (state) => state.status === "trust_required" || state.trust_gate_cleared === true,
        abortSignal,
      )
      if (trustState.status === "trust_required") {
        await client.callTool("WorkerResolveTrust", { worker_id: workerId })
      }
    }

    await client.callTool("WorkerObserve", {
      worker_id: workerId,
      screen_text: "Ready for input\n>",
    })

    try {
      await this.waitForWorkerState(workerStatePath, (state) => state.is_ready === true, abortSignal)
    } catch {
      throwIfAborted(abortSignal)
      await client.callTool("WorkerRestart", { worker_id: workerId })
      await client.callTool("WorkerObserve", {
        worker_id: workerId,
        screen_text: "Ready for input\n>",
      })
      await this.waitForWorkerState(workerStatePath, (state) => state.is_ready === true, abortSignal)
    }
  }

  private async waitForWorkerState(
    workerStatePath: string,
    predicate: (state: WorkerStateSnapshot) => boolean,
    abortSignal?: AbortSignal,
  ): Promise<WorkerStateSnapshot> {
    const deadline = Date.now() + this.cfg.clawCodeTimeoutMs
    while (Date.now() < deadline) {
      throwIfAborted(abortSignal)
      const state = await this.readJsonIfPresent<WorkerStateSnapshot>(workerStatePath)
      if (state && predicate(state)) {
        return state
      }
      await sleep(this.cfg.clawCodePollIntervalMs)
    }
    throw new Error("Timed out waiting for Claw worker state transition.")
  }

  private async waitForAgentManifest(
    manifestPath: string,
    abortSignal?: AbortSignal,
  ): Promise<AgentManifest> {
    const deadline = Date.now() + this.cfg.clawCodeTimeoutMs
    while (Date.now() < deadline) {
      throwIfAborted(abortSignal)
      const manifest = await this.readJsonIfPresent<AgentManifest>(manifestPath)
      if (manifest && ["completed", "failed"].includes(String(manifest.status ?? ""))) {
        return manifest
      }
      await sleep(this.cfg.clawCodePollIntervalMs)
    }
    throw new Error("Timed out waiting for Claw agent manifest completion.")
  }

  private async readJsonIfPresent<T>(filePath: string): Promise<T | undefined> {
    try {
      await access(filePath)
      const raw = await readFile(filePath, "utf8")
      return JSON.parse(raw) as T
    } catch {
      return undefined
    }
  }
}
```
