```ts
  it("POST /v1/workflows/execute engineering_workflow passes cleanroom to intake and echoes in result", async () => {
    process.env.LLM_BACKEND = "mock"
    process.env.ORCHESTRATOR_API_URL = "http://127.0.0.1:7777"
    vi.stubGlobal(
      "fetch",
      vi.fn(async (url: string | URL, init?: RequestInit) => {
        const u = typeof url === "string" ? url : url.toString()
        if (u.includes("/api/control-plane/engineering/intake")) {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(String(init?.body ?? "{}")) as { cleanroom?: boolean }
          expect(parsed.cleanroom).toBe(true)
          return new Response(
            JSON.stringify({
              ok: true,
              status: "CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED",
              engineering_session_id: "sess-cleanroom",
              cleanroom: true,
              problem_brief: { title: "Draft" },
              problem_brief_ref: "artifact://problem_brief/draft-1",
              clarification_questions: ["What system is in scope?"],
            }),
            { status: 200 },
          )
        }
        return new Response("nf", { status: 404 })
      }),
    )

    const app = buildServer()
    const res = await app.inject({
      method: "POST",
      url: "/v1/workflows/execute",
      payload: {
        workflow_name: "engineering_workflow",
        workflow_config: { cleanroom: true },
        input_data: {
          messages: [
            {
              role: "user",
              content: "Design an engineering workflow with verification gates.",
            },
          ],
        },
      },
    })
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(200)
    const body = JSON.parse(res.body) as {
      status: string
      result: {
        referential_state?: { cleanroom?: boolean; engineering_session_id?: string }
      }
    }
    expect(body.status).toBe("completed")
    expect(body.result?.referential_state?.cleanroom).toBe(true)
    expect(body.result?.referential_state?.engineering_session_id).toBe("sess-cleanroom")
    vi.unstubAllGlobals()
    delete process.env.ORCHESTRATOR_API_URL
  })

  it("POST /v1/workflows/execute engineering_workflow dispatches coding_model packets via Claw Code", async () => {
    process.env.LLM_BACKEND = "mock"
    process.env.ORCHESTRATOR_API_URL = "http://127.0.0.1:7777"
    const workspaceRoot = await mkdtemp(path.join(os.tmpdir(), "agent-platform-claw-workflow-"))
    const fakeClaw = await createFakeClawBinary("generated governed patch")
    process.env.CLAW_CODE_BINARY = fakeClaw
    vi.stubGlobal(
      "fetch",
      vi.fn(async (url: string | URL) => {
        const u = typeof url === "string" ? url : url.toString()
        if (u.includes("/api/control-plane/engineering/intake")) {
          return new Response(
            JSON.stringify({
              ok: true,
              status: "READY",
              engineering_session_id: "sess-2",
              problem_brief: { problem_brief_id: "pb-1", title: "Strict task" },
              problem_brief_ref: "artifact://problem_brief/pb-1",
              domain_knowledge_package_assessment: {
                domain_knowledge_package_assessment_id: "kpa-1",
                schema_version: "1.0.0",
                coverage_class: "strong",
                required_for_mode: true,
                candidate_pack_refs: ["artifact://knowledge-pack/demo-pack"],
              },
              domain_knowledge_package_assessment_ref: "artifact://domain_knowledge_package_assessment/kpa-1",
              domain_knowledge_package_coverage: "strong",
              knowledge_candidate_refs: ["artifact://knowledge-pack/demo-pack"],
              agent_profile: "engineering",
              response_control_ref: "artifact://response-control-assessment/rca-1",
              selected_domain_knowledge_package_refs: ["artifact://domain-knowledge-package/computational_engineering"],
              selected_runtime_environment_refs: ["artifact://runtime-environment/engineering_orchestration_stack"],
              selected_technique_refs: [
                "artifact://technique-card/artifact_first_task_graph_execution",
              ],
              selected_theory_refs: [
                "artifact://theory-card/computational_engineering_numerical_methods",
              ],
              knowledge_role_contexts: {
                coder: {
                  role_context_bundle_id: "coder_ctx_1",
                  role: "coder",
                  source_artifact_refs: ["artifact://knowledge-pack/demo-pack"],
                  compiled_summary: "Use the verified demo pack and runtime.",
                },
              },
              knowledge_role_context_refs: ["artifact://role_context_bundle/coder_ctx_1"],
              knowledge_required: true,
              engineering_state: {
                engineering_state_id: "es-1",
                open_issues: [],
                conflicts: [],
              },
              engineering_state_ref: "artifact://engineering_state/es-1",
              task_queue: { task_queue_id: "queue-1", items: [] },
              task_cards: [
                {
                  task_card_id: "11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111",
                  task_type: "CODEGEN",
                  objective: "Implement the governed patch",
                  input_artifact_refs: [
                    "artifact://problem_brief/pb-1",
                    "artifact://engineering_state/es-1",
                  ],
                  required_outputs: [{ artifact_type: "CODE_PATCH" }],
                  acceptance_criteria: ["Emit a patch artifact"],
                  constraints: ["Honor the governed packet"],
                  response_control_ref: "artifact://response-control-assessment/rca-1",
                  selected_domain_knowledge_package_refs: [
                    "artifact://domain-knowledge-package/computational_engineering",
                  ],
                  selected_runtime_environment_refs: [
                    "artifact://runtime-environment/engineering_orchestration_stack",
                  ],
                  selected_technique_refs: [
                    "artifact://technique-card/artifact_first_task_graph_execution",
                  ],
                  selected_theory_refs: [
                    "artifact://theory-card/computational_engineering_numerical_methods",
                  ],
                  routing_metadata: { selected_executor: "coding_model" },
                  budget_policy: { allow_escalation: false },
                },
                {
                  task_card_id: "22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222",
                  task_type: "VALIDATION",
                  input_artifact_refs: [
                    "artifact://problem_brief/pb-1",
                    "artifact://engineering_state/es-1",
                  ],
                  required_outputs: [{ artifact_type: "VERIFICATION_REPORT" }],
                  acceptance_criteria: ["Verification report emitted"],
                  validation_requirements: ["criterion_1:test:target 1 pass"],
                  response_control_ref: "artifact://response-control-assessment/rca-1",
                  selected_domain_knowledge_package_refs: [
                    "artifact://domain-knowledge-package/computational_engineering",
                  ],
                  selected_runtime_environment_refs: [
                    "artifact://runtime-environment/engineering_orchestration_stack",
                  ],
                  selected_technique_refs: [
                    "artifact://technique-card/artifact_first_task_graph_execution",
                  ],
                  selected_theory_refs: [
                    "artifact://theory-card/computational_engineering_numerical_methods",
                  ],
                  routing_metadata: { selected_executor: "deterministic_validator" },
                  budget_policy: { allow_escalation: true },
                },
              ],
              ready_for_task_decomposition: true,
              required_gates: [],
              clarification_questions: [],
            }),
            { status: 200 },
          )
        }
        return new Response("nf", { status: 404 })
      }),
    )

    const app = buildServer()
    const res = await app.inject({
      method: "POST",
      url: "/v1/workflows/execute",
      payload: {
        workflow_name: "engineering_workflow",
        input_data: {
          engagement_mode: "strict_engineering",
          engagement_mode_source: "explicit",
          minimum_engagement_mode: "strict_engineering",
          context: {
            workspace: {
              worktree_path: workspaceRoot,
            },
          },
          messages: [
            {
              role: "user",
              content: "Implement the governed patch for the strict engineering workflow.",
            },
          ],
        },
      },
    })
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(200)
    const body = JSON.parse(res.body) as {
      status: string
      result: {
        final_response?: string
        verification_outcome?: string
        engagement_mode?: string
        ready_for_task_decomposition?: boolean
        referential_state?: { active_task_card_ref?: string; selected_executor?: string }
      }
    }
    expect(body.status).toBe("completed")
    expect(body.result?.final_response).toContain("generated governed patch")
    expect(body.result?.verification_outcome).toBe("PASS")
    expect(body.result?.engagement_mode).toBe("strict_engineering")
    expect(body.result?.ready_for_task_decomposition).toBe(true)
    expect(body.result?.referential_state?.active_task_card_ref).toBe(
      "artifact://task_card/11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111",
    )
    expect(body.result?.referential_state?.selected_executor).toBe("coding_model")
    vi.unstubAllGlobals()
    delete process.env.ORCHESTRATOR_API_URL
    delete process.env.CLAW_CODE_BINARY
    await rm(workspaceRoot, { recursive: true, force: true })
    await rm(path.dirname(fakeClaw), { recursive: true, force: true })
  })

                  acceptance_criteria: ["Emit a strategic review note"],
                  constraints: ["Only run after typed escalation"],

  it("GET /v1/workflows/:name/schema returns Zod-derived workflow contracts", async () => {
    const app = buildServer()
    const res = await app.inject({
      method: "GET",
      url: "/v1/workflows/orchestration_chat/schema",
    })
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(200)
    const body = JSON.parse(res.body) as {
      name: string
      implementation_status: string
      input: { type: string; properties: Record<string, unknown> }
      workflow_config: { type: string; properties: Record<string, unknown> }
      output: { type: string; properties: Record<string, unknown> }
      examples: unknown[]
    }
    expect(body.name).toBe("orchestration_chat")
    expect(body.implementation_status).toBe("active")
    expect(body.input.properties.messages).toBeDefined()
    expect(body.workflow_config.properties.model_routing).toBeDefined()
    expect(body.output.properties.final_response).toBeDefined()
    expect(body.examples.length).toBeGreaterThan(0)
  })

  it("POST /v1/devplane/runs executes a mock internal run", async () => {
    process.env.LLM_BACKEND = "mock"
    const repo = await initGitRepo()
    const app = buildServer()
    const createRes = await app.inject({
      method: "POST",
      url: "/v1/devplane/runs",
      payload: {
        control_run_id: "control-run-1",
        task_id: "task-1",
        project_id: "proj-example",
        workspace: {
          canonical_repo_path: repo,
          worktree_path: repo,
          branch_name: "main",
          base_branch: "main",
          remote_name: "origin",
        },
        plan: {
          project_id: "proj-example",
          objective: "Inspect the repository and prepare for publish.",
          constraints: [],
          acceptance_criteria: ["Verification passes"],
          implementation_outline: ["Inspect repo"],
          verification_plan: ["git status --short"],
          delegation_hints: [],
          work_items: [],
          verification_blocks: [
            {
              name: "git_status",
              command: "git status --short",
              required: true,
            },
          ],
        },
        callback: {
          events_url: "http://127.0.0.1:9/api/dev/runs/1/events",
          complete_url: "http://127.0.0.1:9/api/dev/runs/1/complete",
        },
      },
    })
    expect(createRes.statusCode).toBe(200)
    const created = JSON.parse(createRes.body) as { run_id: string }

    let snapshot: DevplaneRunSnapshot | null = null
    for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 150; attempt += 1) {
      const statusRes = await app.inject({
        method: "GET",
        url: `/v1/devplane/runs/${created.run_id}`,
      })
      expect(statusRes.statusCode).toBe(200)
      snapshot = JSON.parse(statusRes.body) as DevplaneRunSnapshot
      if (
        snapshot &&
        ["ready_to_publish", "failed", "cancelled"].includes(snapshot.status)
      ) {
        break
      }
      await delay(20)
    }

    expect(snapshot?.status).toBe("ready_to_publish")
    expect(snapshot?.verification_results[0]?.status).toBe("passed")
    expect(snapshot?.artifacts.length).toBeGreaterThan(0)
    expect(snapshot?.commands?.some((command) => command.command === "git status --short")).toBe(true)
    expect(Array.isArray(snapshot?.callback_errors)).toBe(true)
    expect(snapshot?.created_at).toBeTruthy()
    expect(snapshot?.updated_at).toBeTruthy()
    expect(snapshot?.finished_at).toBeTruthy()
    await rm(repo, { recursive: true, force: true })
  })

  it("POST /v1/devplane/runs/:id/cancel aborts an active verification command", async () => {
    process.env.LLM_BACKEND = "mock"
    process.env.DEVPLANE_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS = "10000"
    const repo = await initGitRepo()
    const app = buildServer()
    const createRes = await app.inject({
      method: "POST",
      url: "/v1/devplane/runs",
      payload: {
        control_run_id: "control-run-cancel",
        task_id: "task-cancel",
        project_id: "proj-example",
        workspace: {
          canonical_repo_path: repo,
          worktree_path: repo,
          branch_name: "main",
          base_branch: "main",
          remote_name: "origin",
        },
        plan: {
          project_id: "proj-example",
          objective: "Cancel during verification.",
          constraints: [],
          acceptance_criteria: ["Cancellation interrupts verification"],
          implementation_outline: ["No-op implementation"],
          verification_plan: [],
          delegation_hints: [],
          work_items: [],
          verification_blocks: [
            {
              name: "slow_verification",
              command: "node -e \"setTimeout(() => {}, 5000)\"",
              required: true,
            },
          ],
        },
        callback: {
          events_url: "http://127.0.0.1:9/api/dev/runs/cancel/events",
          complete_url: "http://127.0.0.1:9/api/dev/runs/cancel/complete",
        },
      },
    })
    expect(createRes.statusCode).toBe(200)
    const created = JSON.parse(createRes.body) as { run_id: string }

    for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 150; attempt += 1) {
      const statusRes = await app.inject({
        method: "GET",
        url: `/v1/devplane/runs/${created.run_id}`,
      })
      const snapshot = JSON.parse(statusRes.body) as DevplaneRunSnapshot
      if (snapshot.phase === "verifying") {
        break
      }
      await delay(10)
    }

    const cancelRes = await app.inject({
      method: "POST",
      url: `/v1/devplane/runs/${created.run_id}/cancel`,
    })
    expect(cancelRes.statusCode).toBe(200)

    let snapshot: DevplaneRunSnapshot | null = null
    for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 150; attempt += 1) {
      const statusRes = await app.inject({
        method: "GET",
        url: `/v1/devplane/runs/${created.run_id}`,
      })
      snapshot = JSON.parse(statusRes.body) as DevplaneRunSnapshot
      if (snapshot.status === "cancelled") {
        break
      }
      await delay(10)
    }

    expect(snapshot?.status).toBe("cancelled")
    expect(snapshot?.cancel_requested).toBe(true)
    expect(
      snapshot?.commands?.some(
        (command) =>
          command.command.includes("setTimeout") &&
          (command.exit_code === 130 || command.stderr_excerpt?.includes("cancel")),
      ),
    ).toBe(true)
    delete process.env.DEVPLANE_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS
    await rm(repo, { recursive: true, force: true })
  })

  it("POST /v1/devplane/runs records exit code 124 when a verification command times out", async () => {
    process.env.LLM_BACKEND = "mock"
    process.env.DEVPLANE_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS = "50"
    const repo = await initGitRepo()
    const app = buildServer()
    const createRes = await app.inject({
      method: "POST",
      url: "/v1/devplane/runs",
      payload: {
        control_run_id: "control-run-timeout",
        task_id: "task-timeout",
        project_id: "proj-example",
        workspace: {
          canonical_repo_path: repo,
          worktree_path: repo,
          branch_name: "main",
          base_branch: "main",
          remote_name: "origin",
        },
        plan: {
          project_id: "proj-example",
          objective: "Timeout during verification.",
          constraints: [],
          acceptance_criteria: ["Timeout is recorded"],
          implementation_outline: ["No-op implementation"],
          verification_plan: [],
          delegation_hints: [],
          work_items: [],
          verification_blocks: [
            {
              name: "slow_verification",
              command: "node -e \"setTimeout(() => {}, 1000)\"",
              required: true,
            },
          ],
        },
        callback: {
          events_url: "http://127.0.0.1:9/api/dev/runs/timeout/events",
          complete_url: "http://127.0.0.1:9/api/dev/runs/timeout/complete",
        },
      },
    })
    expect(createRes.statusCode).toBe(200)
    const created = JSON.parse(createRes.body) as { run_id: string }

    let snapshot: DevplaneRunSnapshot | null = null
    for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 150; attempt += 1) {
      const statusRes = await app.inject({
        method: "GET",
        url: `/v1/devplane/runs/${created.run_id}`,
      })
      snapshot = JSON.parse(statusRes.body) as DevplaneRunSnapshot
      if (snapshot.status === "failed") {
        break
      }
      await delay(10)
    }

    expect(snapshot?.status).toBe("failed")
    expect(
      snapshot?.commands?.some(
        (command) =>
          command.command.includes("setTimeout") &&
          command.exit_code === 124 &&
          command.stderr_excerpt?.includes("timed out"),
      ),
    ).toBe(true)
    delete process.env.DEVPLANE_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS
    await rm(repo, { recursive: true, force: true })
  })
})

async function initGitRepo(): Promise<string> {
  const repo = await mkdtemp(path.join(os.tmpdir(), "agent-platform-devplane-"))
  await writeFile(path.join(repo, "README.md"), "# Example\n", "utf8")
  await mkdir(path.join(repo, "src"), { recursive: true })
  await writeFile(path.join(repo, "src", "index.ts"), "export const ok = true\n", "utf8")
  run(["git", "init", "-b", "main"], repo)
  run(["git", "config", "user.name", "Agent Platform Test"], repo)
  run(["git", "config", "user.email", "agent-platform@example.com"], repo)
  run(["git", "add", "."], repo)
  run(["git", "commit", "-m", "Initial commit"], repo)
  return repo
}

async function createFakeClawBinary(outputText: string): Promise<string> {
  const root = await mkdtemp(path.join(os.tmpdir(), "fake-claw-"))
  const scriptPath = path.join(root, "claw")
  const script = `#!/usr/bin/env node
const fs = require("node:fs");
const path = require("node:path");
const outputText = process.env.CLAW_TEST_OUTPUT_TEXT || ${JSON.stringify(outputText)};

function send(message) {
  const payload = Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(message), "utf8");
  process.stdout.write(Buffer.from("Content-Length: " + payload.length + "\\r\\n\\r\\n", "utf8"));
  process.stdout.write(payload);
}

function toolResult(id, payload) {
  send({
    jsonrpc: "2.0",
    id,
    result: {
      content: [{ type: "text", text: JSON.stringify(payload) }],
    },
  });
}

function writeWorkerState(cwd, state) {
  const stateDir = path.join(cwd, ".claw");
  fs.mkdirSync(stateDir, { recursive: true });
  fs.writeFileSync(path.join(stateDir, "worker-state.json"), JSON.stringify(state, null, 2));
}

function parseFrames(chunkBuffer) {
  const messages = [];
  while (true) {
    const headerEnd = chunkBuffer.indexOf("\\r\\n\\r\\n");
    if (headerEnd === -1) break;
    const header = chunkBuffer.slice(0, headerEnd).toString("utf8");
    const match = header.match(/content-length:\\s*(\\d+)/i);
    if (!match) break;
    const length = Number(match[1]);
    const frameStart = headerEnd + 4;
    const frameEnd = frameStart + length;
    if (chunkBuffer.length < frameEnd) break;
    messages.push(JSON.parse(chunkBuffer.slice(frameStart, frameEnd).toString("utf8")));
    chunkBuffer = chunkBuffer.slice(frameEnd);
  }
  return { messages, rest: chunkBuffer };
}

if (process.argv[2] !== "mcp" || process.argv[3] !== "serve") {
  process.exit(0);
}

let buffer = Buffer.alloc(0);
process.stdin.on("data", (chunk) => {
  buffer = Buffer.concat([buffer, chunk]);
  const parsed = parseFrames(buffer);
  buffer = parsed.rest;
  for (const message of parsed.messages) {
    if (message.method === "initialize") {
      send({
        jsonrpc: "2.0",
        id: message.id,
        result: {
          protocolVersion: message.params.protocolVersion,
          capabilities: {},
          serverInfo: { name: "fake-claw", version: "0.1.0" },
        },
      });
      continue;
    }
    if (message.method === "tools/list") {
      send({
        jsonrpc: "2.0",
        id: message.id,
        result: {
          tools: [
            { name: "RunTaskCard" },
            { name: "WorkerCreate" },
            { name: "WorkerObserve" },
            { name: "WorkerResolveTrust" },
            { name: "WorkerRestart" },
            { name: "Agent" },
          ],
        },
      });
      continue;
    }
    if (message.method !== "tools/call") {
      continue;
    }
    const name = message.params.name;
    const args = message.params.arguments || {};
    if (name === "RunTaskCard") {
      toolResult(message.id, { task_id: "task-1", status: "created" });
      continue;
    }
    if (name === "WorkerCreate") {
      writeWorkerState(args.cwd, {
        worker_id: "worker-1",
        status: "spawning",
        is_ready: false,
        trust_gate_cleared: true,
        seconds_since_update: 0,
      });
      toolResult(message.id, { worker_id: "worker-1", trust_auto_resolve: true });
      continue;
    }
    if (name === "WorkerObserve") {
      writeWorkerState(process.cwd(), {
        worker_id: "worker-1",
        status: "ready_for_prompt",
        is_ready: true,
        trust_gate_cleared: true,
        seconds_since_update: 0,
      });
      toolResult(message.id, { worker_id: "worker-1", status: "ready_for_prompt" });
      continue;
    }
    if (name === "WorkerResolveTrust" || name === "WorkerRestart") {
      toolResult(message.id, { worker_id: "worker-1", status: "spawning" });
      continue;
    }
    if (name === "Agent") {
      const agentStore = process.env.CLAWD_AGENT_STORE || path.join(process.cwd(), ".clawd-agents");
      fs.mkdirSync(agentStore, { recursive: true });
      const manifestFile = path.join(agentStore, "agent-test.json");
      const outputFile = path.join(agentStore, "agent-test.md");
      const manifest = {
        agentId: "agent-test",
        status: "completed",
        manifestFile,
        outputFile,
      };
      fs.writeFileSync(outputFile, outputText);
      fs.writeFileSync(manifestFile, JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2));
      toolResult(message.id, manifest);
    }
  }
});
`
  await writeFile(scriptPath, script, "utf8")
  await chmod(scriptPath, 0o755)
  return scriptPath
}

function run(command: string[], cwd: string): void {
  const result = spawnSync(command[0]!, command.slice(1), {
    cwd,
    encoding: "utf8",
    env: {
      ...process.env,
      // Tests should not depend on developer-global git config (e.g. commit signing helpers).
      GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL: "/dev/null",
      GIT_CONFIG_SYSTEM: "/dev/null",
    },
  })
  if (result.status !== 0) {
    throw new Error(result.stderr || `Command failed: ${command.join(" ")}`)
  }
}

async function delay(ms: number): Promise<void> {
  await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms))
}
```

```ts
import { LLMManager } from "./llm/manager.js";

import { publishWorkflowLifecycleEvent } from "./workflow/running-ingest.js";
import { supportedWorkflowNames, workflowSchemaResponse } from "./workflow/contracts.js";
import { createWorkflowRunHandle, executeWorkflowRun, prepareWorkflowRequest, workflowStatusPayload, WorkflowRequestError, } from "./workflow/runner.js";

import { SHELL_BRIDGE_GATEWAY_SHIMS } from "./shell-bridge/parity.js";
const WORKFLOW_NAMES = [...supportedWorkflowNames];
const providerSchema = z.enum([
    "anthropic",
    "copilot",
    "grok",
    "openai",
    "gemini",
    "ollama",
    "vllm",
    "huggingface",
    "hf",
    "hosted_api",
    "local_worker",
    "local",
    "swarm",
]);
function withModelRouting(inputData, workflowConfig) {
    const existing = workflowConfig ?? {};
    const current = existing.model_routing &&
        typeof existing.model_routing === "object" &&
        !Array.isArray(existing.model_routing)
        ? existing.model_routing
        : {};
    const modelRouting = { ...current };
    if (typeof inputData.model === "string" && inputData.model.trim()) {
        modelRouting.model = inputData.model;
    }
    if (typeof inputData.temperature === "number") {
        modelRouting.temperature = inputData.temperature;
    }
    if (typeof inputData.max_tokens === "number") {
        modelRouting.max_tokens = inputData.max_tokens;
    }
    if (typeof inputData.maxTokens === "number") {
        modelRouting.maxTokens = inputData.maxTokens;
    }
    if (typeof inputData.provider === "string" && inputData.provider.trim()) {
        modelRouting.provider_preference = inputData.provider;
    }
    if (typeof existing.provider_preference === "string" &&
        existing.provider_preference.trim() &&
        modelRouting.provider_preference === undefined) {
        modelRouting.provider_preference = existing.provider_preference;
    }
    if (Object.keys(modelRouting).length === 0) {
        return workflowConfig;
    }
    return { ...existing, model_routing: modelRouting };
}
function backendRunSnapshot(backendRun) {
    return {
        run_id: backendRun.run_id,
        control_run_id: backendRun.control_run_id,
        status: backendRun.status,
        phase: backendRun.phase,
        engagement_mode: backendRun.engagement_mode,
        engagement_mode_source: backendRun.engagement_mode_source,
        engagement_mode_confidence: backendRun.engagement_mode_confidence,
        engagement_mode_reasons: backendRun.engagement_mode_reasons,
        minimum_engagement_mode: backendRun.minimum_engagement_mode,
        pending_mode_change: backendRun.pending_mode_change,
        lifecycle_reason: backendRun.lifecycle_reason,
        lifecycle_detail: backendRun.lifecycle_detail,
        summary: backendRun.summary,
        files_changed: backendRun.files_changed,
        verification_results: backendRun.verification_results,
        artifacts: backendRun.artifacts,
        cancel_requested: backendRun.cancel_requested === true,
        commands: backendRun.commands ?? [],
        callback_errors: backendRun.callback_errors ?? [],
        created_at: backendRun.created_at,
        updated_at: backendRun.updated_at,
        finished_at: backendRun.finished_at,
        debug: {
            command_count: backendRun.commands?.length ?? 0,
            callback_error_count: backendRun.callback_errors?.length ?? 0,
            cancel_requested: backendRun.cancel_requested === true,
        },
    };
}
export function buildServer() {
    const cfg = loadConfig();
    const llm = new LLMManager(cfg);

    const omaTools = filterOmaToolsForRuntime([...omaToolsAll] as any, cfg.omaToolPreset) as any;
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, llm);

            input_tokens: usage?.prompt_tokens ?? 0,

    }

        if (!cfg.apiBrainEnabled) {
            return "API brain disabled.";
        }

            name: "api_brain",

            systemPrompt: API_BRAIN_SYSTEM_PROMPT,
            model: cfg.apiBrainModel || defaultModel,

    }

    const engineeringWorkflow = createEngineeringWorkflow(cfg, engine, callApiBrain);
  const app = Fastify({ logger: true });
  const shell_bridgeSessionEventsQuery = z.object({
    cursor: z.string().min(1).optional(),
    limit: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).max(500).optional(),
    session_key: z.string().min(1).optional(),
  });
  app.get("/health", async () => {
        const llmHealth = await llm.healthCheck();
        return {
            status: "healthy",
            timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
            workflow_ready: true,
            llm_backend: {
                healthy: llmHealth.healthy,
                backend: llmHealth.backend,
                detail: llmHealth.detail,
            },
            orchestrator: "typescript-agent-platform",
        };
    });
  const registerShellBridgeRoute = (path, method, inputSchema) => {
        app.post(path, async (request, reply) => {
            const parsed = inputSchema.safeParse(request.body ?? {});
            if (!parsed.success) {
                return reply.status(400).send({ detail: parsed.error.flatten() });
            }
            try {
                return await callShellBridgeGatewayRpc(cfg, method, parsed.data ?? {});
            }
            catch (error) {
                return reply.status(502).send({
                    detail: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
                });
            }
    });
  };
  app.get("/v1/shell_bridge/sessions/events", async (request, reply) => {
    const parsed = shell_bridgeSessionEventsQuery.safeParse(request.query ?? {});
    if (!parsed.success) {
      return reply.status(400).send({ detail: parsed.error.flatten() });
    }
    const base = cfg.orchestratorApiUrl?.trim();
    if (!base) {
      return reply.status(502).send({ detail: "orchestrator api not configured" });
    }
    const url = new URL(`${base}/api/shell_bridge/sessions/events`);
    if (parsed.data.cursor) url.searchParams.set("cursor", parsed.data.cursor);
    if (typeof parsed.data.limit === "number") {
      url.searchParams.set("limit", String(parsed.data.limit));
    }
    if (parsed.data.session_key) {
      url.searchParams.set("session_key", parsed.data.session_key);
    }
    try {
      const res = await fetch(url, {
        headers: { Accept: "application/json" },
        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(30_000),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      reply.status(res.status);
      reply.header("Content-Type", res.headers.get("content-type") ?? "application/json");
      return reply.send(text);
    } catch (error) {
      return reply.status(502).send({
        detail: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      });
    }
  });
  app.get("/v1/shell_bridge/sessions/stream", async (request, reply) => {
    const parsed = shell_bridgeSessionEventsQuery.safeParse(request.query ?? {});
    if (!parsed.success) {
      return reply.status(400).send({ detail: parsed.error.flatten() });
    }
    const base = cfg.orchestratorApiUrl?.trim();
    if (!base) {
      return reply.status(502).send({ detail: "orchestrator api not configured" });
    }
    const url = new URL(`${base}/api/shell_bridge/sessions/stream`);
    if (parsed.data.cursor) url.searchParams.set("event_cursor", parsed.data.cursor);
    if (parsed.data.session_key) {
      url.searchParams.set("session_key", parsed.data.session_key);
    }
    const lastEventId =
      typeof request.headers["last-event-id"] === "string" ? request.headers["last-event-id"] : undefined;
    const controller = new AbortController();
    request.raw.once("close", () => controller.abort());
    try {
      const res = await fetch(url, {
        headers: {
          Accept: "text/event-stream",
          ...(lastEventId ? { "Last-Event-ID": lastEventId } : {}),
        },
        signal: controller.signal,
      });
      reply.status(res.status);
      reply.header(
        "Content-Type",
        res.headers.get("content-type") ?? "text/event-stream; charset=utf-8",
      );
      reply.header("Cache-Control", res.headers.get("cache-control") ?? "no-cache");
      reply.header("Connection", res.headers.get("connection") ?? "keep-alive");
      reply.header("X-Accel-Buffering", res.headers.get("x-accel-buffering") ?? "no");
      if (!res.ok || !res.body) {
        return reply.send(await res.text());
      }
      return reply.send(Readable.fromWeb(res.body as never));
    } catch (error) {
      if (controller.signal.aborted) {
        return reply.send();
      }
      return reply.status(502).send({
        detail: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      });
    }
  });
  for (const shim of SHELL_BRIDGE_GATEWAY_SHIMS) {
    registerShellBridgeRoute(shim.path, shim.rpcMethod, shim.inputSchema);
  }
    const chatBody = z.object({
        messages: z.array(z.object({ role: z.string(), content: z.string() })),
        model: z.string().optional(),
        temperature: z.number().optional(),
        max_tokens: z.number().optional(),
        provider: providerSchema.optional(),

        const parsed = chatBody.safeParse(request.body);
        if (!parsed.success) {
            return reply.status(400).send({ detail: parsed.error.flatten() });
        }
        const body = parsed.data;
        const injectBudget = validateChatInjectPayloadBudget({
            workspace_snapshot: body.workspace_snapshot,
            user_preferences: body.user_preferences,
            context: body.context,
            control_context: body.control_context,
        });
        if (!injectBudget.ok) {
            return reply.status(413).send({
                detail: {
                    error_code: injectBudget.detail,
                    field: injectBudget.field,
                    message: `Injected payload exceeds ${MAX_CHAT_INJECT_JSON_CHARS} serialized JSON characters.`,
                },
            });
        }
        const trustedKey = (cfg.chatTrustedApiKey ?? "").trim();
        if (trustedKey) {
            const auth = String(request.headers["authorization"] ?? "");
            const xApiKey = String(request.headers["x-api-key"] ?? "");
            const bearer = auth.toLowerCase().startsWith("bearer ") ? auth.slice(7).trim() : "";
            const provided = bearer || xApiKey;
            if (!provided || provided !== trustedKey) {
                return reply.status(403).send({
                    detail: {
                        error_code: "chat_untrusted",
                        message: "This /chat endpoint is restricted to trusted callers.",
                    },
                });
            }
        }
        const result = await chatWorkflow.invoke({
            messages: body.messages,
            current_step: "analyze",
            tools_needed: [],
            tool_results: {},
            client_context: body.context,
            control_context: body.control_context ?? body.context,
            system_prompt: body.systemPrompt,
            workflow_config: mergeOrchestrationChatWorkflowConfig(
                withModelRouting({
                    model: body.model,
                    temperature: body.temperature,
                    max_tokens: body.max_tokens,
                    provider: body.provider,
                }),
                {
                    system_directives: body.system_directives,
                    workspace_snapshot: body.workspace_snapshot,
                    user_preferences: body.user_preferences,
                },
            ),
            asr_audio_base64: body.asr_audio_base64,
        });
        const content = (result.final_response ?? "").trim();
        if (!content) {
            return reply.status(502).send({
                detail: {
                    error_code: "orchestrator_empty_response",
                    message: "Orchestrator produced an empty final_response.",
                    debug_hint: "Check workflow-coordinator logs for workflow execution errors and verify LLM_BACKEND is set to a real backend (not mock).",
                },
            });
        }
        const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
        return {
            id: `chatcmpl-${now}`,
            object: "chat.completion",
            created: now,
            model: body.model ?? "orchestrator",
            choices: [
                {
                    index: 0,
                    message: {
                        role: "assistant",
                        content,
                    },
                    finish_reason: "stop",
                },
            ],
            usage: {
                prompt_tokens: 0,
                completion_tokens: 0,
                total_tokens: 0,
            },
        };
    });
    app.get("/workflow/status", async () => {
        try {
            const toolsMod = await import("./tools/orchestration-gateway.js");
            const tools = await toolsMod.getAvailableTools(cfg);
            return {
                status: "active",
                available_tools: tools.length,
                workflow_nodes: ["analyze", "gather_context", "generate_response"],
                orchestrator: "langgraph-typescript",
            };
        }
        catch (e) {
            return { status: "error", message: String(e) };
        }
    });
    app.get("/llm/info", async () => {
        return {
            backend_info: llm.getBackendInfo(),
            health: await llm.healthCheck(),
            available_models: await llm.listModels(),
        };
    });
    app.post("/llm/switch/:backend_type", async (request, reply) => {
        const backend_type = request.params.backend_type.toLowerCase();
        if (!["ollama", "vllm", "huggingface", "hf", "mock", "none", "disabled"].includes(backend_type)) {
            return reply.status(400).send({
                detail: "Backend must be ollama, vllm, huggingface, hf, mock, none, or disabled",
            });
        }
        return {
            success: false,
            message: "Backend is controlled via LLM_BACKEND env in the TS orchestrator; restart service to switch.",
            requested: backend_type,
        };
    });
    app.get("/v1/workflows", async () => ({
        workflows: [...WORKFLOW_NAMES],
    }));
    app.get("/v1/oma/tools", async () => {
        const tools = filterOmaToolsForHttpCatalog(getOrchestrationOmaToolsArray(cfg), cfg.omaCatalogProfile);
        return {
            count: tools.length,
            catalog_profile: cfg.omaCatalogProfile,
            tools: tools.map((t) => ({ name: t.name, description: t.description })),
        };
    });
    app.get("/v1/workflows/:name/schema", async (request, reply) => {
        const name = request.params.name;
        if (name === "engineering_physics_v1") {
            return reply.status(410).send({
                detail: "engineering_physics_v1 was archived to ../server-local-archive/2026-04-08/server and is no longer part of the active orchestration surface.",
            });
        }
        if (!WORKFLOW_NAMES.includes(name)) {
            return reply.status(404).send({ detail: "workflow not found" });
        }
        return workflowSchemaResponse(name);
    });
    app.post("/v1/workflows/execute", async (request, reply) => {
        let prepared;
        try {
            prepared = prepareWorkflowRequest(request.body);
        }
        catch (error) {
            if (error instanceof WorkflowRequestError) {
                return reply.status(error.statusCode).send(error.detail?.detail ? error.detail : { detail: error.detail });
            }
            return reply.status(400).send({ detail: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) });
        }
        const { runId, controller } = createWorkflowRunHandle({
            deps: { cfg, chatWorkflow, engineeringWorkflow },
            prepared,
            source: "agent-platform:/v1/workflows/execute",
        });
        const started = Date.now();
        await executeWorkflowRun({
            deps: { cfg, chatWorkflow, engineeringWorkflow },
            runId,
            prepared,
            controller,
            source: "agent-platform:/v1/workflows/execute",
        });
        const rec = getWorkflowRun(runId);
        if ((rec?.status ?? "completed") === "failed") {
            return reply.status(500).send({
                status: "failed",
                workflow_id: runId,
                error: rec?.error ?? "workflow execution failed",
            });
        }
        return {
            status: rec?.status ?? "completed",
            workflow_id: runId,
            workflow_name: prepared.workflowName,
            duration: (Date.now() - started) / 1000,
            result: rec?.result,
        };
    });
    app.post("/v1/workflows/runs", async (request, reply) => {
        let prepared;
        try {
            prepared = prepareWorkflowRequest(request.body);
        }
        catch (error) {
            if (error instanceof WorkflowRequestError) {
                return reply.status(error.statusCode).send(error.detail?.detail ? error.detail : { detail: error.detail });
            }
            return reply.status(400).send({ detail: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) });
        }
        const { runId, controller, handle } = createWorkflowRunHandle({
            deps: { cfg, chatWorkflow, engineeringWorkflow },
            prepared,
            source: "agent-platform:/v1/workflows/runs",
        });
        void executeWorkflowRun({
            deps: { cfg, chatWorkflow, engineeringWorkflow },
            runId,
            prepared,
            controller,
            source: "agent-platform:/v1/workflows/runs",
        }).catch((error) => {
            app.log.error(error);
        });
        return handle;
    });
    app.get("/v1/workflows/:id/status", async (request, reply) => {
        const includeTrace = String(request.query?.include_trace ?? "").toLowerCase() === "true";
        const payload = workflowStatusPayload(request.params.id, includeTrace);
        if (!payload) {
            return reply.status(404).send({ detail: "workflow not found" });
        }
        return payload;
    });
    app.post("/v1/workflows/:id/cancel", async (request) => {
        const workflowId = request.params.id;
        const rec = getWorkflowRun(workflowId);
        const ok = cancelWorkflowRun(workflowId);
        if (ok) {
            appendWorkflowTrace(workflowId, {
                type: "workflow.cancel_requested",
                message: "Workflow cancellation requested.",
                details: { source: "agent-platform:/v1/workflows/{id}/cancel" },
            });
            void publishWorkflowLifecycleEvent({
                cfg,
                type: "run.progress",
                workflowId,
                workflowName: rec?.workflow_name ?? getWorkflowRun(workflowId)?.workflow_name ?? "unknown",
                payload: { kind: "workflow", status: "cancel_requested" },
                source: "agent-platform:/v1/workflows/{id}/cancel",
            }).then((result) => {
                setWorkflowIngestObservability(workflowId, result.status === "accepted"
                    ? { status: "accepted", detail: result.durability }
                    : result.status === "http_error"
                        ? { status: "http_error", detail: `${result.statusCode}: ${result.detail}` }
                        : result.status === "unavailable"
                            ? { status: "unavailable", detail: result.detail }
                            : { status: "not_configured" });
            });
        }
        return {
            id: workflowId,
            status: ok ? "cancel_requested" : rec?.status ?? "completed",
        };
    });
    app.post("/v1/devplane/runs", async (request, reply) => {
        const parsed = devPlaneRunCreateSchema.safeParse(request.body);
        if (!parsed.success) {
            return reply.status(400).send({ detail: parsed.error.flatten() });
        }
        const backendRun = createBackendRun(parsed.data);
        void executeBackendRun(backendRun.run_id, {
            cfg,
        }).catch((error) => {
            app.log.error(error);
        });
        return backendRunSnapshot(backendRun);
    });
    app.get("/v1/devplane/runs/:id", async (request, reply) => {
        const backendRun = getBackendRun(request.params.id);
        if (!backendRun) {
            return reply.status(404).send({ detail: "run not found" });
        }
        return backendRunSnapshot(backendRun);
    });
    app.post("/v1/devplane/runs/:id/cancel", async (request, reply) => {
        const backendRun = markRunCancelled(request.params.id);
        if (!backendRun) {
            return reply.status(404).send({ detail: "run not found" });
        }
        return backendRunSnapshot(backendRun);
    });
    const agentRunBody = z.object({
        agent: z.object({
            name: z.string(),
            model: z.string(),
            provider: providerSchema.optional(),
            systemPrompt: z.string().optional(),
            tools: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
            maxTurns: z.number().optional(),
            maxTokens: z.number().optional(),
            max_tokens: z.number().optional(),
            temperature: z.number().optional(),
        }),
        prompt: z.string(),
    });
    app.post("/v1/agents/run", async (request, reply) => {
        const parsed = agentRunBody.safeParse(request.body);
        if (!parsed.success) {
            return reply.status(400).send({ detail: parsed.error.flatten() });
        }
        const { agent: agentSpec, prompt } = parsed.data;
        const result = await engine.runDirectAgent({
            name: agentSpec.name,
            prompt,
            systemPrompt: agentSpec.systemPrompt,
            model: agentSpec.model,
            provider: agentSpec.provider,
            extraTools: omaTools,
            toolNames: agentSpec.tools ?? ["search_knowledge_base", "get_domain_data"],
            maxTurns: agentSpec.maxTurns ?? 8,
            maxTokens: agentSpec.maxTokens ?? agentSpec.max_tokens,
            temperature: agentSpec.temperature,
        });
        return {
            success: result.success,
            output: result.output,
            tokenUsage: toTokenUsage(result.usage),
            toolCalls: result.toolCalls ?? [],
        };
    });
    const teamSchema = z.object({
        name: z.string(),
        sharedMemory: z.boolean().optional(),
        maxConcurrency: z.number().optional(),
        agents: z.array(z.object({
            name: z.string(),
            model: z.string(),
            provider: providerSchema.optional(),
            systemPrompt: z.string().optional(),
            tools: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
            maxTurns: z.number().optional(),
            maxTokens: z.number().optional(),
            max_tokens: z.number().optional(),
            temperature: z.number().optional(),
        })),
    });
    const teamRunBody = z.object({
        team: teamSchema,
        goal: z.string(),
    });
    app.post("/v1/teams/run", async (request, reply) => {
        const parsed = teamRunBody.safeParse(request.body);
        if (!parsed.success) {
            return reply.status(400).send({ detail: parsed.error.flatten() });
        }
        const body = parsed.data;
        try {
            const result = await engine.runGoalTeam({
                teamName: `${body.team.name}-${crypto.randomUUID()}`,
                goal: body.goal,
                sharedMemory: body.team.sharedMemory ?? true,
                maxConcurrency: body.team.maxConcurrency,
                extraTools: omaTools,
                agents: body.team.agents.map((agent) => ({
                    name: agent.name,
                    model: agent.model,
                    provider: agent.provider,
                    systemPrompt: agent.systemPrompt,
                    toolNames: agent.tools ?? ["search_knowledge_base", "get_domain_data"],
                    maxTurns: agent.maxTurns ?? 6,
                    maxTokens: agent.maxTokens ?? agent.max_tokens,
                    temperature: agent.temperature,
                })),
            });
            return {
                success: result.success,
                totalTokenUsage: toTokenUsage(result.usage),
                agentResults: result.agentResults ?? {},
            };
        }
        catch (e) {
            request.log.error(e);
            return reply.status(500).send({
                error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
            });
        }
    });
    const tasksRunBody = z.object({
        team: teamSchema,
        tasks: z.array(z.object({
            title: z.string(),
            description: z.string(),
            assignee: z.string().optional(),
            dependsOn: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
        })),
    });
    app.post("/v1/tasks/run", async (request, reply) => {
        const parsed = tasksRunBody.safeParse(request.body);
        if (!parsed.success) {
            return reply.status(400).send({ detail: parsed.error.flatten() });
        }
        const body = parsed.data;
        try {
            const fallbackAgent = body.team.agents[0];
            if (!fallbackAgent) {
                return reply.status(400).send({
                    detail: "team.agents must include at least one agent for /v1/tasks/run",
                });
            }
            const agentByName = new Map(body.team.agents.map((agent) => [agent.name, agent]));
            const result = await engine.runGovernedTaskGraph({
                teamName: `${body.team.name}-tasks-${crypto.randomUUID()}`,
                sharedMemory: body.team.sharedMemory ?? true,
                maxConcurrency: body.team.maxConcurrency,
                extraTools: omaTools,
                tasks: body.tasks.map((task) => {
                    const assignee = task.assignee ?? fallbackAgent.name;
                    const agent = agentByName.get(assignee);
                    if (!agent) {
                        throw new Error(`Task assignee ${assignee} is not defined in team.agents.`);
                    }
                    return {
                        title: task.title,
                        description: task.description,
                        assignee,
                        dependsOn: task.dependsOn,
                        systemPrompt: agent.systemPrompt ?? "",
                        toolNames: agent.tools ?? ["search_knowledge_base", "get_domain_data"],
                        maxTurns: agent.maxTurns ?? 6,
                        model: agent.model,
                        provider: agent.provider,
                        providerPreference: agent.provider,
                        maxTokens: agent.maxTokens ?? agent.max_tokens,
                        temperature: agent.temperature,
                    };
                }),
            });
            return {
                success: result.success,
                totalTokenUsage: toTokenUsage(result.usage),
                agentResults: result.agentResults ?? {},
            };
        }
        catch (e) {
            request.log.error(e);
            return reply.status(500).send({
                error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
            });
        }
    });
    return app;
}
async function main() {
    const app = buildServer();
    const port = Number(process.env.AGENT_PLATFORM_PORT ?? process.env.PORT ?? 8000);
    const host = process.env.AGENT_PLATFORM_HOST ?? "0.0.0.0";
    await app.listen({ port, host });
}
if (pathToFileURL(process.argv[1] ?? "").href === import.meta.url) {
    main().catch((err) => {
        console.error(err);
        process.exit(1);
    });
}
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/shell-bridge/contracts.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`

```ts
import { z } from "zod"

const nonEmptyString = z.string().min(1)
const positiveInt = z.number().int().min(1)
const nonNegativeInt = z.number().int().min(0)
const ymdDate = z.string().regex(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/)
const utcOffset = z.string().regex(/^UTC[+-]\d{1,2}(?::[0-5]\d)?$/)
const nullable = <T extends z.ZodTypeAny>(schema: T) => z.union([schema, z.null()])
const strictObject = <T extends z.ZodRawShape>(shape: T) => z.object(shape).strict()

const sessionPatchSchema = strictObject({
  key: nonEmptyString,
  label: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  thinkingLevel: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  fastMode: z.union([z.boolean(), z.null()]).optional(),
  verboseLevel: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  traceLevel: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  reasoningLevel: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  responseUsage: z.enum(["off", "tokens", "full", "on"]).nullable().optional(),
  elevatedLevel: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  execHost: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  execSecurity: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  execAsk: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  execNode: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  model: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  spawnedBy: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  spawnedWorkspaceDir: nullable(nonEmptyString).optional(),
  spawnDepth: z.union([z.number().int().min(0), z.null()]).optional(),
  subagentRole: z.enum(["orchestrator", "leaf"]).nullable().optional(),
  subagentControlScope: z.enum(["children", "none"]).nullable().optional(),
  sendPolicy: z.enum(["allow", "deny"]).nullable().optional(),
  groupActivation: z.enum(["mention", "always"]).nullable().optional(),
})

export const SHELL_BRIDGE_MIRRORED_CONTRACTS = {
  "sessions.list": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      limit: positiveInt.optional(),
      activeMinutes: positiveInt.optional(),
      includeGlobal: z.boolean().optional(),
      includeUnknown: z.boolean().optional(),
      includeDerivedTitles: z.boolean().optional(),
      includeLastMessage: z.boolean().optional(),
      label: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      spawnedBy: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      agentId: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      search: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { agentId: "main", limit: 25 },
  },
  "sessions.preview": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      keys: z.array(nonEmptyString).min(1),
      limit: positiveInt.optional(),
      maxChars: z.number().int().min(20).optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { keys: ["agent:main:main"], limit: 3, maxChars: 120 },
  },
  "sessions.get": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      sessionKey: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      limit: positiveInt.optional(),
    }).refine((value) => Boolean(value.key || value.sessionKey), {
      message: "key or sessionKey is required",
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main" },
  },
  "sessions.resolve": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      sessionId: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      label: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      agentId: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      spawnedBy: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      includeGlobal: z.boolean().optional(),
      includeUnknown: z.boolean().optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { label: "support" },
  },
  "sessions.create": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      agentId: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      label: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      model: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      parentSessionKey: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      task: z.string().optional(),
      message: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { agentId: "main", label: "xlotyl-ops", message: "Start operator session" },
  },
  "sessions.send": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
      message: z.string(),
      thinking: z.string().optional(),
      attachments: z.array(z.unknown()).optional(),
      timeoutMs: nonNegativeInt.optional(),
      idempotencyKey: nonEmptyString.optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main", message: "continue" },
  },
  "sessions.steer": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
      message: z.string(),
      thinking: z.string().optional(),
      attachments: z.array(z.unknown()).optional(),
      timeoutMs: nonNegativeInt.optional(),
      idempotencyKey: nonEmptyString.optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main", message: "steer to verification" },
  },
  "sessions.abort": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
      runId: nonEmptyString.optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main" },
  },
  "sessions.patch": {
    inputSchema: sessionPatchSchema,
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main", label: "Renamed session" },
  },
  "sessions.reset": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
      reason: z.enum(["new", "reset"]).optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main", reason: "reset" },
  },
  "sessions.delete": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
      deleteTranscript: z.boolean().optional(),
      emitLifecycleHooks: z.boolean().optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main" },
  },
  "sessions.compact": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
      maxLines: positiveInt.optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main", maxLines: 200 },
  },
  "sessions.usage": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      startDate: ymdDate.optional(),
      endDate: ymdDate.optional(),
      mode: z.enum(["utc", "gateway", "specific"]).optional(),
      utcOffset: utcOffset.optional(),
      limit: positiveInt.optional(),
      includeContextWeight: z.boolean().optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main", limit: 20 },
  },
  "sessions.usage.timeseries": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main" },
  },
  "sessions.usage.logs": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
      limit: positiveInt.optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main", limit: 20 },
  },
  "sessions.compaction.list": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main" },
  },
  "sessions.compaction.get": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
      checkpointId: nonEmptyString,
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main", checkpointId: "cmp-1" },
  },
  "sessions.compaction.branch": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
      checkpointId: nonEmptyString,
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main", checkpointId: "cmp-1" },
  },
  "sessions.compaction.restore": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      key: nonEmptyString,
      checkpointId: nonEmptyString,
    }),
    testPayload: { key: "agent:main:main", checkpointId: "cmp-1" },
  },
  "agents.list": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({}),
    testPayload: {},
  },
  "agents.create": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      name: nonEmptyString,
      workspace: nonEmptyString,
      model: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      emoji: z.string().optional(),
      avatar: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: {
      name: "xlotyl-reviewer",
      workspace: "/workspace/reviews",
      model: "gpt-5.5",
      emoji: "review",
    },
  },
  "agents.update": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      agentId: nonEmptyString,
      name: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      workspace: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      model: nonEmptyString.optional(),
      emoji: z.string().optional(),
      avatar: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: {
      agentId: "xlotyl-reviewer",
      name: "xlotyl-reviewer-v2",
      workspace: "/workspace/reviews",
    },
  },
  "agents.delete": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      agentId: nonEmptyString,
      deleteFiles: z.boolean().optional(),
    }),
    testPayload: { agentId: "xlotyl-reviewer" },
  },
  "agents.files.list": {
    inputSchema: strictObject({
      agentId: nonEmptyString,
    }),
    testPayload: { agentId: "main" },
  },
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/shell-bridge/gateway-rpc.test.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 4801 bytes

```ts
import { describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest"
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import { callShellBridgeGatewayRpc } from "./gateway-rpc.js"

type Listener = (event?: { data?: string }) => void

class FakeSocket {
  readonly sent: string[] = []
  readonly listeners = new Map<string, Listener[]>()
  closed = false

  addEventListener(type: string, listener: Listener) {
    const existing = this.listeners.get(type) ?? []
    existing.push(listener)
    this.listeners.set(type, existing)
  }

  removeEventListener(type: string, listener: Listener) {
    const existing = this.listeners.get(type) ?? []
    this.listeners.set(
      type,
      existing.filter((item) => item !== listener),
    )
  }

  send(payload: string) {
    this.sent.push(payload)
  }

  close() {
    this.closed = true
  }

  emit(type: string, event?: { data?: string }) {
    for (const listener of this.listeners.get(type) ?? []) {
      listener(event)
    }
  }

  emitJson(value: unknown) {
    this.emit("message", { data: JSON.stringify(value) })
  }
}

function cfg(overrides: Partial<PlatformConfig> = {}): PlatformConfig {
  return {
    ragUrl: "http://rag",
    asrUrl: "http://asr",
    mcpUrl: "http://mcp",
    toolRegistryUrl: "http://tools",
    llmRunnerUrl: "http://llm",
    llmBackend: "mock",
    ollamaModel: "x",
    vllmModel: "x",
    huggingfaceModel: "hf",
    huggingfaceBaseUrl: "https://huggingface.co/v1",
    apiBrainEnabled: false,
    apiBrainMaxEscalationsPerTask: 1,
    apiBrainProvider: "anthropic",
    apiBrainModel: "",
    orchestrationDefaultModel: "m",
    orchestrationDefaultProvider: "openai",
    orchestratorApiUrl: "http://cp",
    modelRuntimeBaseUrl: "",
    structureGatewayUrl: "",
    mcpRegistryBaseUrl: "",
    clawCodeBinary: "claw",
    clawCodeTrustedRoots: [],
    clawCodePollIntervalMs: 1,
    clawCodeTimeoutMs: 1,
    clawCodeMaxConcurrentLanes: 1,
    agentPlatformBaseUrl: "http://agent-platform",
    enableContainerGuiActTool: false,
    omaCatalogProfile: "full",
    omaToolPreset: "primitive",
    shell_bridgeGatewayWsUrl: "ws://127.0.0.1:18789",
    shell_bridgeGatewayToken: "gateway-token",
    shell_bridgeGatewayRole: "operator",
    shell_bridgeGatewayScopes: ["operator.pairing"],
    shell_bridgeGatewayConnectTimeoutMs: 1000,
    shell_bridgeGatewayRequestTimeoutMs: 1000,
    ...overrides,
  }
}

describe("callShellBridgeGatewayRpc", () => {
  it("connects with configured operator credentials before issuing the target RPC", async () => {
    const socket = new FakeSocket()
    const socketFactory = vi.fn(() => socket)
    const pending = callShellBridgeGatewayRpc(
      cfg(),
      "device.pair.list",
      {},
      { socketFactory },
    )

    socket.emit("open")
    socket.emitJson({
      type: "event",
      event: "connect.challenge",
      payload: { nonce: "nonce-1" },
    })
    const connectFrame = JSON.parse(socket.sent[0] ?? "{}")
    expect(connectFrame.method).toBe("connect")
    expect(connectFrame.params.auth.token).toBe("gateway-token")
    expect(connectFrame.params.role).toBe("operator")
    expect(connectFrame.params.scopes).toEqual(["operator.pairing"])
    socket.emitJson({
      type: "res",
      id: connectFrame.id,
      ok: true,
      payload: { type: "hello-ok", protocol: 3 },
    })

    const rpcFrame = JSON.parse(socket.sent[1] ?? "{}")
    expect(rpcFrame.method).toBe("device.pair.list")
    expect(rpcFrame.params).toEqual({})
    socket.emitJson({
      type: "res",
      id: rpcFrame.id,
      ok: true,
      payload: { pending: [], paired: [] },
    })

    await expect(pending).resolves.toEqual({ pending: [], paired: [] })
    expect(socket.closed).toBe(true)
    expect(socketFactory).toHaveBeenCalledWith("ws://127.0.0.1:18789")
  })

  it("rejects structured RPC errors without leaking them as successful payloads", async () => {
    const socket = new FakeSocket()
    const pending = callShellBridgeGatewayRpc(
      cfg(),
      "device.token.revoke",
      { deviceId: "device-1", role: "operator" },
      { socketFactory: () => socket },
    )

    socket.emit("open")
    socket.emitJson({
      type: "event",
      event: "connect.challenge",
      payload: { nonce: "nonce-1" },
    })
    const connectFrame = JSON.parse(socket.sent[0] ?? "{}")
    socket.emitJson({
      type: "res",
      id: connectFrame.id,
      ok: true,
      payload: { type: "hello-ok", protocol: 3 },
    })
    const rpcFrame = JSON.parse(socket.sent[1] ?? "{}")
    socket.emitJson({
      type: "res",
      id: rpcFrame.id,
      ok: false,
      error: { code: "INVALID_REQUEST", message: "device token revocation denied" },
    })

    await expect(pending).rejects.toThrow("device token revocation denied")
    expect(socket.closed).toBe(true)
  })
});
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/shell-bridge/gateway-rpc.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 8213 bytes

```ts
import crypto from "node:crypto"
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"

type ShellBridgeGatewaySocketEvent = {
  data?: unknown
}

export type ShellBridgeGatewaySocket = {
  addEventListener: (type: string, listener: (event?: ShellBridgeGatewaySocketEvent) => void) => void
  removeEventListener?: (type: string, listener: (event?: ShellBridgeGatewaySocketEvent) => void) => void
  send: (payload: string) => void
  close: () => void
}

export type ShellBridgeGatewaySocketFactory = (url: string) => ShellBridgeGatewaySocket

type GatewayResponseFrame = {
  type: "res"
  id: string
  ok: boolean
  payload?: unknown
  error?: {
    code?: string
    message?: string
    details?: unknown
  }
}

type GatewayEventFrame = {
  type: "event"
  event: string
  payload?: unknown
}

type PendingRequest = {
  resolve: (value: unknown) => void
  reject: (error: Error) => void
}

export class ShellBridgeGatewayRpcError extends Error {
  readonly code?: string
  readonly details?: unknown

  constructor(message: string, opts?: { code?: string; details?: unknown }) {
    super(message)
    this.name = "ShellBridgeGatewayRpcError"
    this.code = opts?.code
    this.details = opts?.details
  }
}

function resolveSocketFactory(factory?: ShellBridgeGatewaySocketFactory): ShellBridgeGatewaySocketFactory {
  if (factory) return factory
  return (url: string) => {
    const WebSocketCtor = (globalThis as { WebSocket?: new (url: string) => ShellBridgeGatewaySocket }).WebSocket
    if (!WebSocketCtor) {
      throw new ShellBridgeGatewayRpcError("global WebSocket is unavailable in this Node runtime")
    }
    return new WebSocketCtor(url)
  }
}

function readMessageData(event?: ShellBridgeGatewaySocketEvent): string | null {
  const data = event?.data
  if (typeof data === "string") return data
  if (data instanceof ArrayBuffer) return Buffer.from(data).toString("utf8")
  if (ArrayBuffer.isView(data)) return Buffer.from(data.buffer, data.byteOffset, data.byteLength).toString("utf8")
  return null
}

function readChallengeNonce(payload: unknown): string | null {
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object" || Array.isArray(payload)) return null
  const nonce = (payload as { nonce?: unknown }).nonce
  return typeof nonce === "string" && nonce.trim() ? nonce.trim() : null
}

function requestTimeoutMs(cfg: PlatformConfig): number {
  const raw = cfg.shell_bridgeGatewayRequestTimeoutMs
  return typeof raw === "number" && Number.isFinite(raw) ? Math.max(1, Math.floor(raw)) : 30_000
}

function connectTimeoutMs(cfg: PlatformConfig): number {
  const raw = cfg.shell_bridgeGatewayConnectTimeoutMs
  return typeof raw === "number" && Number.isFinite(raw) ? Math.max(1, Math.floor(raw)) : 10_000
}

export async function callShellBridgeGatewayRpc(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  method: string,
  params: Record<string, unknown> = {},
  opts: { socketFactory?: ShellBridgeGatewaySocketFactory } = {},
): Promise<unknown> {
  const url = cfg.shell_bridgeGatewayWsUrl?.trim()
  if (!url) {
    throw new ShellBridgeGatewayRpcError("shell_bridge gateway not configured: set SHELL_BRIDGE_GATEWAY_WS_URL")
  }
  const socketFactory = resolveSocketFactory(opts.socketFactory)

  return await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const socket = socketFactory(url)
    const pending = new Map<string, PendingRequest>()
    let connected = false
    let finished = false
    let targetSent = false
    const timers = new Set<NodeJS.Timeout>()
    let challengeTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | undefined

    const cleanup = () => {
      if (finished) return
      finished = true
      for (const timer of timers) clearTimeout(timer)
      timers.clear()
      socket.removeEventListener?.("open", onOpen)
      socket.removeEventListener?.("message", onMessage)
      socket.removeEventListener?.("error", onError)
      socket.removeEventListener?.("close", onClose)
      try {
        socket.close()
      } catch {
        // Best effort: this single-call helper does not retain sockets.
      }
    }

    const clearChallengeTimer = () => {
      if (!challengeTimer) return
      clearTimeout(challengeTimer)
      timers.delete(challengeTimer)
      challengeTimer = undefined
    }

    const fail = (error: Error) => {
      cleanup()
      reject(error)
    }

    const succeed = (payload: unknown) => {
      cleanup()
      resolve(payload)
    }

    const sendRequest = (
      requestMethod: string,
      requestParams: Record<string, unknown>,
      timeoutMs: number,
    ): string => {
      const id = crypto.randomUUID()
      const timer = setTimeout(() => {
        pending.delete(id)
        fail(new ShellBridgeGatewayRpcError(`shell_bridge gateway request timeout for ${requestMethod}`))
      }, timeoutMs)
      timers.add(timer)
      pending.set(id, {
        resolve: (value) => {
          clearTimeout(timer)
          timers.delete(timer)
          if (requestMethod === "connect") {
            connected = true
            sendTargetRequest()
            return
          }
          succeed(value)
        },
        reject: (error) => {
          clearTimeout(timer)
          timers.delete(timer)
          fail(error)
        },
      })
      socket.send(
        JSON.stringify({
          type: "req",
          id,
          method: requestMethod,
          params: requestParams,
        }),
      )
      return id
    }

    const sendConnect = () => {
      const auth =
        cfg.shell_bridgeGatewayToken || cfg.shell_bridgeGatewayPassword
          ? {
              token: cfg.shell_bridgeGatewayToken,
              password: cfg.shell_bridgeGatewayPassword,
            }
          : undefined
      sendRequest(
        "connect",
        {
          minProtocol: 3,
          maxProtocol: 3,
          client: {
            id: "gateway-client",
            displayName: "Xlotyl agent-platform",
            version: "0.1.0",
            platform: process.platform,
            mode: "backend",
          },
          caps: [],
          auth,
          role: cfg.shell_bridgeGatewayRole ?? "operator",
          scopes: cfg.shell_bridgeGatewayScopes ?? ["operator.admin"],
        },
        connectTimeoutMs(cfg),
      )
    }

    const sendTargetRequest = () => {
      if (targetSent || !connected) return
      targetSent = true
      sendRequest(method, params, requestTimeoutMs(cfg))
    }

    const onOpen = () => {
      challengeTimer = setTimeout(() => {
        fail(new ShellBridgeGatewayRpcError("shell_bridge gateway connect challenge timeout"))
      }, connectTimeoutMs(cfg))
      timers.add(challengeTimer)
    }

    const onMessage = (event?: ShellBridgeGatewaySocketEvent) => {
      const raw = readMessageData(event)
      if (!raw) return
      let frame: GatewayEventFrame | GatewayResponseFrame
      try {
        frame = JSON.parse(raw) as GatewayEventFrame | GatewayResponseFrame
      } catch {
        return
      }
      if (frame.type === "event" && frame.event === "connect.challenge") {
        const nonce = readChallengeNonce(frame.payload)
        if (!nonce) {
          fail(new ShellBridgeGatewayRpcError("shell_bridge gateway connect challenge missing nonce"))
          return
        }
        clearChallengeTimer()
        sendConnect()
        return
      }
      if (frame.type !== "res") return
      const pendingRequest = pending.get(frame.id)
      if (!pendingRequest) return
      pending.delete(frame.id)
      if (frame.ok) {
        pendingRequest.resolve(frame.payload)
        return
      }
      pendingRequest.reject(
        new ShellBridgeGatewayRpcError(frame.error?.message ?? "shell_bridge gateway RPC failed", {
          code: frame.error?.code,
          details: frame.error?.details,
        }),
      )
    }

    const onError = () => {
      fail(new ShellBridgeGatewayRpcError("shell_bridge gateway websocket error"))
    }

    const onClose = () => {
      if (!finished) {
        fail(new ShellBridgeGatewayRpcError("shell_bridge gateway websocket closed"))
      }
    }

    socket.addEventListener("open", onOpen)
    socket.addEventListener("message", onMessage)
    socket.addEventListener("error", onError)
    socket.addEventListener("close", onClose)
  })
}
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/tools/agent-platform.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 1899 bytes

```ts
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"

function formatHttpError(label: string, res: Response, detail: string): string {
  return `${label}_error: ${res.status} ${detail}`.trim()
}

async function readErrorDetail(res: Response): Promise<string> {
  try {
    return await res.text()
  } catch {
    return ""
  }
}

export async function agentPlatformPostJson(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  path: string,
  body: Record<string, unknown>,
  timeoutMs: number,
): Promise<string> {
  const base = cfg.agentPlatformBaseUrl?.trim()
  if (!base) {
    return "agent_platform_not_configured: set AGENT_PLATFORM_BASE_URL"
  }
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`${base}${path}`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", Accept: "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(timeoutMs),
    })
    if (!res.ok) {
      return formatHttpError("agent_platform_post_json", res, await readErrorDetail(res))
    }
    const data: unknown = await res.json()
    return JSON.stringify(data)
  } catch (e) {
    return `agent_platform_post_json_error: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`
  }
}

export async function agentPlatformGetJson(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  path: string,
  timeoutMs: number,
): Promise<string> {
  const base = cfg.agentPlatformBaseUrl?.trim()
  if (!base) {
    return "agent_platform_not_configured: set AGENT_PLATFORM_BASE_URL"
  }
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`${base}${path}`, {
      headers: { Accept: "application/json" },
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(timeoutMs),
    })
    if (!res.ok) {
      return formatHttpError("agent_platform_get_json", res, await readErrorDetail(res))
    }
    const data: unknown = await res.json()
    return JSON.stringify(data)
  } catch (e) {
    return `agent_platform_get_json_error: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`
  }
}
```
