```ts
import { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest"
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import { LLMManager } from "../llm/manager.js"
import { OrchestrationEngine } from "../orchestration/engine.js"
import { createChatWorkflow } from "./graph.js"

function baseCfg(): PlatformConfig {
  return {
    ragUrl: "http://rag",
    asrUrl: "http://asr",
    mcpUrl: "http://mcp",
    toolRegistryUrl: "http://tools",
    llmRunnerUrl: "http://llm",
    llmBackend: "mock",
    ollamaModel: "x",
    vllmModel: "x",
    huggingfaceModel: "hf-model",
    huggingfaceBaseUrl: "https://router.huggingface.co/v1",
    huggingfaceApiKey: undefined,
    apiBrainEnabled: false,
    apiBrainMaxEscalationsPerTask: 1,
    apiBrainProvider: "openai",
    apiBrainModel: "brain-model",
    orchestrationDefaultModel: "mock-llm",
    orchestrationDefaultProvider: "openai",
    orchestrationDefaultBaseUrl: undefined,
    orchestrationDefaultApiKey: undefined,
    orchestrationMaxTokenBudget: undefined,
    orchestratorApiUrl: "",
    modelRuntimeBaseUrl: "",
    structureGatewayUrl: "",
    mcpRegistryBaseUrl: "",
    clawCodeBinary: "claw",
    clawCodeModel: undefined,
    clawCodeTrustedRoots: [],
    clawCodePollIntervalMs: 10,
    clawCodeTimeoutMs: 200,
    clawCodeMaxConcurrentLanes: 1,
    agentPlatformBaseUrl: "http://agent-platform",
    enableContainerGuiActTool: false,
    omaCatalogProfile: "full",
    omaToolPreset: "primitive",
  }
}

describe("orchestration_chat ASR gather", () => {
  afterEach(() => {
    vi.restoreAllMocks()
  })

  it("calls ASR service when tools_needed includes asr and asr_audio_base64 is set", async () => {
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const llm = new LLMManager(cfg)
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, llm)
    vi.spyOn(engine, "runSimpleChat").mockResolvedValue({
      output: "done",
      success: true,
    } as any)

    const fetchMock = vi.fn((url: string) => {
      if (url === "http://asr/transcribe") {
        return Promise.resolve({
          ok: true,
          json: () => Promise.resolve({ transcript: "hello from asr" }),
        } as Response)
      }
      return Promise.reject(new Error(`unexpected fetch: ${url}`))
    })
    vi.stubGlobal("fetch", fetchMock)

    const wf = createChatWorkflow(cfg, engine)
    const out = await wf.invoke({
      messages: [{ role: "user", content: "transcribe this" }],
      current_step: "analyze",
      tools_needed: [],
      tool_results: {},
      escalation_count: 0,
      workflow_config: { tools_needed_override: ["asr"] },
      asr_audio_base64: "YmFzZTY0",
    })

    expect(fetchMock).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      "http://asr/transcribe",
      expect.objectContaining({
        method: "POST",
        body: JSON.stringify({ audio_data: "YmFzZTY0" }),
      }),
    )
    expect((out as { tool_results?: Record<string, string> }).tool_results?.asr).toContain("hello from asr")
    vi.unstubAllGlobals()
  })

  it("records skip message when asr is needed but no audio payload", async () => {
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const llm = new LLMManager(cfg)
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, llm)
    vi.spyOn(engine, "runSimpleChat").mockResolvedValue({
      output: "done",
      success: true,
    } as any)

    const wf = createChatWorkflow(cfg, engine)
    const out = await wf.invoke({
      messages: [{ role: "user", content: "audio question" }],
      current_step: "analyze",
      tools_needed: [],
      tool_results: {},
      escalation_count: 0,
      workflow_config: { tools_needed_override: ["asr"] },
    })

    expect((out as { tool_results?: Record<string, string> }).tool_results?.asr ?? "").toContain(
      "ASR gather skipped",
    )
  })
})
```

```ts
  name: "search_knowledge_base",
  description: "Search RAG",
  inputSchema: {},
} as unknown as ToolDefinition

describe("orchestration_chat OMA tool mode", () => {
  afterEach(() => {
    vi.restoreAllMocks()
  })

  it("calls runSimpleChat with extraTools when oma_tool_mode is full", async () => {
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const llm = new LLMManager(cfg)
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, llm)
    const spy = vi.spyOn(engine, "runSimpleChat").mockResolvedValue({
      output: "mocked",
      toolCalls: [{ toolName: "search_knowledge_base" }],
      success: true,
    } as any)

    const wf = createChatWorkflow(cfg, engine, undefined, [fakeOmaTool])
    const out = await wf.invoke({
      messages: [{ role: "user", content: "ping" }],
      current_step: "analyze",
      tools_needed: [],
      tool_results: {},
      escalation_count: 0,
      workflow_config: { oma_tool_mode: "full" },
    })

    expect(spy).toHaveBeenCalled()
    const call = spy.mock.calls[0]![0]!
    expect(call.extraTools?.length).toBe(1)
    expect(call.toolNames).toEqual(["search_knowledge_base"])
    expect((out as { oma_tool_calls?: unknown }).oma_tool_calls).toEqual([
      { toolName: "search_knowledge_base" },
    ])
  })

  it("does not pass extraTools when OMA mode off", async () => {
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const llm = new LLMManager(cfg)
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, llm)
    const spy = vi.spyOn(engine, "runSimpleChat").mockResolvedValue({
      output: "mocked",
      success: true,
    } as any)

    const wf = createChatWorkflow(cfg, engine, undefined, [fakeOmaTool])
    await wf.invoke({
      messages: [{ role: "user", content: "ping" }],
      current_step: "analyze",
      tools_needed: [],
      tool_results: {},
      escalation_count: 0,
      workflow_config: {},
    })

    const call = spy.mock.calls[0]![0]!
    expect(call.extraTools).toBeUndefined()
    expect(call.toolNames).toBeUndefined()
  })
})
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/workflow/graph-routing.test.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`

```ts
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest"
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import { LLMManager } from "../llm/manager.js"
import { OrchestrationEngine } from "../orchestration/engine.js"
import { resolveMcpDomainWeightsForWorkflow } from "../tools/orchestration-gateway.js"
import {
  buildAnalyzeRequest,
  shouldEscalateToApiBrain,
  shouldSkipWikiPrefetch,
  type WorkflowStateType,
} from "./graph.js"

function baseCfg(): PlatformConfig {
  return {
    ragUrl: "http://rag",
    asrUrl: "http://asr",
    mcpUrl: "http://mcp",
    toolRegistryUrl: "http://tools",
    llmRunnerUrl: "http://llm",
    llmBackend: "mock",
    ollamaModel: "x",
    vllmModel: "x",
    huggingfaceModel: "hf-model",
    huggingfaceBaseUrl: "https://router.huggingface.co/v1",
    huggingfaceApiKey: undefined,
    apiBrainEnabled: true,
    apiBrainMaxEscalationsPerTask: 1,
    apiBrainProvider: "openai",
    apiBrainModel: "brain-model",
    orchestrationDefaultModel: "mock-llm",
    orchestrationDefaultProvider: "openai",
    orchestrationDefaultBaseUrl: undefined,
    orchestrationDefaultApiKey: undefined,
    orchestrationMaxTokenBudget: undefined,
    orchestratorApiUrl: "",
    modelRuntimeBaseUrl: "",
    structureGatewayUrl: "",
    mcpRegistryBaseUrl: "",
    clawCodeBinary: "claw",
    clawCodeModel: undefined,
    clawCodeTrustedRoots: [],
    clawCodePollIntervalMs: 10,
    clawCodeTimeoutMs: 200,
    clawCodeMaxConcurrentLanes: 1,
    agentPlatformBaseUrl: "http://agent-platform",
    enableContainerGuiActTool: false,
    omaCatalogProfile: "full",
    omaToolPreset: "primitive",
  }
}

function state(partial: Partial<WorkflowStateType> & Pick<WorkflowStateType, "messages">): WorkflowStateType {
  return {
    current_step: "analyze",
    tools_needed: [],
    tool_results: {},
    escalation_count: 0,
    ...partial,
  } as WorkflowStateType
}

function testEngine(): OrchestrationEngine {
  const cfg = baseCfg()
  return new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, new LLMManager(cfg))
}

describe("buildAnalyzeRequest", () => {
  it("uses tools_needed_override when present", async () => {
    const analyze = buildAnalyzeRequest(baseCfg(), testEngine())
    const out = await analyze(
      state({
        messages: [{ role: "user", content: "hello" }],
        workflow_config: { tools_needed_override: ["rag_search", "mcp_chemistry", "invalid"] },
      }),
    )
    expect(out.tools_needed).toEqual(["rag_search", "mcp_chemistry"])
  })

  it("allows empty tools_needed_override", async () => {
    const analyze = buildAnalyzeRequest(baseCfg(), testEngine())
    const out = await analyze(
      state({
        messages: [{ role: "user", content: "hello" }],
        workflow_config: { tools_needed_override: [] },
      }),
    )
    expect(out.tools_needed).toEqual([])
  })

  it("uses gather_tool_plan when override absent", async () => {
    const analyze = buildAnalyzeRequest(baseCfg(), testEngine())
    const out = await analyze(
      state({
        messages: [{ role: "user", content: "hello" }],
        workflow_config: { gather_tool_plan: { rag: true, asr: true, mcp_domains: ["materials"] } },
      }),
    )
    expect(out.tools_needed).toEqual(["rag_search", "asr", "mcp_materials"])
  })

  it("defaults to no gather tools without override/plan/routed output", async () => {
    const analyze = buildAnalyzeRequest(baseCfg(), testEngine())
    const out = await analyze(
      state({
        messages: [{ role: "user", content: "explain thermodynamics" }],
        workflow_config: {},
      }),
    )
    expect(out.tools_needed).toEqual([])
  })
})

describe("shouldEscalateToApiBrain policy", () => {
  it("api_brain_escalation never wins over trigger matches", () => {
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const r = shouldEscalateToApiBrain(
      cfg,
      state({
        messages: [{ role: "user", content: "architecture review" }],
        workflow_config: { allow_api_brain: true, api_brain_escalation: "never" },
        escalation_count: 0,
      }),
    )
    expect(r.escalate).toBe(false)
    expect(r.reason).toBe("policy_never")
  })

  it("api_brain_escalation always escalates when allowed", () => {
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const r = shouldEscalateToApiBrain(
      cfg,
      state({
        messages: [{ role: "user", content: "hello" }],
        workflow_config: { allow_api_brain: true, api_brain_escalation: "always" },
        escalation_count: 0,
      }),
    )
    expect(r.escalate).toBe(true)
    expect(r.reason).toBe("policy_always")
  })

  it("custom api_brain_triggers replace defaults", () => {
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const r = shouldEscalateToApiBrain(
      cfg,
      state({
        messages: [{ role: "user", content: "architecture" }],
        workflow_config: { allow_api_brain: true, api_brain_triggers: ["banana"] },
        escalation_count: 0,
      }),
    )
    expect(r.escalate).toBe(false)

    const r2 = shouldEscalateToApiBrain(
      cfg,
      state({
        messages: [{ role: "user", content: "I need a banana split" }],
        workflow_config: { allow_api_brain: true, api_brain_triggers: ["banana"] },
        escalation_count: 0,
      }),
    )
    expect(r2.escalate).toBe(true)
  })
})

describe("shouldSkipWikiPrefetch", () => {
  it("does not skip when context is missing", () => {
    expect(shouldSkipWikiPrefetch(undefined)).toBe(false)
    expect(shouldSkipWikiPrefetch(null)).toBe(false)
  })

  it("does not skip when context only has orchestration_state", () => {
    expect(
      shouldSkipWikiPrefetch({
        orchestration_state: {
          engagement_mode: "engineering_task",
        },
      }),
    ).toBe(false)
  })

  it("skips when context includes user-provided fields", () => {
    expect(
      shouldSkipWikiPrefetch({
        orchestration_state: { engagement_mode: "ideation" },
        engineering_session_id: "sess-1",
      }),
    ).toBe(false)
  })

  it("skips only when the explicit allowlisted flag is set", () => {
    expect(shouldSkipWikiPrefetch({ skip_wiki_prefetch: true })).toBe(true)
  })
})

describe("resolveMcpDomainWeightsForWorkflow", () => {
  it("prefers workflow_config.mcp_domain_weights over Domain Analysis regex", () => {
    const messages = [
      { role: "system" as const, content: "Domain Analysis: Chemistry = 0.99" },
      { role: "user" as const, content: "hi" },
    ]
    const w = resolveMcpDomainWeightsForWorkflow({ mcp_domain_weights: { chemistry: 0.1 } }, messages)
    expect(w.chemistry).toBe(0.1)
  })
})
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/workflow/graph.context-injection.test.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 9794 bytes

```ts
/**
 * Context injection hardening tests.
 *
 * Goal: ensure externally-derived and caller-controlled context is injected through an
 * explicitly untrusted wrapper and **not** merged into `role: system`.
 */
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest"
import { vi } from "vitest"

const execFileMock = vi.hoisted(() => vi.fn())

vi.mock("node:child_process", async () => {
  const actual = await vi.importActual<typeof import("node:child_process")>("node:child_process")
  return {
    ...actual,
    execFile: execFileMock,
  }
})

const { buildGenerateResponse } = await import("./graph.js")

describe("orchestration_chat context injection", () => {
  it("injects wiki/rag/asr/client_context as untrusted user context (not system)", async () => {
    const cfg = {} as any

    const engine: any = {
      lastArgs: undefined as any,
      runSimpleChat: async function runSimpleChat(args: any) {
        this.lastArgs = args
        return { output: "ok", usage: { input_tokens: 0, output_tokens: 0 } }
      },
    }

    const generate = buildGenerateResponse(cfg, engine, [])

    const state: any = {
      messages: [
        { role: "system", content: "SYS" },
        { role: "user", content: "Hello" },
      ],
      current_step: "generate_response",
      tools_needed: [],
      tool_results: {},
      workflow_config: {},
      client_context: { hello: "world" },
      wiki_context: "wiki text",
      rag_results: "rag text",
      asr_results: "asr text",
      required_tool_results: [{ tool: "x:y", result: { ok: true } }],
    }

    const out = await generate(state)
    expect(out.final_response).toBeDefined()

    const messages = engine.lastArgs?.messages ?? []
    const systemMessages = messages.filter((m: any) => m.role === "system").map((m: any) => String(m.content || ""))
    const userMessages = messages.filter((m: any) => m.role === "user").map((m: any) => String(m.content || ""))

    // Untrusted wrapper markers should be present in the injected user context message.
    expect(userMessages.join("\n")).toContain("UNTRUSTED DATA")
    expect(userMessages.join("\n")).toContain("<untrusted-data>")

    // The wiki/rag/asr strings should not be merged directly into any system message.
    expect(systemMessages.join("\n")).not.toContain("wiki text")
    expect(systemMessages.join("\n")).not.toContain("rag text")
    expect(systemMessages.join("\n")).not.toContain("asr text")
  })

  it("fills missing workspace recent activity server-side (best-effort) and injects as untrusted user context", async () => {
    execFileMock.mockImplementation((_cmd: unknown, _args: unknown, _opts: unknown, cb: unknown) => {
      ;(cb as (err: Error | null, stdout: string, stderr: string) => void)(
        null,
        ["## main", " M shell_bridge/src/gateway/server-methods/agents.ts", "?? newfile.txt"].join("\n"),
        "",
      )
      return {} as never
    })

    const cfg = {} as any
    const engine: any = {
      lastArgs: undefined as any,
      runSimpleChat: async function runSimpleChat(args: any) {
        this.lastArgs = args
        return { output: "ok", usage: { input_tokens: 0, output_tokens: 0 } }
      },
    }
    const generate = buildGenerateResponse(cfg, engine, [])

    const state: any = {
      messages: [
        { role: "system", content: "SYS" },
        { role: "user", content: "Hello" },
      ],
      current_step: "generate_response",
      tools_needed: [],
      tool_results: {},
      workflow_config: {
        workspace_snapshot: {
          source: "client",
          repo_root: "/tmp/repo",
          // omit git_status_short + recent_files_changed intentionally
        },
      },
    }

    const out = await generate(state)
    expect(out.final_response).toBeDefined()

    const messages = engine.lastArgs?.messages ?? []
    const userMessages = messages.filter((m: any) => m.role === "user").map((m: any) => String(m.content || ""))
    const injected = userMessages.join("\n")

    expect(injected).toContain("UNTRUSTED DATA")
    expect(injected).toContain("Workspace snapshot:")
    expect(injected).toContain("git_status_short")
    expect(injected).toContain("recent_files_changed")
    expect(execFileMock).toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it("injects session summary as untrusted user context (not system)", async () => {
    execFileMock.mockImplementation((_cmd: unknown, _args: unknown, _opts: unknown, cb: unknown) => {
      ;(cb as (err: Error | null, stdout: string, stderr: string) => void)(null, "## main\n", "")
      return {} as never
    })

    const cfg = {} as any
    const engine: any = {
      lastArgs: undefined as any,
      runSimpleChat: async function runSimpleChat(args: any) {
        this.lastArgs = args
        return { output: "ok", usage: { input_tokens: 0, output_tokens: 0 } }
      },
    }
    const generate = buildGenerateResponse(cfg, engine, [])

    const state: any = {
      messages: [
        { role: "system", content: "SYS" },
        { role: "user", content: "Hello" },
      ],
      current_step: "generate_response",
      tools_needed: [],
      tool_results: {},
      workflow_config: {
        session_summary: {
          source: "client",
          summary_text: "We decided to add invalidation events and context freshness.",
        },
      },
    }

    const out = await generate(state)
    expect(out.final_response).toBeDefined()

    const messages = engine.lastArgs?.messages ?? []
    const systemMessages = messages.filter((m: any) => m.role === "system").map((m: any) => String(m.content || ""))
    const userMessages = messages.filter((m: any) => m.role === "user").map((m: any) => String(m.content || ""))

    expect(userMessages.join("\n")).toContain("Session summary:")
    expect(userMessages.join("\n")).toContain("UNTRUSTED DATA")
    expect(systemMessages.join("\n")).not.toContain("Session summary:")
  })

  it("drops stale session summaries when max_age_seconds is exceeded", async () => {
    vi.useFakeTimers()
    vi.setSystemTime(new Date("2026-04-22T12:00:00.000Z"))

    execFileMock.mockImplementation((_cmd: unknown, _args: unknown, _opts: unknown, cb: unknown) => {
      ;(cb as (err: Error | null, stdout: string, stderr: string) => void)(null, "## main\n", "")
      return {} as never
    })

    const cfg = {} as any
    const engine: any = {
      lastArgs: undefined as any,
      runSimpleChat: async function runSimpleChat(args: any) {
        this.lastArgs = args
        return { output: "ok", usage: { input_tokens: 0, output_tokens: 0 } }
      },
    }
    const generate = buildGenerateResponse(cfg, engine, [])

    const state: any = {
      messages: [
        { role: "system", content: "SYS" },
        { role: "user", content: "Hello" },
      ],
      current_step: "generate_response",
      tools_needed: [],
      tool_results: {},
      workflow_config: {
        session_summary: {
          source: "client",
          captured_at: "2026-04-22T11:55:00.000Z",
          max_age_seconds: 60,
          summary_text: "This is stale and should be dropped.",
        },
      },
    }

    const out = await generate(state)
    expect(out.final_response).toBeDefined()

    const messages = engine.lastArgs?.messages ?? []
    const userMessages = messages.filter((m: any) => m.role === "user").map((m: any) => String(m.content || ""))
    expect(userMessages.join("\n")).not.toContain("Session summary:")

    vi.useRealTimers()
  })

  it("applies percentile-based default gating (P20) once enough real timestamps are observed", async () => {
    vi.useFakeTimers()
    vi.setSystemTime(new Date("2026-04-22T12:00:00.000Z"))

    execFileMock.mockImplementation((_cmd: unknown, _args: unknown, _opts: unknown, cb: unknown) => {
      ;(cb as (err: Error | null, stdout: string, stderr: string) => void)(null, "## main\n", "")
      return {} as never
    })

    const cfg = {} as any
    const engine: any = {
      lastArgs: undefined as any,
      runSimpleChat: async function runSimpleChat(args: any) {
        this.lastArgs = args
        return { output: "ok", usage: { input_tokens: 0, output_tokens: 0 } }
      },
    }
    const generate = buildGenerateResponse(cfg, engine, [])

    // Feed 20 observations with real captured_at timestamps so P20 activates.
    for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
      const ageSeconds = 100 + i * 10
      const capturedAt = new Date(Date.now() - ageSeconds * 1000).toISOString()
      await generate({
        messages: [
          { role: "system", content: "SYS" },
          { role: "user", content: "Hello" },
        ],
        current_step: "generate_response",
        tools_needed: [],
        tool_results: {},
        workflow_config: {
          session_summary: {
            source: "client",
            captured_at: capturedAt,
            summary_text: `age=${ageSeconds}`,
          },
        },
      } as any)
    }

    // Now send a summary that is older than the expected P20 cutoff; it should be dropped.
    const oldCapturedAt = new Date(Date.now() - 500 * 1000).toISOString()
    await generate({
      messages: [
        { role: "system", content: "SYS" },
        { role: "user", content: "Hello" },
      ],
      current_step: "generate_response",
      tools_needed: [],
      tool_results: {},
      workflow_config: {
        session_summary: {
          source: "client",
          captured_at: oldCapturedAt,
          summary_text: "This should be dropped by percentile default gating.",
        },
      },
    } as any)

    const messages = engine.lastArgs?.messages ?? []
    const userMessages = messages.filter((m: any) => m.role === "user").map((m: any) => String(m.content || ""))
    expect(userMessages.join("\n")).not.toContain("Session summary:")

    vi.useRealTimers()
  })
})
```

```ts
/**
 * Tests for allowlisted `control_context` serialization into user-side prompt blocks.
 */

import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest"
import { formatControlPlaneContextForPrompt } from "./graph.js"

describe("formatControlPlaneContextForPrompt", () => {
  it("returns undefined for invalid or empty control_context", () => {
    expect(formatControlPlaneContextForPrompt(undefined)).toBeUndefined()
    expect(formatControlPlaneContextForPrompt({ unexpected: 1 })).toBeUndefined()
    expect(formatControlPlaneContextForPrompt({ source: "unknown" })).toBeUndefined()
  })

  it("includes orchestration_state when present", () => {
    const text = formatControlPlaneContextForPrompt({
      source: "api-service",
      orchestration_state: { engagement_mode: "engineering_task" },
    })
    expect(text).toContain("orchestration_state")
    expect(text).toContain("engineering_task")
  })

  it("includes skip_wiki_prefetch only when true", () => {
    expect(formatControlPlaneContextForPrompt({ skip_wiki_prefetch: false })).toBeUndefined()
    const t = formatControlPlaneContextForPrompt({ skip_wiki_prefetch: true })
    expect(t).toContain('"skip_wiki_prefetch": true')
  })
})
```

```ts
import { Annotation, END, START, StateGraph } from "@langchain/langgraph"
import type { ToolDefinition } from "@xlotyl/open-multi-agent"
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import { formatOmaToolCatalogForContext } from "../oma/orchestration-tools.js"
import { LLMBackendError } from "../llm/manager.js"
import { OrchestrationEngine } from "../orchestration/engine.js"
import { resolveWorkflowModelRouting } from "../orchestration/runtime-router.js"
import type { ChatMessage } from "../tools/orchestration-gateway.js"
import { execFile } from "node:child_process"
import {
  getAvailableTools,
  getDomainData,
  resolveMcpDomainWeightsForWorkflow,
  searchKnowledgeBase,
  transcribeAudio,
} from "../tools/orchestration-gateway.js"
import { wikiOrchestrationListPages, wikiOrchestrationSearch } from "../tools/wiki-control-plane.js"
import {
  ASR_GATHER_NO_AUDIO_MESSAGE,
  API_BRAIN_OUTPUT_GUIDANCE_PREFIX,
  API_BRAIN_PACKET_GOAL,
  API_BRAIN_PACKET_TYPE,
  CONTEXT_LABEL_ASR_PREFIX,
  CONTEXT_LABEL_CLIENT_WORKFLOW,
  CONTEXT_LABEL_CONTROL_PLANE,
  CONTEXT_LABEL_RAG_PREFIX,
  CONTEXT_LABEL_REQUIRED_TOOL_RESULTS,
  CONTEXT_LABEL_OMA_TOOL_CATALOG,
  CONTEXT_LABEL_TOOL_REGISTRY,
  CONTEXT_LABEL_WIKI_PREFIX,
  CONTEXT_MERGE_HEADER,
  DEFAULT_API_BRAIN_TRIGGER_WORDS,
  FINAL_RESPONSE_ERROR_PREFIX,
  FINAL_RESPONSE_LLM_ERROR_PREFIX,
  GATHER_TOOL_ERROR_PREFIX,
  MCP_DOMAIN_DATA_LABEL_SUFFIX,
  WIKI_CONTEXT_ERROR_PREFIX,
  WIKI_GATHER_PATHS_PREFIX,
  WIKI_GATHER_SEARCH_PREFIX,
} from "./prompts/orchestration-chat.js"
import { resolveGatherUserText } from "./gather-user-message.js"
import { tryLlmGatherRouting } from "./routing-llm.js"
import {
  normalizeToolsNeededOverride,
  toolsFromGatherToolPlan,
} from "./routing.js"
import { budgetContextBlocks } from "./context-budget.js"
import {
  UserPreferencesSchema,
  SessionSummarySchema,
  WorkspaceSnapshotSchema,
  type UserPreferences,
  type SessionSummary,
  type WorkspaceSnapshot,
} from "./context-injection.schemas.js"
import { redactInjectedText, wrapUntrustedDataBlock } from "./context-injection.safety.js"
import {
  ControlPlaneContextSchema,
  SystemDirectivesSchema,
  type ControlPlaneContext,
  type SystemDirectives,
} from "./context-control.schemas.js"

const CONTEXT_LABEL_USER_PREFERENCES = "User preferences (effective):"
const CONTEXT_LABEL_WORKSPACE_SNAPSHOT = "Workspace snapshot:"
const CONTEXT_LABEL_SESSION_SUMMARY = "Session summary:"
const CONTEXT_LABEL_API_BRAIN_OUTPUT = "API brain output (internal):"
const MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS = 8_000
const TOTAL_CONTEXT_BUDGET_CHARS = 24_000
const RECENT_ACTIVITY_GIT_TIMEOUT_MS = 1500

type SessionSummaryAgeGateDecision =
  | { allow: true; reason: "explicit" | "p20_default" | "fallback_default" }
  | { allow: false; reason: "stale"; maxAgeSeconds: number; ageSeconds: number }

function truncateContextBlock(value: string, maxChars: number = MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS): string {
  if (value.length <= maxChars) return value
  return `${value.slice(0, maxChars)}\n...<truncated>`
}

function nowIsoString(): string {
  return new Date().toISOString()
}

function parseIsoToEpochMs(value: string | undefined): number | undefined {
  if (!value) return undefined
  const ms = Date.parse(value)
  if (!Number.isFinite(ms)) return undefined
  return ms
}

function percentile(sortedAsc: number[], p: number): number | undefined {
  if (sortedAsc.length === 0) return undefined
  const clamped = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, p))
  const rank = (clamped / 100) * (sortedAsc.length - 1)
  const lo = Math.floor(rank)
  const hi = Math.ceil(rank)
  const w = rank - lo
  const a = sortedAsc[lo]
  const b = sortedAsc[hi]
  if (a === undefined || b === undefined) return undefined
  return a + (b - a) * w
}

function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value))
}

function createSessionSummaryAgeStats(options?: {
  maxSamples?: number
  minSamplesForPercentile?: number
}): {
  observeAgeSeconds: (ageSeconds: number) => void
  p20Seconds: () => number | undefined
} {
  const maxSamples = options?.maxSamples ?? 200
  const minSamplesForPercentile = options?.minSamplesForPercentile ?? 20
  const ages: number[] = []

  return {
    observeAgeSeconds(ageSeconds) {
      if (!Number.isFinite(ageSeconds) || ageSeconds < 0) return
      ages.push(ageSeconds)
      if (ages.length > maxSamples) ages.splice(0, ages.length - maxSamples)
    },
    p20Seconds() {
      if (ages.length < minSamplesForPercentile) return undefined
      const sorted = [...ages].sort((a, b) => a - b)
      const p20 = percentile(sorted, 20)
      return p20 === undefined ? undefined : p20
    },
  }
}

function decideSessionSummaryAgeGate(args: {
  nowEpochMs: number
  capturedAt: string | undefined
  explicitMaxAgeSeconds: number | undefined
  defaultP20MaxAgeSeconds: number | undefined
  fallbackDefaultMaxAgeSeconds: number
}): SessionSummaryAgeGateDecision {
  const capturedMs = parseIsoToEpochMs(args.capturedAt)
  if (capturedMs === undefined) {
    // Timestamp missing/invalid: treat as fresh (injected through untrusted lane),
    // but callers must provide a real captured_at if they want percentile-based defaults to apply.
    return { allow: true, reason: "fallback_default" }
  }

  const ageSeconds = Math.max(0, Math.floor((args.nowEpochMs - capturedMs) / 1000))
  const unclampedMax =
    args.explicitMaxAgeSeconds ?? args.defaultP20MaxAgeSeconds ?? args.fallbackDefaultMaxAgeSeconds
  // Hard clamps so a pathological distribution cannot make the gate nonsensical.
  const maxAgeSeconds = clamp(unclampedMax, 60, 60 * 60 * 24)

  if (ageSeconds > maxAgeSeconds) {
    return { allow: false, reason: "stale", maxAgeSeconds, ageSeconds }
  }
  return {
    allow: true,
    reason:
      args.explicitMaxAgeSeconds !== undefined
        ? "explicit"
        : args.defaultP20MaxAgeSeconds !== undefined
          ? "p20_default"
          : "fallback_default",
  }
}

function extractControlPlaneContext(value: unknown): ControlPlaneContext | undefined {
  const parsed = ControlPlaneContextSchema.safeParse(value)
  if (!parsed.success) return undefined
  if (!parsed.data.captured_at) return { ...parsed.data, captured_at: nowIsoString() }
  return parsed.data
}

function extractSystemDirectives(wc: Record<string, unknown>): SystemDirectives | undefined {
  const raw = (wc.system_directives as unknown) ?? (wc.systemDirectives as unknown)
  const parsed = SystemDirectivesSchema.safeParse(raw)
  if (!parsed.success) return undefined
  if (!parsed.data.captured_at) return { ...parsed.data, captured_at: nowIsoString() }
  return parsed.data
}

function extractInjectedPreferences(wc: Record<string, unknown>): UserPreferences | undefined {
  const raw =
    (wc.user_preferences as unknown) ??
    (wc.userPreferences as unknown) ??
    (wc.preferences as unknown)
  const parsed = UserPreferencesSchema.safeParse(raw)
  if (!parsed.success) return undefined
  if (!parsed.data.captured_at) {
    return { ...parsed.data, captured_at: nowIsoString() }
  }
  return parsed.data
}

function extractWorkspaceSnapshot(wc: Record<string, unknown>): WorkspaceSnapshot | undefined {
  const raw =
    (wc.workspace_snapshot as unknown) ??
    (wc.workspaceSnapshot as unknown) ??
    (wc.workspace as unknown)
  const parsed = WorkspaceSnapshotSchema.safeParse(raw)
  if (!parsed.success) return undefined
  if (!parsed.data.captured_at) {
    return { ...parsed.data, captured_at: nowIsoString() }
  }
  return parsed.data
}

function extractSessionSummary(wc: Record<string, unknown>): SessionSummary | undefined {
  const raw = (wc.session_summary as unknown) ?? (wc.sessionSummary as unknown)
  const parsed = SessionSummarySchema.safeParse(raw)
  if (!parsed.success) return undefined
  if (!parsed.data.captured_at) {
    return { ...parsed.data, captured_at: nowIsoString() }
  }
  return parsed.data
}

function execFileAsync(
  command: string,
  args: string[],
  options?: { timeoutMs?: number },
): Promise<{ stdout: string; stderr: string }> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    execFile(
      command,
      args,
      { timeout: options?.timeoutMs },
      (err, stdout, stderr) => {
        if (err) {
          reject(err)
          return
        }
        resolve({ stdout: String(stdout ?? ""), stderr: String(stderr ?? "") })
      },
    )
  })
}

function parseGitStatusRecentFilesChanged(gitStatusShort: string): string[] {
  const out: string[] = []
  const seen = new Set<string>()
  const lines = gitStatusShort.split(/\r?\n/)
  for (const line of lines) {
    // Example porcelain v1:
    // " M path/to/file"
    // "R  old -> new"
    // "?? newfile"
    const trimmed = line.trimEnd()
    if (!trimmed || trimmed.startsWith("##")) continue
    const maybePath = trimmed.slice(2).trim()
    if (!maybePath) continue
    const pathPart = maybePath.includes(" -> ") ? maybePath.split(" -> ").at(-1)?.trim() : maybePath
    const finalPath = (pathPart ?? "").trim()
    if (!finalPath || seen.has(finalPath)) continue
    seen.add(finalPath)
    out.push(finalPath)
    if (out.length >= 200) break
  }
  return out
}

async function tryFillWorkspaceRecentActivity(snapshot: WorkspaceSnapshot): Promise<WorkspaceSnapshot> {
  const repoRoot = snapshot.repo_root?.trim() || snapshot.worktree_path?.trim()
  if (!repoRoot) return snapshot

  const needsGitStatus = !snapshot.git_status_short?.trim()
  const needsRecentFiles = !snapshot.recent_files_changed || snapshot.recent_files_changed.length === 0
  if (!needsGitStatus && !needsRecentFiles) return snapshot

  try {
    const { stdout } = await execFileAsync(
      "git",
      ["-C", repoRoot, "status", "--porcelain=v1", "-b"],
      { timeoutMs: RECENT_ACTIVITY_GIT_TIMEOUT_MS },
    )
    const gitStatusShort = stdout.trim().slice(0, 32_000)
    const recentFiles = parseGitStatusRecentFilesChanged(gitStatusShort)
    const next: WorkspaceSnapshot = {
      ...snapshot,
      source: "agent-platform",
      captured_at: snapshot.captured_at ?? nowIsoString(),
      ...(needsGitStatus ? { git_status_short: gitStatusShort } : {}),
      ...(needsRecentFiles ? { recent_files_changed: recentFiles } : {}),
    }
    return next
  } catch {
    return snapshot
  }
}

export const WorkflowAnnotation = Annotation.Root({
  messages: Annotation<ChatMessage[]>(),
  current_step: Annotation<string>(),
  tools_needed: Annotation<string[]>(),
  rag_results: Annotation<string | undefined>(),
  asr_results: Annotation<string | undefined>(),
  required_tool_results: Annotation<unknown[] | undefined>(),
  tool_results: Annotation<Record<string, string>>({
    reducer: (left, right) => ({ ...left, ...right }),
    default: () => ({}),
  }),
  workflow_config: Annotation<Record<string, unknown> | undefined>(),
  escalation_count: Annotation<number>({
    reducer: (_left, right) => right,
    default: () => 0,
  }),
  api_brain_packet: Annotation<string | undefined>(),
  api_brain_output: Annotation<string | undefined>(),
  /** Orchestration wiki paths + search hits (same HTTP surface as operators). */
  wiki_context: Annotation<string | undefined>(),
  /**
   * Optional `input_data.context` from workflow execute (parity with engineering_workflow).
   * Passed through to prompts / downstream nodes; **does not** by itself suppress wiki prefetch.
   */
  client_context: Annotation<unknown | undefined>(),
  /** Allowlisted control-plane context (may influence orchestration decisions). */
  control_context: Annotation<unknown | undefined>(),
  /**
   * Base64 audio for gather when `tools_needed` includes `asr` (`input_data.asr_audio_base64` or POST /chat).
   * Without this, ASR gather records a skip message; use OMA tool `transcribe_audio` when audio is available in tool mode.
   */
  asr_audio_base64: Annotation<string | undefined>(),
  /** Optional top-level system prompt (POST /chat or workflow execute); merged like runSimpleChat. */
  system_prompt: Annotation<string | undefined>(),
  /** Populated when workflow_config enables OMA tool loop (oma_tool_mode full). */
  oma_tool_calls: Annotation<unknown[] | undefined>(),
  /** Per-run abort signal supplied by the HTTP workflow runner. */
  abort_signal: Annotation<AbortSignal | undefined>(),
  /** Bounded operational trace recorder supplied by the HTTP workflow runner. */
  trace_recorder: Annotation<((event: WorkflowTraceInput) => void) | undefined>(),
  final_response: Annotation<string | undefined>(),
})

export type WorkflowStateType = typeof WorkflowAnnotation.State

export type WorkflowTraceInput = {
  type: string
  node?: string
  message?: string
  details?: Record<string, unknown>
}

function recordTrace(state: WorkflowStateType, event: WorkflowTraceInput): void {
  state.trace_recorder?.(event)
}

function throwIfAborted(state: WorkflowStateType): void {
  if (state.abort_signal?.aborted) {
    throw new DOMException("Workflow run cancelled.", "AbortError")
  }
}

function tracedNode(
  node: string,
  fn: (state: WorkflowStateType) => Promise<Partial<WorkflowStateType>>,
): (state: WorkflowStateType) => Promise<Partial<WorkflowStateType>> {
  return async (state) => {
    throwIfAborted(state)
    recordTrace(state, { type: "node.started", node })
    try {
      const result = await fn(state)
      throwIfAborted(state)
      recordTrace(state, {
        type: "node.completed",
        node,
        details: {
          current_step: result.current_step ?? state.current_step,
          output_keys: Object.keys(result),
        },
      })
      return result
    } catch (error) {
      recordTrace(state, {
        type: "node.failed",
        node,
        message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      })
      throw error
    }
  }
}

export function shouldSkipWikiPrefetch(controlContext: unknown): boolean {
  const parsed = extractControlPlaneContext(controlContext)
  if (!parsed) return false
  return parsed.skip_wiki_prefetch === true
}

/** Explicit wiki prefetch policy in `workflow_config` (ADR 0005). Invalid values → `"auto"`. */
export type WikiPrefetchMode = "auto" | "always" | "never"

export function resolveWikiPrefetchMode(wc: Record<string, unknown>): WikiPrefetchMode {
  const raw = wc.wiki_prefetch
  if (raw === "always" || raw === "never" || raw === "auto") return raw
  return "auto"
}

/**
 * Whether the graph should route through `gather_context` for wiki-style prefetch work
 * (wiki HTTP + empty `tools_needed` gather pass) when `tools_needed` is empty.
 */
export function wikiPrefetchPolicyWantsGatherPass(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  wc: Record<string, unknown>,
  controlContext: unknown,
  hasUserMessage: boolean,
): boolean {
  if (!hasUserMessage) return false
  if (shouldSkipWikiPrefetch(controlContext)) return false
  const mode = resolveWikiPrefetchMode(wc)
  if (mode === "never") return false
  if (mode === "always") return true
  return Boolean(cfg.orchestratorApiUrl?.trim())
}

/** Whether gather should run wiki list/search HTTP calls (may still yield `not_configured` without URL). */
export function shouldRunWikiHttpPrefetch(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  wc: Record<string, unknown>,
  userMessage: string,
  controlContext: unknown,
): boolean {
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return false
  if (shouldSkipWikiPrefetch(controlContext)) return false
  const mode = resolveWikiPrefetchMode(wc)
  if (mode === "never") return false
  if (mode === "always") return true
  return Boolean(cfg.orchestratorApiUrl?.trim())
}

/**
 * Serialize allowlisted `control_context` fields for model-visible **user** context blocks.
 * Invalid payloads return `undefined` (same as missing). Omits empty shells so we do not
 * spam the transcript with `{}`.
 */
export function formatControlPlaneContextForPrompt(controlContext: unknown): string | undefined {
  const parsed = extractControlPlaneContext(controlContext)
  if (!parsed) return undefined
  const out: Record<string, unknown> = {}
  if (parsed.source && parsed.source !== "unknown") {
    out.source = parsed.source
  }
  if (parsed.version) {
    out.version = parsed.version
  }
  if (parsed.engineering_session_id) {
    out.engineering_session_id = parsed.engineering_session_id
  }
  if (parsed.skip_wiki_prefetch === true) {
    out.skip_wiki_prefetch = true
  }
  if (parsed.orchestration_state && Object.keys(parsed.orchestration_state).length > 0) {
    out.orchestration_state = parsed.orchestration_state
  }
  if (Object.keys(out).length === 0) return undefined
  return JSON.stringify(out, null, 2)
}

function isOmaToolModeFull(wc: Record<string, unknown>): boolean {
  return wc.oma_tool_mode === "full" || wc.use_oma_tools === true
}

function shouldInjectOmaToolCatalog(wc: Record<string, unknown>, omaFull: boolean): boolean {
  if (wc.inject_tool_catalog === false) return false
  if (wc.inject_tool_catalog === true) return true
  return omaFull
}

function resolveOmaToolNames(wc: Record<string, unknown>, omaTools: readonly ToolDefinition[]): string[] {
  const allNames = omaTools.map((t) => t.name)
  const set = new Set(allNames)
  const raw = wc.oma_tool_names
  if (Array.isArray(raw) && raw.length > 0 && raw.every((x) => typeof x === "string")) {
    const filtered = (raw as string[]).filter((n) => set.has(n))
    if (filtered.length > 0) return filtered
  }
  return [...allNames]
}

function resolveOmaMaxTurns(wc: Record<string, unknown>): number {
  if (typeof wc.oma_max_turns === "number" && wc.oma_max_turns > 0) {
    return Math.min(32, Math.floor(wc.oma_max_turns))
  }
  const env = Number(process.env.OMA_ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_CHAT_MAX_TURNS)
  if (Number.isFinite(env) && env > 0) return Math.min(32, Math.floor(env))
  return 6
}

export function buildAnalyzeRequest(cfg: PlatformConfig, engine: OrchestrationEngine) {
  return async function analyzeRequest(
    state: WorkflowStateType,
  ): Promise<Partial<WorkflowStateType>> {
    throwIfAborted(state)
    const wc = state.workflow_config ?? {}

    let tools_needed: string[] | undefined
    let routingSource = "default_empty"

    if ("tools_needed_override" in wc) {
      const normalized = normalizeToolsNeededOverride(wc.tools_needed_override)
      if (normalized !== undefined) {
        tools_needed = normalized
        routingSource = "tools_needed_override"
      }
    }

    if (tools_needed === undefined && wc.gather_tool_plan && typeof wc.gather_tool_plan === "object") {
      const plan = wc.gather_tool_plan as { rag?: boolean; asr?: boolean; mcp_domains?: string[] }
      tools_needed = toolsFromGatherToolPlan(plan)
      routingSource = "gather_tool_plan"
    }

    if (tools_needed === undefined && process.env.ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM === "1") {
      const routed = await tryLlmGatherRouting(cfg, state, engine)
      if (routed !== undefined) {
        tools_needed = routed
        routingSource = "routing_llm"
      }
    }

    if (tools_needed === undefined) {
      tools_needed = []
    }

    const currentStep = tools_needed.length > 0 ? "gather_context" : "generate_response"
    recordTrace(state, {
      type: "routing.gather_tools",
      node: "analyze",
      details: {
        source: routingSource,
        tools_needed,
        next_step: currentStep,
      },
    })

    return {
      tools_needed,
      current_step: currentStep,
    }
  }
}

export function buildGatherContext(cfg: PlatformConfig) {
  return async function gatherContext(
    state: WorkflowStateType,
  ): Promise<Partial<WorkflowStateType>> {
    throwIfAborted(state)
    const messages = state.messages
    const wc = state.workflow_config ?? {}
    const userMessage = resolveGatherUserText(messages)
    const domainWeights = resolveMcpDomainWeightsForWorkflow(wc, messages)
    const tool_results: Record<string, string> = { ...state.tool_results }
    let rag_results: string | undefined = state.rag_results
    let asr_results: string | undefined = state.asr_results

    for (const toolName of state.tools_needed) {
      try {
        throwIfAborted(state)
        recordTrace(state, {
          type: "tool.started",
          node: "gather_context",
          details: { tool_name: toolName },
        })
        if (toolName === "rag_search") {
          const result = await searchKnowledgeBase(cfg, userMessage, domainWeights)
          rag_results = result
          tool_results.rag = result
        } else if (toolName === "asr") {
          const raw = state.asr_audio_base64?.trim()
          const result =
            raw && raw.length > 0
              ? await transcribeAudio(cfg, raw)
              : ASR_GATHER_NO_AUDIO_MESSAGE
          asr_results = result
          tool_results.asr = result
        } else if (toolName.startsWith("mcp_")) {
          const domain = toolName.split("_")[1]!
          const result = await getDomainData(cfg, domain, userMessage)
          tool_results[`mcp_${domain}`] = result
        }
        recordTrace(state, {
          type: "tool.completed",
          node: "gather_context",
          details: { tool_name: toolName },
        })
      } catch (e) {
        tool_results[toolName] =
          `${GATHER_TOOL_ERROR_PREFIX} ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`
        recordTrace(state, {
          type: "tool.failed",
          node: "gather_context",
          details: { tool_name: toolName },
          message: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
        })
      }
    }

    let wiki_context: string | undefined
    const runWikiPrefetch = shouldRunWikiHttpPrefetch(cfg, wc, userMessage, state.control_context)
    recordTrace(state, {
      type: runWikiPrefetch ? "wiki_prefetch.started" : "wiki_prefetch.skipped",
      node: "gather_context",
      details: {
        mode: resolveWikiPrefetchMode(wc),
        has_user_message: Boolean(userMessage.trim()),
        control_skip: shouldSkipWikiPrefetch(state.control_context),
      },
    })
    if (runWikiPrefetch) {
      try {
        const pages = await wikiOrchestrationListPages(cfg)
        const search = await wikiOrchestrationSearch(cfg, userMessage.slice(0, 500))
        const parts: string[] = []
        if (!pages.startsWith("wiki_control_plane_not_configured")) {
          parts.push(`${WIKI_GATHER_PATHS_PREFIX}${pages.slice(0, 12_000)}`)
        }
        if (!search.startsWith("wiki_control_plane_not_configured")) {
          parts.push(`${WIKI_GATHER_SEARCH_PREFIX}${search.slice(0, 12_000)}`)
        }
        wiki_context = parts.length > 0 ? parts.join("\n\n") : undefined
        recordTrace(state, {
          type: "wiki_prefetch.completed",
          node: "gather_context",
          details: { block_count: parts.length },
        })
      } catch (e) {
        wiki_context = `${WIKI_CONTEXT_ERROR_PREFIX} ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`
        recordTrace(state, {
          type: "wiki_prefetch.failed",
          node: "gather_context",
          message: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
        })
      }
    }

    return {
      rag_results,
      asr_results,
      tool_results,
      wiki_context,
      current_step: "generate_response",
    }
  }
}

/**
 * API-brain escalation: uses **last user message** + optional `api_brain_triggers` in
 * `workflow_config` (no substring scan of system messages).
 */
export function shouldEscalateToApiBrain(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  state: WorkflowStateType,
): { escalate: boolean; reason: string } {
  const wc = state.workflow_config ?? {}
  const allow = wc.allow_api_brain === true || wc.reasoning_tier === "api_brain"
  if (!cfg.apiBrainEnabled || !allow) {
    return { escalate: false, reason: "disabled_or_not_allowed" }
  }
  if (state.escalation_count >= cfg.apiBrainMaxEscalationsPerTask) {
    return { escalate: false, reason: "budget_exhausted" }
  }

  const mode = wc.api_brain_escalation
  if (mode === "never") {
    return { escalate: false, reason: "policy_never" }
  }
  if (mode === "always") {
    return { escalate: true, reason: "policy_always" }
  }

  const messages = state.messages ?? []
  const lastUser = resolveGatherUserText(messages)
  const lower = lastUser.toLowerCase()

  const customTriggers = wc.api_brain_triggers
  const triggers =
    Array.isArray(customTriggers) && customTriggers.every((t) => typeof t === "string")
      ? (customTriggers as string[])
      : [...DEFAULT_API_BRAIN_TRIGGER_WORDS]

  const hit = triggers.some((t) => lower.includes(t.toLowerCase()))
  return { escalate: hit, reason: hit ? "heuristic_trigger" : "no_trigger" }
}

export function buildApiBrainPacket(state: WorkflowStateType): string {
  const messages = state.messages ?? []
  const lastUser = resolveGatherUserText(messages)
  const toolResults = state.tool_results ?? {}
  const requiredToolResults = state.required_tool_results ?? []

  const packet = {
    type: API_BRAIN_PACKET_TYPE,
    goal: API_BRAIN_PACKET_GOAL,
    user_message: lastUser.slice(0, 4000),
    tool_results: toolResults,
    required_tool_results: requiredToolResults,
    notes: {
      current_step: state.current_step,
    },
  }
  return JSON.stringify(packet, null, 2)
}

export function buildGenerateResponse(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  engine: OrchestrationEngine,
  omaTools: readonly ToolDefinition[],
) {
  // Session summary default max age: computed from a rolling window of observed ages (P20),
  // excluding inferred timestamps (missing captured_at) to avoid collapsing the distribution toward "now".
  const sessionSummaryAgeStats = createSessionSummaryAgeStats()

  return async function generateResponse(
    state: WorkflowStateType,
  ): Promise<Partial<WorkflowStateType>> {
    throwIfAborted(state)
    const wc = state.workflow_config ?? {}
    const omaFull = isOmaToolModeFull(wc)
    const systemContextParts: string[] = []
    const userContextParts: string[] = []

    const injectedPreferences = extractInjectedPreferences(wc)
    if (injectedPreferences) {
      userContextParts.push(
        wrapUntrustedDataBlock({
          label: CONTEXT_LABEL_USER_PREFERENCES,
          text: JSON.stringify(injectedPreferences, null, 2),
          maxChars: MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS,
        }),
      )
    }

    const rawSessionSummary = (wc.session_summary as unknown) ?? (wc.sessionSummary as unknown)
    const rawSessionSummaryCapturedAt =
      rawSessionSummary && typeof rawSessionSummary === "object" && !Array.isArray(rawSessionSummary)
        ? (rawSessionSummary as { captured_at?: unknown }).captured_at
        : undefined
    const rawCapturedAtString = typeof rawSessionSummaryCapturedAt === "string" ? rawSessionSummaryCapturedAt : undefined

    const sessionSummary = extractSessionSummary(wc)
    const sessionSummaryHasRealCapturedAt = parseIsoToEpochMs(rawCapturedAtString) !== undefined

    if (sessionSummary?.summary_text?.trim()) {
      const nowEpochMs = Date.now()
      const capturedAt = sessionSummary.captured_at

      if (sessionSummaryHasRealCapturedAt && capturedAt) {
        const capturedMs = parseIsoToEpochMs(capturedAt)
        if (capturedMs !== undefined) {
          const ageSeconds = Math.max(0, Math.floor((nowEpochMs - capturedMs) / 1000))
          sessionSummaryAgeStats.observeAgeSeconds(ageSeconds)
        }
      }

      const defaultP20MaxAgeSeconds = sessionSummaryAgeStats.p20Seconds()
      const ageGate = decideSessionSummaryAgeGate({
        nowEpochMs,
        capturedAt,
        explicitMaxAgeSeconds: sessionSummary.max_age_seconds,
        defaultP20MaxAgeSeconds,
        fallbackDefaultMaxAgeSeconds: 6 * 60 * 60,
      })

      if (!ageGate.allow) {
        // Drop stale summaries quietly — they are optional best-effort continuity context.
        recordTrace(state, {
          type: "context.session_summary_dropped",
          node: "generate_response",
          details: {
            reason: ageGate.reason,
            max_age_seconds: ageGate.maxAgeSeconds,
            age_seconds: ageGate.ageSeconds,
          },
        })
      } else {
      userContextParts.push(
          wrapUntrustedDataBlock({
            label: CONTEXT_LABEL_SESSION_SUMMARY,
            text: JSON.stringify(sessionSummary, null, 2),
            maxChars: MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS,
          }),
        )
      }
    }

    const extractedWorkspaceSnapshot = extractWorkspaceSnapshot(wc)
    const workspaceSnapshot = extractedWorkspaceSnapshot
      ? await tryFillWorkspaceRecentActivity(extractedWorkspaceSnapshot)
      : undefined
    if (workspaceSnapshot) {
      userContextParts.push(
        wrapUntrustedDataBlock({
          label: CONTEXT_LABEL_WORKSPACE_SNAPSHOT,
          text: JSON.stringify(workspaceSnapshot, null, 2),
          maxChars: MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS,
        }),
      )
    }

    // SECURITY: caller-controlled or externally-derived context must not be merged into `role: system`.
    if (state.client_context !== undefined && state.client_context !== null) {
      const serialized =
        typeof state.client_context === "string"
          ? state.client_context
          : JSON.stringify(state.client_context, null, 2)
      if (serialized.trim().length > 0) {
        userContextParts.push(
          wrapUntrustedDataBlock({
            label: CONTEXT_LABEL_CLIENT_WORKFLOW,
            text: serialized,
            maxChars: MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS,
          }),
        )
      }
    }

    const controlPlaneText = formatControlPlaneContextForPrompt(state.control_context)
    if (controlPlaneText?.trim()) {
      userContextParts.push(
        wrapUntrustedDataBlock({
          label: CONTEXT_LABEL_CONTROL_PLANE,
          text: controlPlaneText,
          maxChars: MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS,
        }),
      )
    }

    if (state.wiki_context) {
      userContextParts.push(
        wrapUntrustedDataBlock({
          label: CONTEXT_LABEL_WIKI_PREFIX,
          text: state.wiki_context,
          maxChars: MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS,
        }),
      )
    }
    if (state.rag_results) {
      userContextParts.push(
        wrapUntrustedDataBlock({
          label: CONTEXT_LABEL_RAG_PREFIX,
          text: state.rag_results,
          maxChars: MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS,
        }),
      )
    }
    if (state.asr_results) {
      userContextParts.push(
        wrapUntrustedDataBlock({
          label: CONTEXT_LABEL_ASR_PREFIX,
          text: state.asr_results,
          maxChars: MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS,
        }),
      )
    }
    if (state.required_tool_results && state.required_tool_results.length > 0) {
      userContextParts.push(
        wrapUntrustedDataBlock({
          label: CONTEXT_LABEL_REQUIRED_TOOL_RESULTS,
          text: JSON.stringify(state.required_tool_results, null, 2),
          maxChars: MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS,
        }),
      )
    }
    for (const [toolName, result] of Object.entries(state.tool_results)) {
      if (toolName.startsWith("mcp_")) {
        const domain = toolName.replace("mcp_", "")
        userContextParts.push(
          wrapUntrustedDataBlock({
            label: `${domain.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + domain.slice(1)} ${MCP_DOMAIN_DATA_LABEL_SUFFIX}`,
            text: result,
            maxChars: MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS,
          }),
        )
      }
    }

    const systemDirectives = extractSystemDirectives(wc)
    if (systemDirectives) {
      systemContextParts.push(`System directives (allowlisted):\n${JSON.stringify(systemDirectives, null, 2)}`)
    }

    if (state.api_brain_output) {
      const labeled = `${API_BRAIN_OUTPUT_GUIDANCE_PREFIX}\n\n${state.api_brain_output}`
      systemContextParts.push(
        `${CONTEXT_LABEL_API_BRAIN_OUTPUT}\n${truncateContextBlock(redactInjectedText(labeled), 8_000)}`,
      )
    }

    try {
      const registryTools = await getAvailableTools(cfg)
      if (registryTools.length > 0) {
        const names = registryTools
          .map((t) => String((t as { name?: string }).name ?? (t as { tool_name?: string }).tool_name ?? ""))
          .filter(Boolean)
          .slice(0, 48)
        if (names.length > 0) {
          systemContextParts.push(`${CONTEXT_LABEL_TOOL_REGISTRY} ${names.join(", ")}`)
        }
      }
    } catch {
      /* optional */
    }

    if (shouldInjectOmaToolCatalog(wc, omaFull) && omaTools.length > 0) {
      systemContextParts.push(
        `${CONTEXT_LABEL_OMA_TOOL_CATALOG}\n${formatOmaToolCatalogForContext(omaTools)}`,
      )
    }

    let enhancedMessages = [...state.messages]

    const budgetedSystem = budgetContextBlocks({
      blocks: [
        ...systemContextParts
          .map((text, index) => {
            const priority = text.startsWith("System directives (allowlisted):")
              ? 10
              : text.startsWith(CONTEXT_LABEL_API_BRAIN_OUTPUT)
                ? 12
              : text.startsWith(CONTEXT_LABEL_TOOL_REGISTRY)
                ? 60
                : text.startsWith(CONTEXT_LABEL_OMA_TOOL_CATALOG)
                  ? 70
                  : 50
            return {
              id: `system_${index}`,
              label: "system_context_part",
              priority,
              text,
            }
          }),
      ].filter((b) => b.text.trim().length > 0),
      totalMaxChars: TOTAL_CONTEXT_BUDGET_CHARS,
    })

    const budgetedUser = budgetContextBlocks({
      blocks: userContextParts.map((text, index) => ({
        id: `user_${index}`,
        label: "untrusted_context_part",
        priority: text.startsWith("Context (User preferences") ? 40 : 50,
        text,
        maxChars: MAX_CONTEXT_BLOCK_CHARS,
      })),
      totalMaxChars: 8_000,
    })

    recordTrace(state, {
      type: "context.budget",
      node: "generate_response",
      details: {
        system_included: budgetedSystem.included.length,
        system_dropped: budgetedSystem.dropped.length,
        system_truncated: budgetedSystem.included.filter((b) => b.truncated).length,
        user_included: budgetedUser.included.length,
        user_dropped: budgetedUser.dropped.length,
        user_truncated: budgetedUser.included.filter((b) => b.truncated).length,
      },
    })

    const mergedSystemContext =
      budgetedSystem.included.length > 0
        ? budgetedSystem.included.map((b) => b.text).join("\n\n")
        : ""

    if (mergedSystemContext) {
      const sysIdx = enhancedMessages.findIndex((m) => m.role === "system")
      if (sysIdx >= 0) {
        const prev = enhancedMessages[sysIdx]!
        enhancedMessages[sysIdx] = {
          role: "system",
          content: `${prev.content}\n\n${CONTEXT_MERGE_HEADER}\n${mergedSystemContext}`,
        }
      } else {
        enhancedMessages = [
          { role: "system", content: `${CONTEXT_MERGE_HEADER}\n${mergedSystemContext}` },
          ...enhancedMessages,
        ]
      }
    }

    if (budgetedUser.included.length > 0) {
      const injectedUserContext: ChatMessage = {
        role: "user",
        content: budgetedUser.included.map((b) => b.text).join("\n\n"),
      }
      const firstUserIdx = enhancedMessages.findIndex((m) => m.role === "user")
      if (firstUserIdx >= 0) {
        enhancedMessages = [
          ...enhancedMessages.slice(0, firstUserIdx),
          injectedUserContext,
          ...enhancedMessages.slice(firstUserIdx),
        ]
      } else {
        enhancedMessages = [injectedUserContext, ...enhancedMessages]
      }
    }

    try {
      const routing = resolveWorkflowModelRouting(cfg, {}, state.workflow_config ?? {})
      recordTrace(state, {
        type: "routing.model",
        node: "generate_response",
        details: {
          model: routing.model,
          provider: routing.provider,
          base_url_configured: Boolean(routing.baseURL),
          api_key_configured: Boolean(routing.apiKey),
          oma_tool_mode: omaFull ? "full" : "off",
        },
      })
      if (omaFull) {
        const toolNames = resolveOmaToolNames(wc, omaTools)
        const maxTurns = resolveOmaMaxTurns(wc)
        const result = await engine.runSimpleChat({
          messages: enhancedMessages,
          systemPrompt: state.system_prompt?.trim() || undefined,
          extraTools: [...omaTools],
          toolNames,
          maxTurns,
          temperature: routing.temperature ?? 0.7,
          maxTokens: routing.maxTokens ?? 1000,
          model: routing.model,
          provider: routing.provider,
          baseURL: routing.baseURL,
          apiKey: routing.apiKey,
          abortSignal: state.abort_signal,
        })
        recordTrace(state, {
          type: "oma.tool_calls",
          node: "generate_response",
          details: { count: result.toolCalls?.length ?? 0 },
        })
        return {
          final_response: result.output,
          oma_tool_calls: result.toolCalls ?? [],
          current_step: "complete",
        }
      }
      const result = await engine.runSimpleChat({
        messages: enhancedMessages,
        systemPrompt: state.system_prompt?.trim() || undefined,
        temperature: routing.temperature ?? 0.7,
        maxTokens: routing.maxTokens ?? 1000,
        model: routing.model,
        provider: routing.provider,
        baseURL: routing.baseURL,
        apiKey: routing.apiKey,
        abortSignal: state.abort_signal,
      })
      return {
        final_response: result.output,
        oma_tool_calls: undefined,
        current_step: "complete",
      }
    } catch (e) {
      const msg =
        e instanceof LLMBackendError
          ? `${FINAL_RESPONSE_LLM_ERROR_PREFIX} ${e.message}`
          : `${FINAL_RESPONSE_ERROR_PREFIX} ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`
      return { final_response: msg, current_step: "complete" }
    }
  }
}

export function createChatWorkflow(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  engine: OrchestrationEngine,
  apiBrainCall?: (packet: string) => Promise<string>,
  omaTools: readonly ToolDefinition[] = [],
) {
  const analyzeRequest = buildAnalyzeRequest(cfg, engine)
  const gatherContext = buildGatherContext(cfg)
  const generateResponse = buildGenerateResponse(cfg, engine, omaTools)

  const decideEscalation = async (
    state: WorkflowStateType,
  ): Promise<Partial<WorkflowStateType>> => {
    throwIfAborted(state)
    const decision = shouldEscalateToApiBrain(cfg, state)
    recordTrace(state, {
      type: "api_brain.decision",
      node: "decide_escalation",
      details: decision,
    })
    if (!decision.escalate || !apiBrainCall) {
      return { current_step: state.tools_needed.length > 0 ? "gather_context" : "generate_response" }
    }
    const packet = buildApiBrainPacket(state)
    const output = await apiBrainCall(packet)
    return {
      api_brain_packet: packet,
      api_brain_output: output,
      escalation_count: state.escalation_count + 1,
      current_step: state.tools_needed.length > 0 ? "gather_context" : "generate_response",
    }
  }

  const graph = new StateGraph(WorkflowAnnotation)
    .addNode("analyze", tracedNode("analyze", analyzeRequest))
    .addNode("decide_escalation", tracedNode("decide_escalation", decideEscalation))
    .addNode("gather_context", tracedNode("gather_context", gatherContext))
    .addNode("generate_response", tracedNode("generate_response", generateResponse))
    .addEdge(START, "analyze")
    .addEdge("analyze", "decide_escalation")
    .addConditionalEdges("decide_escalation", (s) => {
      const hasUser = s.messages.some((m) => m.role === "user" && m.content.trim().length > 0)
      const wc = s.workflow_config ?? {}
      const needGather =
        s.tools_needed.length > 0 ||
        wikiPrefetchPolicyWantsGatherPass(cfg, wc, s.control_context, hasUser)
      return needGather ? "gather_context" : "generate_response"
    })
    .addEdge("gather_context", "generate_response")
    .addEdge("generate_response", END)

  return graph.compile()
}
```

```ts
/**
 * Wiki-prefetch gating tests.
 *
 * Wiki prefetch suppression must be an explicit allowlisted control-plane flag,
 * not an emergent property of caller-supplied untrusted context.
 */
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest"
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import {
  resolveWikiPrefetchMode,
  shouldRunWikiHttpPrefetch,
  shouldSkipWikiPrefetch,
  wikiPrefetchPolicyWantsGatherPass,
} from "./graph.js"

function cfgWithOrchestrator(url: string): PlatformConfig {
  return {
    ragUrl: "http://rag",
    asrUrl: "http://asr",
    mcpUrl: "http://mcp",
    toolRegistryUrl: "http://tools",
    llmRunnerUrl: "http://llm",
    llmBackend: "mock",
    ollamaModel: "x",
    vllmModel: "x",
    huggingfaceModel: "hf-model",
    huggingfaceBaseUrl: "https://router.huggingface.co/v1",
    huggingfaceApiKey: undefined,
    apiBrainEnabled: false,
    apiBrainMaxEscalationsPerTask: 0,
    apiBrainProvider: "openai",
    apiBrainModel: "x",
    orchestrationDefaultModel: "mock-llm",
    orchestrationDefaultProvider: "openai",
    orchestrationDefaultBaseUrl: undefined,
    orchestrationDefaultApiKey: undefined,
    orchestrationMaxTokenBudget: undefined,
    orchestratorApiUrl: url,
    modelRuntimeBaseUrl: "",
    structureGatewayUrl: "",
    mcpRegistryBaseUrl: "",
    clawCodeBinary: "claw",
    clawCodeModel: undefined,
    clawCodeTrustedRoots: [],
    clawCodePollIntervalMs: 10,
    clawCodeTimeoutMs: 200,
    clawCodeMaxConcurrentLanes: 1,
    agentPlatformBaseUrl: "http://agent-platform",
    enableContainerGuiActTool: false,
    omaCatalogProfile: "full",
    omaToolPreset: "primitive",
  }
}

describe("shouldSkipWikiPrefetch", () => {
  it("defaults to false for missing control context", () => {
    expect(shouldSkipWikiPrefetch(undefined)).toBe(false)
  })

  it("does not skip for arbitrary untrusted context", () => {
    expect(shouldSkipWikiPrefetch({ hello: "world" })).toBe(false)
  })

  it("skips only when the explicit allowlisted flag is set", () => {
    expect(shouldSkipWikiPrefetch({ skip_wiki_prefetch: true })).toBe(true)
  })
})

describe("resolveWikiPrefetchMode", () => {
  it("defaults invalid values to auto", () => {
    expect(resolveWikiPrefetchMode({ wiki_prefetch: "bogus" })).toBe("auto")
    expect(resolveWikiPrefetchMode({ wiki_prefetch: 1 })).toBe("auto")
  })

  it("accepts allowlisted modes", () => {
    expect(resolveWikiPrefetchMode({ wiki_prefetch: "never" })).toBe("never")
    expect(resolveWikiPrefetchMode({ wiki_prefetch: "always" })).toBe("always")
    expect(resolveWikiPrefetchMode({ wiki_prefetch: "auto" })).toBe("auto")
  })
})

describe("wikiPrefetchPolicyWantsGatherPass", () => {
  const cfgOn = cfgWithOrchestrator("http://api")
  const cfgOff = cfgWithOrchestrator("")

  it("auto with URL and user wants gather", () => {
    expect(
      wikiPrefetchPolicyWantsGatherPass(cfgOn, {}, undefined, true),
    ).toBe(true)
  })

  it("auto without URL does not route for wiki-only gather", () => {
    expect(
      wikiPrefetchPolicyWantsGatherPass(cfgOff, {}, undefined, true),
    ).toBe(false)
  })

  it("never suppresses wiki-only routing even with URL", () => {
    expect(
      wikiPrefetchPolicyWantsGatherPass(cfgOn, { wiki_prefetch: "never" }, undefined, true),
    ).toBe(false)
  })

  it("always routes when user present even without orchestrator URL", () => {
    expect(
      wikiPrefetchPolicyWantsGatherPass(cfgOff, { wiki_prefetch: "always" }, undefined, true),
    ).toBe(true)
  })

  it("respects skip_wiki_prefetch from control context", () => {
    expect(
      wikiPrefetchPolicyWantsGatherPass(
        cfgOn,
        { wiki_prefetch: "always" },
        { skip_wiki_prefetch: true },
        true,
      ),
    ).toBe(false)
  })
})

describe("shouldRunWikiHttpPrefetch", () => {
  const cfgOn = cfgWithOrchestrator("http://api")
  const cfgOff = cfgWithOrchestrator("")

  it("never skips HTTP prefetch", () => {
    expect(
      shouldRunWikiHttpPrefetch(cfgOn, { wiki_prefetch: "never" }, "hi", undefined),
    ).toBe(false)
  })

  it("auto requires URL and user text", () => {
    expect(shouldRunWikiHttpPrefetch(cfgOn, {}, "x", undefined)).toBe(true)
    expect(shouldRunWikiHttpPrefetch(cfgOff, {}, "x", undefined)).toBe(false)
  })

  it("always runs with user text even without URL (HTTP helpers return not_configured)", () => {
    expect(shouldRunWikiHttpPrefetch(cfgOff, { wiki_prefetch: "always" }, "q", undefined)).toBe(
      true,
    )
  })
})
```

```ts
/**
 * Unit tests for orchestration_chat workflow_config merge and inject size limits.
 */
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest"
import {
  MAX_CHAT_INJECT_JSON_CHARS,
  mergeOrchestrationChatWorkflowConfig,
  serializedJsonLength,
  validateChatInjectPayloadBudget,
} from "./orchestration-chat-invoke-config.js"

describe("serializedJsonLength", () => {
  it("measures JSON text length", () => {
    expect(serializedJsonLength({ a: 1 })).toBeGreaterThan(5)
  })
})

describe("validateChatInjectPayloadBudget", () => {
  it("accepts small payloads", () => {
    expect(
      validateChatInjectPayloadBudget({
        workspace_snapshot: { ok: true },
        user_preferences: { theme: "dark" },
      }),
    ).toEqual({ ok: true })
  })

  it("rejects oversized workspace_snapshot", () => {
    const big = "x".repeat(MAX_CHAT_INJECT_JSON_CHARS + 10)
    const r = validateChatInjectPayloadBudget({ workspace_snapshot: { raw: big } })
    expect(r.ok).toBe(false)
    if (!r.ok) {
      expect(r.field).toBe("workspace_snapshot")
    }
  })

  it("rejects oversized context string on chat paths", () => {
    const big = "x".repeat(MAX_CHAT_INJECT_JSON_CHARS + 1)
    const r = validateChatInjectPayloadBudget({ context: big })
    expect(r.ok).toBe(false)
    if (!r.ok) {
      expect(r.field).toBe("context")
    }
  })
})

describe("mergeOrchestrationChatWorkflowConfig", () => {
  it("merges optional keys without dropping routing fields", () => {
    const out = mergeOrchestrationChatWorkflowConfig(
      { model: "m", oma_tool_mode: "full" },
      {
        system_directives: { verbosity: "minimal" },
        workspace_snapshot: { files: [] },
        user_preferences: { locale: "en" },
      },
    )
    expect(out.model).toBe("m")
    expect(out.oma_tool_mode).toBe("full")
    expect(out.system_directives).toEqual({ verbosity: "minimal" })
    expect(out.workspace_snapshot).toEqual({ files: [] })
    expect(out.user_preferences).toEqual({ locale: "en" })
  })
})
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/workflow/orchestration-chat-invoke-config.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 3442 bytes

```ts
/**
 * Helpers for building `workflow_config` on `POST /chat` and `POST /v1/workflows/execute`
 * (`orchestration_chat`), including optional product context blobs and JSON size guards.
 *
 * **Intent:** Keep merge + budget rules testable without booting Fastify; agent callers
 * mirror the same keys (`workspace_snapshot`, `user_preferences`) documented in the parity matrix.
 */

/** Max serialized JSON length per injected blob (per field) on chat / workflow ingress. */
export const MAX_CHAT_INJECT_JSON_CHARS = 64_000

export function serializedJsonLength(value: unknown): number {
  try {
    return JSON.stringify(value).length
  } catch {
    return Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY
  }
}

/**
 * Char budget for a single `context` / `control_context` (or execute aliases): strings use
 * `.length`; objects use `JSON.stringify` length (same cap as `workspace_snapshot`).
 */
export function contextFieldCharLength(value: unknown): number {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) {
    return 0
  }
  if (typeof value === "string") {
    return value.length
  }
  return serializedJsonLength(value)
}

export type ChatInjectBudgetResult =
  | { ok: true }
  | { ok: false; field: string; detail: "chat_inject_too_large" }

/**
 * Returns failure when a single optional inject field exceeds the byte budget
 * (serialized JSON length, or string length for `context` / `control_context` fields).
 */
export function validateChatInjectPayloadBudget(input: {
  workspace_snapshot?: unknown
  user_preferences?: unknown
  context?: unknown
  control_context?: unknown
  /** `POST /v1/workflows/execute` input_data aliases */
  context_untrusted?: unknown
  context_blob?: unknown
}): ChatInjectBudgetResult {
  if (input.workspace_snapshot !== undefined) {
    const n = serializedJsonLength(input.workspace_snapshot)
    if (n > MAX_CHAT_INJECT_JSON_CHARS) {
      return { ok: false, field: "workspace_snapshot", detail: "chat_inject_too_large" }
    }
  }
  if (input.user_preferences !== undefined) {
    const n = serializedJsonLength(input.user_preferences)
    if (n > MAX_CHAT_INJECT_JSON_CHARS) {
      return { ok: false, field: "user_preferences", detail: "chat_inject_too_large" }
    }
  }
  const contextChecks: [string, unknown][] = [
    ["context", input.context],
    ["control_context", input.control_context],
    ["context_untrusted", input.context_untrusted],
    ["context_blob", input.context_blob],
  ]
  for (const [field, v] of contextChecks) {
    if (v === undefined) {
      continue
    }
    const n = contextFieldCharLength(v)
    if (n > MAX_CHAT_INJECT_JSON_CHARS) {
      return { ok: false, field, detail: "chat_inject_too_large" }
    }
  }
  return { ok: true }
}

/**
 * Shallow-merges routing-derived `workflow_config` with optional POST `/chat` /
 * workflow-execute extras (`system_directives`, product context).
 */
export function mergeOrchestrationChatWorkflowConfig(
  routing: Record<string, unknown>,
  extras: {
    system_directives?: unknown
    workspace_snapshot?: unknown
    user_preferences?: unknown
  },
): Record<string, unknown> {
  const wc: Record<string, unknown> = { ...routing }
  if (extras.system_directives !== undefined) wc.system_directives = extras.system_directives
  if (extras.workspace_snapshot !== undefined) wc.workspace_snapshot = extras.workspace_snapshot
  if (extras.user_preferences !== undefined) wc.user_preferences = extras.user_preferences
  return wc
}
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/workflow/prompts/README.md`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`

```md
## Prompt Module Boundaries

`orchestration-chat.ts` is the source of truth for user/model-facing prompt text used by `orchestration_chat`.

- Keep router prompt wrappers, gather fallback prose, context labels, and response error prefixes in this module.
- Keep `graph.ts` and `routing-llm.ts` focused on control flow and orchestration logic.
- When adding new user-visible text to workflow code paths, hoist it into `orchestration-chat.ts` first.
```

```ts
/**
 * Dev-plane executor system prompt fragments (runner.ts). Workspace path is interpolated at runtime.
 */

export const DEVPLANE_CODING_EXECUTOR_INTRO =
  "You are the coding-model executor for a governed dev-plane run."

export const DEVPLANE_LOCAL_GENERAL_INTRO =
  "You are the local general-model executor for a governed dev-plane run."

export const DEVPLANE_STRATEGIC_REVIEWER_INTRO =
  "You are the strategic reviewer for a governed dev-plane escalation."

export const DEVPLANE_MULTIMODAL_SYSTEM_PROMPT =
  "You are dispatching a governed multimodal extraction task. Return only packet-scoped structured output."

export function buildCodingSystemPrompt(workspaceRoot: string): string {
  return [
    DEVPLANE_CODING_EXECUTOR_INTRO,
    `Only operate inside this workspace: ${workspaceRoot}`,
    "Use only the provided workspace_* tools.",
    "Do not publish, push, open pull requests, or reference files outside the workspace.",
    "Make the minimum changes needed to satisfy the task objective.",
  ].join(" ")
}

export function buildLocalGeneralSystemPrompt(workspaceRoot: string): string {
  return [
    DEVPLANE_LOCAL_GENERAL_INTRO,
    `You may inspect only this workspace: ${workspaceRoot}`,
    "Use only read-only workspace tools.",
    "Do not edit files, publish changes, or invoke repository mutations.",
  ].join(" ")
}

export function buildStrategicReviewSystemPrompt(workspaceRoot: string): string {
  return [
    DEVPLANE_STRATEGIC_REVIEWER_INTRO,
    `You may inspect only this workspace: ${workspaceRoot}`,
    "Use only read-only workspace tools.",
    "Do not edit files, publish changes, or invoke repository mutations.",
    "Return compact decision guidance tied to the escalation packet only.",
  ].join(" ")
}
```

```ts
import { createHash } from "node:crypto"
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest"
import {
  ENGINEERING_LOCAL_GENERAL_SYSTEM_PROMPT,
  ENGINEERING_STRATEGIC_REVIEWER_SYSTEM_PROMPT,
} from "./engineering-executors.js"
import {
  buildCodingSystemPrompt,
  buildLocalGeneralSystemPrompt,
  buildStrategicReviewSystemPrompt,
  DEVPLANE_MULTIMODAL_SYSTEM_PROMPT,
} from "./devplane-executors.js"

function sha256(s: string): string {
  return createHash("sha256").update(s, "utf8").digest("hex")
}

describe("engineering executor prompts", () => {
  it("fingerprints", () => {
    expect(ENGINEERING_LOCAL_GENERAL_SYSTEM_PROMPT.length).toBeGreaterThan(40)
    expect(ENGINEERING_STRATEGIC_REVIEWER_SYSTEM_PROMPT.length).toBeGreaterThan(40)
    expect(sha256(ENGINEERING_LOCAL_GENERAL_SYSTEM_PROMPT)).toMatch(/^[a-f0-9]{64}$/)
    expect(sha256(ENGINEERING_STRATEGIC_REVIEWER_SYSTEM_PROMPT)).toMatch(/^[a-f0-9]{64}$/)
  })
})

describe("devplane executor prompts", () => {
  const root = "/tmp/devplane-workspace-fixture"

  it("multimodal system prompt", () => {
    expect(DEVPLANE_MULTIMODAL_SYSTEM_PROMPT.length).toBeGreaterThan(30)
    expect(sha256(DEVPLANE_MULTIMODAL_SYSTEM_PROMPT)).toMatch(/^[a-f0-9]{64}$/)
  })

  it("builder outputs stable for fixed workspace root", () => {
    expect(sha256(buildCodingSystemPrompt(root))).toMatch(/^[a-f0-9]{64}$/)
    expect(sha256(buildLocalGeneralSystemPrompt(root))).toMatch(/^[a-f0-9]{64}$/)
    expect(sha256(buildStrategicReviewSystemPrompt(root))).toMatch(/^[a-f0-9]{64}$/)
  })
})
```

```ts
import { createHash } from "node:crypto"
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest"
import {
  API_BRAIN_PACKET_GOAL,
  API_BRAIN_PACKET_TYPE,
  API_BRAIN_SYSTEM_PROMPT,
  DEFAULT_API_BRAIN_TRIGGER_WORDS,
  LLM_GATHER_ROUTER_SYSTEM,
} from "./orchestration-chat.js"

/** Stable fingerprints so accidental edits to prompts are caught in CI. */
function sha256(s: string): string {
  return createHash("sha256").update(s, "utf8").digest("hex")
}

describe("orchestration-chat prompt constants", () => {
  it("API_BRAIN_SYSTEM_PROMPT length and hash", () => {
    expect(API_BRAIN_SYSTEM_PROMPT.length).toBeGreaterThan(40)
    expect(sha256(API_BRAIN_SYSTEM_PROMPT)).toMatch(/^[a-f0-9]{64}$/)
  })

})
```
