```ts
/**
 * Versioned natural-language copy and default routing keywords for orchestration_chat.
 * Prefer editing this module over scattering strings in graph.ts / server.ts.
 */

/** System prompt for the hosted API brain (runDirectAgent). */
export const API_BRAIN_SYSTEM_PROMPT =
  "You are the hosted API brain. Return a compact PLAN/REVIEW/DECISION/PATCH_GUIDANCE. " +
  "Do not ask questions. Do not include raw logs. Use only the provided packet."

/** JSON packet shape for API brain (buildApiBrainPacket). */
export const API_BRAIN_PACKET_TYPE = "CODE_STATE"

export const API_BRAIN_PACKET_GOAL =
  "Provide a compact PLAN/REVIEW/DECISION to guide local execution."

/** Labels prepended to gathered context in generateResponse (order is assembled in graph.ts). */
export const CONTEXT_LABEL_CLIENT_WORKFLOW =
  "Client workflow context (from input_data.context / client_context; data-only; wiki list/search prefetch is controlled by `workflow_config.wiki_prefetch` and allowlisted `control_context.skip_wiki_prefetch`, not this field):"

/** Injected in `generateResponse` as untrusted user-side context (never system role). */
export const CONTEXT_LABEL_CONTROL_PLANE =
  "Allowlisted control-plane context (from input_data.control_context; non-authoritative):"

export const CONTEXT_LABEL_WIKI_PREFIX = "Control Plane orchestration wiki (canonical routing knowledge):"

export const CONTEXT_LABEL_RAG_PREFIX = "Embedding RAG results (supplementary):"

export const CONTEXT_LABEL_ASR_PREFIX = "Audio Transcript:"

export const CONTEXT_LABEL_REQUIRED_TOOL_RESULTS = "Required Tool Results:"

export const CONTEXT_LABEL_TOOL_REGISTRY = "Tool registry (available names, truncated):"

export const CONTEXT_MERGE_HEADER = "Additional Context:"

export const API_BRAIN_OUTPUT_GUIDANCE_PREFIX =
  "Hosted API brain guidance (use as high-level planning/review only; execute locally):"

/** Wiki gather step: prefixes inside buildGatherContext (before truncation). */
export const WIKI_GATHER_PATHS_PREFIX = "Orchestration wiki page paths (truncated):\n"

export const WIKI_GATHER_SEARCH_PREFIX = "Orchestration wiki search (user message excerpt):\n"

/** Default API-brain escalation triggers (last user message, lowercase). */
export const DEFAULT_API_BRAIN_TRIGGER_WORDS = [
  "architecture",
  "tradeoff",
  "conflict",
  "design",
  "ambiguous",
  "review",
  "plan",
] as const

/** Allowed internal gather tool names for tools_needed_override validation. */
export const ALLOWED_GATHER_TOOL_NAMES = [
  "rag_search",
  "asr",
  "mcp_chemistry",
  "mcp_mechanical",
  "mcp_materials",
] as const

export type GatherToolName = (typeof ALLOWED_GATHER_TOOL_NAMES)[number]

/** Injected block listing OMA tool names + descriptions (buildGenerateResponse). */
export const CONTEXT_LABEL_OMA_TOOL_CATALOG = "OMA tools (names and descriptions):"

/** Gather-stage ASR fallback when audio bytes are not provided by the caller. */
export const ASR_GATHER_NO_AUDIO_MESSAGE =
  "ASR gather skipped: no audio payload. Pass input_data.asr_audio_base64 (base64) on workflow execute, or asr_audio_base64 on POST /chat, or use the transcribe_audio OMA tool when audio bytes are available."

/** Prefix for gather-stage wiki prefetch errors (graph.ts). */
export const WIKI_CONTEXT_ERROR_PREFIX = "wiki context error:"

/** Prefix for per-tool gather execution errors (graph.ts). */
export const GATHER_TOOL_ERROR_PREFIX = "Error:"

/** Suffix used for dynamic MCP domain context labels (graph.ts). */
export const MCP_DOMAIN_DATA_LABEL_SUFFIX = "Domain Data:"

/** Prefix for LLM backend failures in the final response path. */
export const FINAL_RESPONSE_LLM_ERROR_PREFIX = "LLM service error:"

/** Prefix for non-LLM final response generation failures. */
export const FINAL_RESPONSE_ERROR_PREFIX = "Error generating response:"

/** Gather-router user wrapper text for ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM prompts. */
export function buildLlmGatherRouterUserPrompt(userMessage: string): string {
  return `User message:\n${userMessage}\n\nOutput JSON only as specified in your instructions.`
}

/**
 * Router for ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM: output must be JSON only: {"tools_needed":["rag_search",...]}.
 * Allowed values for tools_needed: rag_search, asr, mcp_chemistry, mcp_mechanical, mcp_materials (subset or empty).
 */
export const LLM_GATHER_ROUTER_SYSTEM = `You are a gather-stage router for orchestration_chat. Given the latest user message in the transcript (last user turn), decide which prefetch gather tools (if any) should run before the main reply.

Reply with a single JSON object only, no markdown, no prose:
{"tools_needed":[]}

Use only these exact strings in the array (or an empty array): "rag_search", "asr", "mcp_chemistry", "mcp_mechanical", "mcp_materials".

Examples:
- User asks for a definition → {"tools_needed":["rag_search"]}
- User mentions chemistry data → {"tools_needed":["mcp_chemistry"]}
- Casual greeting → {"tools_needed":[]}`
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/workflow/routing-llm.test.ts`

```ts
import { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest"

const mockLogGatherRouter = vi.hoisted(() => vi.fn())
vi.mock("./gather-router-log.js", () => ({
  logGatherRouter: mockLogGatherRouter,
}))
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import { LLMManager } from "../llm/manager.js"
import { OrchestrationEngine } from "../orchestration/engine.js"
import { buildAnalyzeRequest } from "./graph.js"
import type { WorkflowStateType } from "./graph.js"
import { parseGatherRouterOutput, tryLlmGatherRouting } from "./routing-llm.js"

function baseCfg(): PlatformConfig {
  return {
    ragUrl: "http://rag",
    asrUrl: "http://asr",
    mcpUrl: "http://mcp",
    toolRegistryUrl: "http://tools",
    llmRunnerUrl: "http://llm",
    llmBackend: "mock",
    ollamaModel: "x",
    vllmModel: "x",
    huggingfaceModel: "hf-model",
    huggingfaceBaseUrl: "https://router.huggingface.co/v1",
    huggingfaceApiKey: undefined,
    apiBrainEnabled: true,
    apiBrainMaxEscalationsPerTask: 1,
    apiBrainProvider: "openai",
    apiBrainModel: "brain-model",
    orchestrationDefaultModel: "mock-llm",
    orchestrationDefaultProvider: "openai",
    orchestrationDefaultBaseUrl: undefined,
    orchestrationDefaultApiKey: undefined,
    orchestrationMaxTokenBudget: undefined,
    orchestratorApiUrl: "",
    modelRuntimeBaseUrl: "",
    structureGatewayUrl: "",
    mcpRegistryBaseUrl: "",
    clawCodeBinary: "claw",
    clawCodeModel: undefined,
    clawCodeTrustedRoots: [],
    clawCodePollIntervalMs: 10,
    clawCodeTimeoutMs: 200,
    clawCodeMaxConcurrentLanes: 1,
    agentPlatformBaseUrl: "http://agent-platform",
    enableContainerGuiActTool: false,
    omaCatalogProfile: "full",
    omaToolPreset: "primitive",
  }
}

function state(partial: Partial<WorkflowStateType> & Pick<WorkflowStateType, "messages">): WorkflowStateType {
  return {
    current_step: "analyze",
    tools_needed: [],
    tool_results: {},
    escalation_count: 0,
    ...partial,
  } as WorkflowStateType
}

describe("parseGatherRouterOutput", () => {
  it("parses minimal JSON", () => {
    expect(parseGatherRouterOutput('{"tools_needed":["rag_search"]}')).toEqual(["rag_search"])
  })

  it("extracts JSON from surrounding text", () => {
    expect(
      parseGatherRouterOutput('here you go:\n{"tools_needed":["asr","mcp_chemistry"]}\n'),
    ).toEqual(["asr", "mcp_chemistry"])
  })

  it("filters to allowlist and drops unknown", () => {
    expect(
      parseGatherRouterOutput('{"tools_needed":["rag_search","bogus","mcp_materials"]}'),
    ).toEqual(["rag_search", "mcp_materials"])
  })

  it("returns undefined on invalid JSON", () => {
    expect(parseGatherRouterOutput("not json")).toBeUndefined()
  })

  it("returns undefined when tools_needed is not an array", () => {
    expect(parseGatherRouterOutput('{"tools_needed":"rag_search"}')).toBeUndefined()
  })
})

describe("tryLlmGatherRouting", () => {
  afterEach(() => {
    delete process.env.ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM
    delete process.env.ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTER_LOG
    mockLogGatherRouter.mockClear()
    vi.restoreAllMocks()
  })

  it("returns undefined when ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM is not 1", async () => {
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, new LLMManager(cfg))
    const out = await tryLlmGatherRouting(cfg, { messages: [{ role: "user", content: "hi" }] }, engine)
    expect(out).toBeUndefined()
  })

  it("returns parsed tools when runDirectAgent returns JSON", async () => {
    process.env.ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM = "1"
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, new LLMManager(cfg))
    vi.spyOn(engine, "runDirectAgent").mockResolvedValue({
      output: '{"tools_needed":["mcp_mechanical"]}',
      success: true,
    } as any)
    const out = await tryLlmGatherRouting(
      cfg,
      { messages: [{ role: "user", content: "mechanical stress data" }] },
      engine,
    )
    expect(out).toEqual(["mcp_mechanical"])
    expect(mockLogGatherRouter).not.toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      expect.objectContaining({ phase: "fallback" }),
    )
  })

  it("uses the last user message for the gather-router prompt (multi-turn)", async () => {
    process.env.ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM = "1"
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, new LLMManager(cfg))
    const spy = vi.spyOn(engine, "runDirectAgent").mockResolvedValue({
      output: '{"tools_needed":[]}',
      success: true,
    } as any)
    await tryLlmGatherRouting(
      cfg,
      {
        messages: [
          { role: "user", content: "first turn" },
          { role: "assistant", content: "ok" },
          { role: "user", content: "last turn chemistry" },
        ],
      },
      engine,
    )
    expect(spy).toHaveBeenCalled()
    const arg = spy.mock.calls[0]![0] as { prompt: string }
    expect(arg.prompt).toContain("last turn chemistry")
    expect(arg.prompt).not.toContain("first turn")
  })

  it("logs fallback when model output does not parse", async () => {
    process.env.ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM = "1"
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, new LLMManager(cfg))
    vi.spyOn(engine, "runDirectAgent").mockResolvedValue({
      output: "not valid json",
      success: true,
    } as any)
    const out = await tryLlmGatherRouting(
      cfg,
      { messages: [{ role: "user", content: "hello" }] },
      engine,
    )
    expect(out).toBeUndefined()
    expect(mockLogGatherRouter).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      expect.objectContaining({ phase: "fallback", reason: "parse_error" }),
    )
  })
})

describe("buildAnalyzeRequest + ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM", () => {
  afterEach(() => {
    delete process.env.ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM
    vi.restoreAllMocks()
  })

  it("uses LLM routing when enabled", async () => {
    process.env.ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM = "1"
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, new LLMManager(cfg))
    vi.spyOn(engine, "runDirectAgent").mockResolvedValue({
      output: '{"tools_needed":["rag_search"]}',
      success: true,
    } as any)
    const analyze = buildAnalyzeRequest(cfg, engine)
    const out = await analyze(
      state({
        messages: [{ role: "user", content: "hello" }],
        workflow_config: {},
      }),
    )
    expect(out.tools_needed).toEqual(["rag_search"])
  })

  it("LLM gather routing sees last user message when earlier user exists", async () => {
    process.env.ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM = "1"
    const cfg = baseCfg()
    const engine = new OrchestrationEngine(cfg, new LLMManager(cfg))
    const spy = vi.spyOn(engine, "runDirectAgent").mockResolvedValue({
      output: '{"tools_needed":["rag_search"]}',
      success: true,
    } as any)
    const analyze = buildAnalyzeRequest(cfg, engine)
    await analyze(
      state({
        messages: [
          { role: "user", content: "ignored first" },
          { role: "assistant", content: "sure" },
          { role: "user", content: "use this for routing" },
        ],
        workflow_config: {},
      }),
    )
    const arg = spy.mock.calls[0]![0] as { prompt: string }
    expect(arg.prompt).toContain("use this for routing")
    expect(arg.prompt).not.toContain("ignored first")
  })
})
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/workflow/routing-llm.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 3480 bytes

```ts
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import type { OrchestrationEngine } from "../orchestration/engine.js"
import { resolveWorkflowModelRouting } from "../orchestration/runtime-router.js"
import {
  ALLOWED_GATHER_TOOL_NAMES,
  buildLlmGatherRouterUserPrompt,
  LLM_GATHER_ROUTER_SYSTEM,
  type GatherToolName,
} from "./prompts/orchestration-chat.js"
import { logGatherRouter } from "./gather-router-log.js"
import { resolveGatherUserText } from "./gather-user-message.js"

/** Minimal state slice for gather routing (avoids importing graph.ts). */
export type LlmRoutingStateSlice = {
  messages: Array<{ role: string; content: string }>
  workflow_config?: Record<string, unknown>
}

const ROUTER_TIMEOUT_MS = 12_000

/**
 * Parse JSON from model output; extracts first `{...}` if extra text leaked.
 */
export function parseGatherRouterOutput(raw: string): GatherToolName[] | undefined {
  const trimmed = raw.trim()
  const start = trimmed.indexOf("{")
  const end = trimmed.lastIndexOf("}")
  const jsonText =
    start >= 0 && end > start ? trimmed.slice(start, end + 1) : trimmed
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonText) as { tools_needed?: unknown }
    if (!Array.isArray(parsed.tools_needed)) return undefined
    const allowed = new Set<string>(ALLOWED_GATHER_TOOL_NAMES)
    const out: GatherToolName[] = []
    for (const x of parsed.tools_needed) {
      if (typeof x !== "string") continue
      if (allowed.has(x)) out.push(x as GatherToolName)
    }
    return out
  } catch {
    return undefined
  }
}

/**
 * Optional ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM path: small LLM call returns JSON tools_needed; on any failure returns undefined.
 */
export async function tryLlmGatherRouting(
  cfg: PlatformConfig,
  state: LlmRoutingStateSlice,
  engine: OrchestrationEngine,
): Promise<string[] | undefined> {
  if (process.env.ORCHESTRATION_GATEWAY_ROUTING_LLM !== "1") {
    logGatherRouter({ phase: "skip", reason: "env_off" })
    return undefined
  }
  const user = resolveGatherUserText(state.messages).slice(0, 4000)
  if (!user.trim()) {
    logGatherRouter({ phase: "skip", reason: "empty_user" })
    return undefined
  }
  const prompt = buildLlmGatherRouterUserPrompt(user)
  const routing = resolveWorkflowModelRouting(cfg, {}, state.workflow_config ?? {})
  const run = engine.runDirectAgent({
    name: "gather_router",
    prompt,
    systemPrompt: LLM_GATHER_ROUTER_SYSTEM,
    model: routing.model ?? cfg.orchestrationDefaultModel,
    provider: routing.provider ?? cfg.orchestrationDefaultProvider,
    baseURL: routing.baseURL,
    apiKey: routing.apiKey,
    maxTurns: 1,
    maxTokens: 256,
    temperature: 0,
    toolNames: [],
  })
  const timeout = new Promise<never>((_, reject) => {
    setTimeout(() => reject(new Error("gather_router_timeout")), ROUTER_TIMEOUT_MS)
  })
  try {
    const result = await Promise.race([run, timeout])
    const parsed = parseGatherRouterOutput(result.output ?? "")
    if (parsed === undefined) {
      logGatherRouter({ phase: "fallback", reason: "parse_error" })
      return undefined
    }
    logGatherRouter({ phase: "llm_routed", reason: "ok", tools_count: parsed.length })
    return parsed
  } catch (e) {
    const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)
    const reason = msg.includes("gather_router_timeout") ? "timeout" : "llm_error"
    logGatherRouter({
      phase: "fallback",
      reason,
      message: msg.slice(0, 500),
    })
    return undefined
  }
}
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/workflow/routing.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 1256 bytes

```ts
import {
  ALLOWED_GATHER_TOOL_NAMES,
  type GatherToolName,
} from "./prompts/orchestration-chat.js"

const allowedSet = new Set<string>(ALLOWED_GATHER_TOOL_NAMES)

const allowedMcpDomains = new Set<string>(
  ALLOWED_GATHER_TOOL_NAMES.filter((name) => name.startsWith("mcp_")).map((name) =>
    name.slice("mcp_".length),
  ),
)

/** Build gather tool list from optional workflow_config.gather_tool_plan. */
export function toolsFromGatherToolPlan(plan: {
  rag?: boolean
  asr?: boolean
  mcp_domains?: string[]
}): string[] {
  const out: string[] = []
  if (plan.rag === true) out.push("rag_search")
  if (plan.asr === true) out.push("asr")
  for (const raw of plan.mcp_domains ?? []) {
    const d = String(raw).toLowerCase()
    if (allowedMcpDomains.has(d)) {
      out.push(`mcp_${d}`)
    }
  }
  return out
}

/** Filter workflow_config.tools_needed_override to allowed internal names; drops unknown entries. */
export function normalizeToolsNeededOverride(raw: unknown): GatherToolName[] | undefined {
  if (!Array.isArray(raw)) return undefined
  const out: GatherToolName[] = []
  for (const x of raw) {
    if (typeof x !== "string") continue
    if (allowedSet.has(x)) out.push(x as GatherToolName)
  }
  return out.length > 0 ? out : []
}
```

```ts
import crypto from "node:crypto"
import { mkdtemp, readFile, rm } from "node:fs/promises"
import os from "node:os"
import path from "node:path"
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest"

import {
  appendWorkflowTrace,
  cancelWorkflowRun,
  completeWorkflowRun,
  createWorkflowRun,
  getWorkflowRun,
  registerWorkflowAbortController,
} from "./run-store.js"

describe("workflow run store", () => {
  it("keeps bounded trace events and separates abort controllers from persisted records", async () => {
    const persistDir = await mkdtemp(path.join(os.tmpdir(), "workflow-run-store-"))
    process.env.WORKFLOW_RUN_STORE_DIR = persistDir
    process.env.WORKFLOW_TRACE_MAX_EVENTS = "3"
    const id = `wf-trace-${crypto.randomUUID()}`

    createWorkflowRun(id, "orchestration_chat")
    const controller = new AbortController()
    registerWorkflowAbortController(id, controller)

    appendWorkflowTrace(id, {
      type: "node.started",
      node: "analyze",
      message: "analyze started",
      details: { prompt: "secret prompt that must not be persisted in full" },
    })
    appendWorkflowTrace(id, { type: "node.completed", node: "analyze" })
    appendWorkflowTrace(id, { type: "node.started", node: "generate_response" })
    appendWorkflowTrace(id, { type: "node.completed", node: "generate_response" })

    const rec = getWorkflowRun(id)
    expect(rec?.trace_events.map((event) => event.type)).toEqual([
      "node.completed",
      "node.started",
      "node.completed",
    ])
    expect(rec?.trace_summary.total_events).toBe(4)
    expect(rec?.trace_summary.dropped_events).toBe(1)

    const ok = cancelWorkflowRun(id)
    expect(ok).toBe(true)
    expect(controller.signal.aborted).toBe(true)
    completeWorkflowRun(id, { final_response: "late result" })

    const persisted = JSON.parse(
      await readFile(path.join(persistDir, `${id}.json`), "utf8"),
    ) as Record<string, unknown>
    expect(JSON.stringify(persisted)).not.toContain("AbortController")
    expect((persisted as { status?: string }).status).toBe("cancelled")

    delete process.env.WORKFLOW_RUN_STORE_DIR
    delete process.env.WORKFLOW_TRACE_MAX_EVENTS
    await rm(persistDir, { recursive: true, force: true })
  })
})
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/workflow/run-store.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 7625 bytes

```ts
import fs from "node:fs"
import path from "node:path"

export type WorkflowStatus =
  | "pending"
  | "running"
  | "cancel_requested"
  | "completed"
  | "cancelled"
  | "failed"

export type WorkflowTraceEvent = {
  id: number
  timestamp: string
  type: string
  node?: string
  message?: string
  details?: Record<string, unknown>
}

export type WorkflowTraceSummary = {
  total_events: number
  dropped_events: number
  node_counts: Record<string, number>
  last_event_type?: string
  last_event_at?: string
}

export type WorkflowObservability = {
  ingest: {
    status: "not_configured" | "accepted" | "http_error" | "unavailable" | "unknown"
    detail?: string
    updated_at?: string
  }
}

export type WorkflowRecord = {
  id: string
  workflow_name: string
  status: WorkflowStatus
  startedAt: number
  finishedAt?: number
  started_at: string
  finished_at?: string
  result?: unknown
  error?: string
  cancelled?: boolean
  cancel_requested?: boolean
  trace_events: WorkflowTraceEvent[]
  trace_summary: WorkflowTraceSummary
  observability: WorkflowObservability
}

const store = new Map<string, WorkflowRecord>()
const abortControllers = new Map<string, AbortController>()

function persistDir(): string | undefined {
  return process.env.WORKFLOW_RUN_STORE_DIR
}

function maxTraceEvents(): number {
  const raw = Number(process.env.WORKFLOW_TRACE_MAX_EVENTS ?? "500")
  if (!Number.isFinite(raw) || raw <= 0) return 500
  return Math.max(1, Math.floor(raw))
}

function fileFor(id: string): string | null {
  const dir = persistDir()
  if (!dir) {
    return null
  }
  return path.join(dir, `${id}.json`)
}

function nowIso(): string {
  return new Date().toISOString()
}

function emptyTraceSummary(): WorkflowTraceSummary {
  return {
    total_events: 0,
    dropped_events: 0,
    node_counts: {},
  }
}

function defaultObservability(): WorkflowObservability {
  return {
    ingest: {
      status: "unknown",
    },
  }
}

function normalizeRecord(rec: WorkflowRecord): WorkflowRecord {
  rec.started_at = rec.started_at ?? new Date(rec.startedAt).toISOString()
  rec.trace_events = rec.trace_events ?? []
  rec.trace_summary = rec.trace_summary ?? emptyTraceSummary()
  rec.observability = rec.observability ?? defaultObservability()
  return rec
}

function writeDisk(rec: WorkflowRecord): void {
  const fp = fileFor(rec.id)
  if (!fp) {
    return
  }
  fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(fp), { recursive: true })
  fs.writeFileSync(fp, JSON.stringify(normalizeRecord(rec), null, 2), "utf8")
}

function readDisk(id: string): WorkflowRecord | null {
  const fp = fileFor(id)
  if (!fp || !fs.existsSync(fp)) {
    return null
  }
  const raw = fs.readFileSync(fp, "utf8")
  return normalizeRecord(JSON.parse(raw) as WorkflowRecord)
}

function loadRecord(id: string): WorkflowRecord | undefined {
  const rec = store.get(id) ?? readDisk(id) ?? undefined
  return rec ? normalizeRecord(rec) : undefined
}

function truncate(value: string, max = 500): string {
  if (value.length <= max) return value
  return `${value.slice(0, max)}...<truncated>`
}

function sanitizeDetails(value: unknown): unknown {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return value
  if (typeof value === "string") return truncate(value)
  if (typeof value === "number" || typeof value === "boolean") return value
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.slice(0, 20).map((item) => sanitizeDetails(item))
  if (typeof value === "object") {
    const out: Record<string, unknown> = {}
    for (const [key, val] of Object.entries(value as Record<string, unknown>).slice(0, 40)) {
      const lower = key.toLowerCase()
      if (
        lower.includes("apikey") ||
        lower.includes("api_key") ||
        lower.includes("token") ||
        lower.includes("secret") ||
        lower === "prompt" ||
        lower === "messages" ||
        lower.includes("context_blob")
      ) {
        out[key] = "<redacted>"
      } else {
        out[key] = sanitizeDetails(val)
      }
    }
    return out
  }
  return String(value)
}

export function createWorkflowRun(id: string, workflowName: string): WorkflowRecord {
  const rec: WorkflowRecord = {
    id,
    workflow_name: workflowName,
    status: "running",
    startedAt: Date.now(),
    started_at: nowIso(),
    trace_events: [],
    trace_summary: emptyTraceSummary(),
    observability: defaultObservability(),
  }
  store.set(id, rec)
  writeDisk(rec)
  return rec
}

export function completeWorkflowRun(id: string, result: unknown): void {
  const rec = loadRecord(id)
  if (!rec) {
    return
  }
  rec.status = rec.cancelled || rec.cancel_requested ? "cancelled" : "completed"
  rec.finishedAt = Date.now()
  rec.finished_at = nowIso()
  rec.result = result
  rec.error = undefined
  store.set(id, rec)
  writeDisk(rec)
}

export function failWorkflowRun(id: string, error: string): void {
  const rec = loadRecord(id)
  if (!rec) {
    return
  }
  rec.status = rec.cancelled || rec.cancel_requested ? "cancelled" : "failed"
  rec.finishedAt = Date.now()
  rec.finished_at = nowIso()
  rec.error = error
  rec.result = { error }
  store.set(id, rec)
  writeDisk(rec)
}

export function cancelWorkflowRun(id: string): boolean {
  const rec = loadRecord(id)
  if (!rec || rec.status === "completed" || rec.status === "failed" || rec.status === "cancelled") {
    return false
  }
  rec.cancelled = true
  rec.cancel_requested = true
  rec.status = "cancel_requested"
  abortControllers.get(id)?.abort()
  store.set(id, rec)
  writeDisk(rec)
  return true
}

export function getWorkflowRun(id: string): WorkflowRecord | undefined {
  const rec = loadRecord(id)
  if (rec) store.set(id, rec)
  return rec
}

export function registerWorkflowAbortController(id: string, controller: AbortController): void {
  abortControllers.set(id, controller)
}

export function getWorkflowAbortSignal(id: string): AbortSignal | undefined {
  return abortControllers.get(id)?.signal
}

export function clearWorkflowAbortController(id: string): void {
  abortControllers.delete(id)
}

export function appendWorkflowTrace(
  id: string,
  event: Omit<WorkflowTraceEvent, "id" | "timestamp"> & { timestamp?: string },
): WorkflowTraceEvent | undefined {
  const rec = loadRecord(id)
  if (!rec) return undefined
  const timestamp = event.timestamp ?? nowIso()
  const next: WorkflowTraceEvent = {
    id: rec.trace_summary.total_events + 1,
    timestamp,
    type: event.type,
    ...(event.node ? { node: event.node } : {}),
    ...(event.message ? { message: truncate(event.message, 500) } : {}),
    ...(event.details && typeof event.details === "object"
      ? { details: sanitizeDetails(event.details) as Record<string, unknown> }
      : {}),
  }
  rec.trace_summary.total_events += 1
  rec.trace_summary.last_event_type = next.type
  rec.trace_summary.last_event_at = next.timestamp
  if (next.node) {
    rec.trace_summary.node_counts[next.node] =
      (rec.trace_summary.node_counts[next.node] ?? 0) + 1
  }
  rec.trace_events.push(next)
  const maxEvents = maxTraceEvents()
  if (rec.trace_events.length > maxEvents) {
    const overflow = rec.trace_events.length - maxEvents
    rec.trace_events.splice(0, overflow)
    rec.trace_summary.dropped_events += overflow
  }
  store.set(id, rec)
  writeDisk(rec)
  return next
}

export function setWorkflowIngestObservability(
  id: string,
  ingest: WorkflowObservability["ingest"],
): void {
  const rec = loadRecord(id)
  if (!rec) return
  rec.observability = {
    ...rec.observability,
    ingest: {
      ...ingest,
      updated_at: ingest.updated_at ?? nowIso(),
    },
  }
  store.set(id, rec)
  writeDisk(rec)
}
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/workflow/runner.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 17631 bytes

```ts
// @ts-nocheck — workflow payloads remain intentionally permissive at the HTTP boundary.
import crypto from "node:crypto"
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"
import {
  appendWorkflowTrace,
  clearWorkflowAbortController,
  completeWorkflowRun,
  createWorkflowRun,
  failWorkflowRun,
  getWorkflowRun,
  registerWorkflowAbortController,
  setWorkflowIngestObservability,
} from "./run-store.js"
import { publishWorkflowLifecycleEvent } from "./running-ingest.js"
import {
  MAX_CHAT_INJECT_JSON_CHARS,
  mergeOrchestrationChatWorkflowConfig,
  validateChatInjectPayloadBudget,
} from "./orchestration-chat-invoke-config.js"
import {
  isSupportedWorkflowName,
  supportedWorkflowNames,
  type SupportedWorkflowName,
  validateWorkflowInput,
  workflowExecuteBodySchema,
} from "./contracts.js"

export class WorkflowRequestError extends Error {
  constructor(
    readonly statusCode: number,
    readonly detail: unknown,
  ) {
    super(typeof detail === "string" ? detail : JSON.stringify(detail))
  }
}

export type PreparedWorkflowRequest = {
  workflowName: SupportedWorkflowName
  inputData: Record<string, unknown>
  workflowConfig?: Record<string, unknown>
  bodyWorkflowConfig?: Record<string, unknown>
}

export type WorkflowRunnerDeps = {
  cfg: PlatformConfig
  chatWorkflow: { invoke: (input: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<Record<string, unknown>> }
  engineeringWorkflow: { invoke: (input: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<Record<string, unknown>> }
}

export function withModelRouting(inputData: Record<string, unknown>, workflowConfig?: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const existing = workflowConfig ?? {}
  const current =
    existing.model_routing && typeof existing.model_routing === "object" && !Array.isArray(existing.model_routing)
      ? existing.model_routing
      : {}
  const modelRouting = { ...current }
  if (typeof inputData.model === "string" && inputData.model.trim()) {
    modelRouting.model = inputData.model
  }
  if (typeof inputData.temperature === "number") {
    modelRouting.temperature = inputData.temperature
  }
  if (typeof inputData.max_tokens === "number") {
    modelRouting.max_tokens = inputData.max_tokens
  }
  if (typeof inputData.maxTokens === "number") {
    modelRouting.maxTokens = inputData.maxTokens
  }
  if (typeof inputData.provider === "string" && inputData.provider.trim()) {
    modelRouting.provider_preference = inputData.provider
  }
  if (
    typeof existing.provider_preference === "string" &&
    existing.provider_preference.trim() &&
    modelRouting.provider_preference === undefined
  ) {
    modelRouting.provider_preference = existing.provider_preference
  }
  if (Object.keys(modelRouting).length === 0) {
    return workflowConfig
  }
  return { ...existing, model_routing: modelRouting }
}

export function prepareWorkflowRequest(rawBody: unknown): PreparedWorkflowRequest {
  const parsed = workflowExecuteBodySchema.safeParse(rawBody ?? {})
  if (!parsed.success) {
    throw new WorkflowRequestError(400, parsed.error.flatten())
  }
  const body = parsed.data
  const workflowName = body.workflow_name ?? "orchestration_chat"
  const rawInputData = body.input_data ?? {}

  if (workflowName === "engineering_physics_v1") {
    throw new WorkflowRequestError(
      410,
      "engineering_physics_v1 was archived to ../server-local-archive/2026-04-08/server and is no longer part of the active orchestration surface.",
    )
  }

  if (!isSupportedWorkflowName(workflowName)) {
    throw new WorkflowRequestError(404, {
      detail: `workflow ${workflowName} is not part of the active orchestration surface.`,
      supported_workflows: supportedWorkflowNames,
    })
  }

  const validatedInputData = (() => {
    try {
      return validateWorkflowInput(workflowName, rawInputData)
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof Error && "flatten" in error) {
        throw new WorkflowRequestError(400, (error as { flatten: () => unknown }).flatten())
      }
      throw error
    }
  })()

  if (workflowName === "orchestration_chat" || workflowName === "default") {
    const injectBudget = validateChatInjectPayloadBudget({
      workspace_snapshot: validatedInputData.workspace_snapshot ?? validatedInputData.workspaceSnapshot,
      user_preferences: validatedInputData.user_preferences ?? validatedInputData.userPreferences,
      context: validatedInputData.context,
      control_context: validatedInputData.control_context ?? validatedInputData.context_control,
      context_untrusted: validatedInputData.context_untrusted,
      context_blob: validatedInputData.context_blob,
    })
    if (!injectBudget.ok) {
      throw new WorkflowRequestError(413, {
        error_code: injectBudget.detail,
        field: injectBudget.field,
        message: `Injected payload exceeds ${MAX_CHAT_INJECT_JSON_CHARS} serialized JSON characters.`,
      })
    }
  }

  return {
    workflowName,
    inputData: validatedInputData,
    bodyWorkflowConfig: body.workflow_config,
    workflowConfig: body.workflow_config,
  }
}

function trace(runId: string, event: {
  type: string
  node?: string
  message?: string
  details?: Record<string, unknown>
}): void {
  appendWorkflowTrace(runId, event)
}

async function publishAndRecord(params: {
  deps: WorkflowRunnerDeps
  runId: string
  workflowName: SupportedWorkflowName
  type: "run.started" | "run.progress" | "run.completed" | "run.failed" | "run.cancelled"
  payload: Record<string, unknown>
  source: string
}): Promise<void> {
  const result = await publishWorkflowLifecycleEvent({
    cfg: params.deps.cfg,
    type: params.type,
    workflowId: params.runId,
    workflowName: params.workflowName,
    payload: params.payload,
    source: params.source,
  })
  const ingest =
    result.status === "accepted"
      ? { status: "accepted" as const, detail: result.durability }
      : result.status === "http_error"
        ? { status: "http_error" as const, detail: `${result.statusCode}: ${result.detail}` }
        : result.status === "unavailable"
          ? { status: "unavailable" as const, detail: result.detail }
          : { status: "not_configured" as const }
  setWorkflowIngestObservability(params.runId, { ...ingest })
  trace(params.runId, {
    type: "observability.ingest",
    message: `Lifecycle publish ${params.type}: ${ingest.status}`,
    details: ingest,
  })
}

function throwIfAborted(signal: AbortSignal): void {
  if (signal.aborted) {
    throw new DOMException("Workflow run cancelled.", "AbortError")
  }
}

async function invokePreparedWorkflow(params: {
  deps: WorkflowRunnerDeps
  prepared: PreparedWorkflowRequest
  runId: string
  signal: AbortSignal
}): Promise<unknown> {
  const { deps, prepared, runId, signal } = params
  const { workflowName, inputData } = prepared
  const traceRecorder = (event: Record<string, unknown>) => {
    trace(runId, event as any)
  }

  throwIfAborted(signal)
  if (workflowName === "orchestration_chat" || workflowName === "default") {
    const messages = inputData.messages ?? [
      { role: "user", content: String(inputData.prompt ?? inputData.query ?? "") },
    ]
    const workflowConfig = withModelRouting(inputData, prepared.bodyWorkflowConfig ?? undefined)
    const mergedWorkflowConfig = mergeOrchestrationChatWorkflowConfig(workflowConfig ?? {}, {
      system_directives: inputData.system_directives ?? prepared.bodyWorkflowConfig?.system_directives,
      workspace_snapshot: inputData.workspace_snapshot ?? inputData.workspaceSnapshot,
      user_preferences: inputData.user_preferences ?? inputData.userPreferences,
    })
    const requiredToolResults = inputData.required_tool_results ?? undefined
    const systemFromInput = [inputData.system_prompt, inputData.systemPrompt].find((x) => typeof x === "string")
    const result = await deps.chatWorkflow.invoke({
      messages,
      current_step: "analyze",
      tools_needed: [],
      tool_results: {},
      workflow_config: mergedWorkflowConfig,
      required_tool_results: requiredToolResults,
      client_context: inputData.context_untrusted ?? inputData.context_blob ?? inputData.context,
      control_context: inputData.control_context ?? inputData.context_control ?? inputData.context,
      system_prompt: systemFromInput,
      asr_audio_base64: typeof inputData.asr_audio_base64 === "string" ? inputData.asr_audio_base64 : undefined,
      abort_signal: signal,
      trace_recorder: traceRecorder,
    })
    throwIfAborted(signal)
    return {
      final_response: result.final_response,
      tool_results: result.tool_results,
      engagement_mode: mergedWorkflowConfig?.engagement_mode,
      engagement_mode_source: mergedWorkflowConfig?.engagement_mode_source,
      engagement_mode_confidence: mergedWorkflowConfig?.engagement_mode_confidence,
      engagement_mode_reasons: mergedWorkflowConfig?.engagement_mode_reasons,
      minimum_engagement_mode: mergedWorkflowConfig?.minimum_engagement_mode,
      pending_mode_change: mergedWorkflowConfig?.pending_mode_change,
      api_brain: {
        escalation_count: result.escalation_count ?? 0,
        packet: result.api_brain_packet,
        output: result.api_brain_output,
      },
      oma_tool_calls: result.oma_tool_calls,
    }
  }

  if (workflowName === "engineering_workflow") {
    const tp = inputData.task_card
    const messages = inputData.messages ?? [
      {
        role: "user",
        content: String(tp?.objective ?? inputData.prompt ?? inputData.query ?? ""),
      },
    ]
    const workflowConfig = withModelRouting(inputData, prepared.bodyWorkflowConfig ?? undefined)
    const requiredToolResults = inputData.required_tool_results ?? undefined
    const result = await deps.engineeringWorkflow.invoke({
      messages,
      current_step: "intake",
      tools_needed: [],
      tool_results: {},
      workflow_config: workflowConfig,
      request_context: inputData.context ?? undefined,
      required_tool_results: requiredToolResults,
      run_id: inputData.run_id,
      task_id: inputData.task_id,
      dossier_id: inputData.dossier_id,
      task_plan: inputData.task_plan ?? undefined,
      project_context: inputData.project_context ?? undefined,
      engineering_session_id: inputData.engineering_session_id ?? undefined,
      task_card: tp,
      task_queue: inputData.task_queue ?? undefined,
      task_cards: inputData.task_cards ?? [],
      problem_brief: inputData.problem_brief ?? undefined,
      problem_brief_ref: inputData.problem_brief_ref ?? undefined,
      engineering_state: inputData.engineering_state ?? undefined,
      engineering_state_ref: inputData.engineering_state_ref ?? undefined,
      engagement_mode: inputData.engagement_mode,
      engagement_mode_source: inputData.engagement_mode_source,
      engagement_mode_confidence: inputData.engagement_mode_confidence,
      engagement_mode_reasons: inputData.engagement_mode_reasons ?? [],
      minimum_engagement_mode: inputData.minimum_engagement_mode ?? undefined,
      pending_mode_change: inputData.pending_mode_change ?? undefined,
      cost_ledger_entries: [],
      abort_signal: signal,
      trace_recorder: traceRecorder,
    })
    throwIfAborted(signal)
    return {
      final_response: result.final_response,
      tool_results: result.tool_results,
      referential_state: {
        run_id: result.run_id,
        task_id: result.task_id,
        dossier_id: result.dossier_id,
        engineering_session_id: result.engineering_session_id,
        cleanroom: result.cleanroom,
        problem_brief_ref: result.problem_brief_ref,
        engineering_state_ref: result.engineering_state_ref,
        active_task_card_id: result.active_task_card_id,
        active_task_card_ref: result.active_task_card_ref,
        selected_executor: result.active_selected_executor,
        dossier_snapshot: result.dossier_snapshot,
        engagement_mode: result.engagement_mode,
        minimum_engagement_mode: result.minimum_engagement_mode,
        wiki_overlay_context: result.wiki_overlay_context,
        wiki_edit_proposal_refs: result.wiki_edit_proposal_refs,
      },
      problem_brief: result.problem_brief,
      engineering_state: result.engineering_state,
      task_queue: result.task_queue,
      task_cards: result.task_cards,
      required_gates: result.required_gates,
      ready_for_task_decomposition: result.ready_for_task_decomposition,
      clarification_questions: result.clarification_questions,
      verification_outcome: result.verification_outcome,
      verification_report: result.verification_report,
      escalation_packet: result.escalation_packet,
      wiki_overlay_context: result.wiki_overlay_context,
      wiki_edit_proposals: result.wiki_edit_proposals,
      wiki_edit_proposal_refs: result.wiki_edit_proposal_refs,
      engagement_mode: result.engagement_mode,
      engagement_mode_source: result.engagement_mode_source,
      engagement_mode_confidence: result.engagement_mode_confidence,
      engagement_mode_reasons: result.engagement_mode_reasons,
      minimum_engagement_mode: result.minimum_engagement_mode,
      pending_mode_change: result.pending_mode_change,
      lifecycle_reason: result.lifecycle_reason,
      lifecycle_detail: result.lifecycle_detail,
      cost_ledger_entries: result.cost_ledger_entries,
      api_brain: {
        escalation_count: result.escalation_count ?? 0,
        packet: result.api_brain_packet,
        output: result.api_brain_output,
      },
    }
  }

  const { searchKnowledgeBase } = await import("../tools/orchestration-gateway.js")
  trace(runId, {
    type: "node.started",
    node: "rag_retrieval",
    details: { query_present: Boolean(inputData.query) },
  })
  const evidence = await searchKnowledgeBase(deps.cfg, String(inputData.query ?? ""), inputData.domain_weights ?? {})
  trace(runId, { type: "node.completed", node: "rag_retrieval" })
  return { evidence, top_k: inputData.top_k, min_score: inputData.min_score }
}

export async function executeWorkflowRun(params: {
  deps: WorkflowRunnerDeps
  runId: string
  prepared: PreparedWorkflowRequest
  controller: AbortController
  source: string
}): Promise<void> {
  const { deps, runId, prepared, controller, source } = params
  const started = Date.now()
  trace(runId, {
    type: "workflow.started",
    message: "Workflow run started.",
    details: { workflow_name: prepared.workflowName, source },
  })
  await publishAndRecord({
    deps,
    runId,
    workflowName: prepared.workflowName,
    type: "run.started",
    payload: { kind: "workflow", status: "started" },
    source,
  })

  try {
    const output = await invokePreparedWorkflow({
      deps,
      prepared,
      runId,
      signal: controller.signal,
    })
    const duration = (Date.now() - started) / 1000
    completeWorkflowRun(runId, output)
    const rec = getWorkflowRun(runId)
    const eventType = rec?.status === "cancelled" ? "run.cancelled" : "run.completed"
    await publishAndRecord({
      deps,
      runId,
      workflowName: prepared.workflowName,
      type: eventType,
      payload: { kind: "workflow", status: rec?.status ?? "completed", duration },
      source,
    })
    trace(runId, {
      type: rec?.status === "cancelled" ? "workflow.cancelled" : "workflow.completed",
      details: { duration },
    })
  } catch (error) {
    const aborted = controller.signal.aborted || (error instanceof DOMException && error.name === "AbortError")
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    if (aborted) {
      completeWorkflowRun(runId, { cancelled: true, reason: message })
      await publishAndRecord({
        deps,
        runId,
        workflowName: prepared.workflowName,
        type: "run.cancelled",
        payload: { kind: "workflow", status: "cancelled" },
        source,
      })
      trace(runId, { type: "workflow.cancelled", message })
    } else {
      failWorkflowRun(runId, message)
      await publishAndRecord({
        deps,
        runId,
        workflowName: prepared.workflowName,
        type: "run.failed",
        payload: { kind: "workflow", status: "failed", error: message },
        source,
      })
      trace(runId, { type: "workflow.failed", message })
    }
  } finally {
    clearWorkflowAbortController(runId)
  }
}

export function createWorkflowRunHandle(params: {
  deps: WorkflowRunnerDeps
  prepared: PreparedWorkflowRequest
  source: string
}): {
  runId: string
  controller: AbortController
  handle: Record<string, unknown>
} {
  const runId = crypto.randomUUID()
  const controller = new AbortController()
  const record = createWorkflowRun(runId, params.prepared.workflowName)
  registerWorkflowAbortController(runId, controller)
  return {
    runId,
    controller,
    handle: {
      status: "running",
      workflow_id: runId,
      workflow_name: params.prepared.workflowName,
      started_at: record.started_at,
      status_url: `/v1/workflows/${runId}/status?include_trace=true`,
      cancel_url: `/v1/workflows/${runId}/cancel`,
    },
  }
}

export function workflowStatusPayload(runId: string, includeTrace: boolean): Record<string, unknown> | undefined {
  const rec = getWorkflowRun(runId)
  if (!rec) return undefined
  return {
    id: rec.id,
    status: rec.status,
    workflow_name: rec.workflow_name,
    started_at: rec.started_at,
    finished_at: rec.finished_at,
    cancel_requested: rec.cancel_requested === true,
    trace_summary: rec.trace_summary,
    observability: rec.observability,
    result: rec.result,
    error: rec.error,
    ...(includeTrace ? { trace_events: rec.trace_events } : {}),
  }
}
```

### `services/agent-platform-service/server/src/workflow/running-ingest.ts`

- repo: `HHPE-HRG/xlotyl`
- size: 2252 bytes

```ts
import type { PlatformConfig } from "../config.js"

export type WorkflowLifecycleEventType =
  | "run.started"
  | "run.progress"
  | "run.completed"
  | "run.failed"
  | "run.cancelled"

export type WorkflowLifecyclePublishResult =
  | { status: "not_configured" }
  | { status: "accepted"; durability?: string }
  | { status: "http_error"; statusCode: number; detail: string }
  | { status: "unavailable"; detail: string }

export async function publishWorkflowLifecycleEvent(params: {
  cfg: PlatformConfig
  type: WorkflowLifecycleEventType
  workflowId: string
  workflowName: string
  payload: Record<string, unknown>
  source: string
}): Promise<WorkflowLifecyclePublishResult> {
  const base = params.cfg.orchestratorApiUrl?.trim()
  if (!base) return { status: "not_configured" }

  const url = new URL(`${base}/api/running/workflows/ingest`)
  const headers: Record<string, string> = { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
  const key =
    (process.env.ORCHESTRATOR_RUNNING_INGEST_API_KEY ??
      process.env.RUNNING_INGEST_API_KEY ??
      "").trim()
  if (key) {
    headers["X-Running-Ingest-Key"] = key
  }

  const controller = new AbortController()
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 2500)
  try {
    const res = await fetch(url, {
      method: "POST",
      headers,
      signal: controller.signal,
      body: JSON.stringify({
        type: params.type,
        workflow_id: params.workflowId,
        workflow_name: params.workflowName,
        payload: params.payload,
        source: params.source,
      }),
    })
    if (!res.ok) {
      return {
        status: "http_error",
        statusCode: res.status,
        detail: await res.text(),
      }
    }
    let durability: string | undefined
    try {
      const data = await res.clone().json() as { durability?: unknown }
      if (typeof data.durability === "string") {
        durability = data.durability
      }
    } catch {
      // Response body is optional for observability.
    }
    return { status: "accepted", ...(durability ? { durability } : {}) }
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      status: "unavailable",
      detail: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    }
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout)
  }
}
```
